nodes.snippet_EN: It's been a while since the last time I was here, when I met Jun...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 好久没有回来了...这是遇到李莫的地方...

nodes.snippet_EN: Melody of Starsong was a love story, through and through, and it made me a little uncomfortable. I was surprised to see Eda fully engaged. I never knew that she liked love stories.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 龙脉长歌的故事是完全的爱情神话， 这让我有点不适。 但我意外的，是艾妲看得非常投入， 她比我想像中还喜欢这种题材。
nodes.option_EN: Okay... Let's go.
nodes.option_CHS: 我们...一起去就可以

nodes.snippet_EN: The crowds grew larger and larger, and by the time Remi found us, we had been pushed to the outer perimeter. We could hear the beautiful melodies coming out of the temple, but only barely made out the performance on stage.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 人群越来越多，等到菈米亚找到我们时，我们已经被人群挤到外围，只听到神殿传出悠扬的音乐声，只能依稀看到公演的过程。
nodes.option_EN: Let's wait for Remi and we'll all go together.
nodes.option_CHS: 等菈米亚回来一起去吧

nodes.snippet_EN: And that is why we believe the Lumen Civilization is so distantly removed from our human ancestors...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 这就是为什么我们认为古代的龙脉文明，跟人类的祖先相距甚远的原因...

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda was a bit embarrassed sitting in on the conference. The discussion on the origins of lumen continued for several hours. She was a bit annoyed at the whole thing, but she was lively, and spoke with confidence. I still remember how vividly engaged she was.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲有点尴尬的坐上研讨会的一席，当天关于龙脉起源的辩论持续了数个小时，说起这段往事时，艾妲多少有点无奈，但她神采飞扬讨论的样子，却一直让我记在心中。
nodes.option_EN: ...Whatever. Let's get this over with.
nodes.option_CHS: ...就参加吧

nodes.snippet_EN: (Crappers, can't find Eddie... Did she head off to look for intel?)
nodes.snippet_CHS: （糟糕，跟姐姐走散了...是去哪里打听龙脉消息了吗？）

nodes.snippet_EN: The day we got interviewed, the reporter told Eda that she'd been looking for her for a long time and had once met the Red Chamber's technician. "Boy, did she have a terrible temper," she said.  I always thought that if Remi didn't hate me so much, the journey would have gone a bit smoother.  But I still miss those days.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那天来采访的记者跟艾妲说， 她找了艾妲很久，还遇到红楼的船师， 那位女孩脾气似乎不太好。 我常想如果菈米亚没有讨厌我， 旅行或许会更顺利一点，  但如今我却只有怀念那时的日子。
nodes.option_EN: Couple? Relationship? Get the hell outta here!
nodes.option_CHS: 什么鬼恋情，滚出我视线！

nodes.snippet_EN: Warning: Incoming solar flare from star Ignis arriving in 30 seconds.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告，来自烛龙的恒星闪焰，即将于30标准秒后抵达

nodes.snippet_EN: Runners, do you need help...?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 探勘人，需要帮忙吗...？ 我还想说是什么紧急落难，需要临时支援...没想到是你们这群头痛的小鬼

nodes.snippet_EN: You the transport crew? Put the container in Warehouse Four.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 是运输队吗？请把货柜放在第四号仓库，请遵照秩序，听从分装指示

nodes.snippet_EN: This is a warning to the vessel ahead. You are in United Mining military airspace. Please present a valid military visa.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告前方的龙脉探测船，本空域为矿联军事重区，请提交合法军事签证

nodes.snippet_EN: We are notifying the distressed vessel ahead, according to Article 14 of the Thousand Peaks' Treaty of Autonomy...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通告步入领空的落难船只，依据群山自治公约第十四条规定，

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, I'm getting unidentified signals from the ship ahead. Looks like bounty hunters!
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，前方飞船讯号无法辨识 应该是追杀悬赏来的奖金猎人！

nodes.snippet_EN: Neverlasting paths... My Binarii prayer disc is broken... What am I going to do?
nodes.snippet_CHS: ...二向无常...用来祷告的引魂盘怎么会碎掉...这怎么办？

nodes.snippet_EN: We're getting an unknown communication request. I'm putting it through now:
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼收到不明的通讯请求，现在解析出来：

nodes.snippet_EN: What are we doing here? I should be focusing on my master...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我说，来这里做什么，当务之急是找到师父吧...

nodes.snippet_EN: May Ignis shed light upon your good deeds, runners from afar...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 愿烛龙光照，今日众善奉行，远道而来的探勘人...

nodes.snippet_EN: Endless lumen, light the way... Welcome... stranded comrades of the Peaks. We are always ready to assist those in need.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 龙脉常在，风水引路...欢迎...群山落难的伙伴...我们随时可以援助

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, some merchant vessel in distress is trying to contact us. They wanna trade with us or something.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐有艘落难的贸易船主动和我们通讯，要求和我们进行交易

nodes.snippet_EN: What the hell, we're already short on freighters, and you want us to increase production?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 搞什么鬼，运输船就是不够了，还要我们增产？做事情有没有规划！

nodes.snippet_EN: Hey! Don't the people of the asteroid belt have any rights?!
nodes.snippet_CHS: 小行星带就不是人吗，你们的贸易谈判没我们万道烛龙商会怎么行，让我进去吧，搞什么密会？

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, there's an electromagnetic reaction occurring at the transport station's main gate, even though it's destroyed...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，传送港毁坏的大门中央，有不正常的电磁反应...

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, a United Mining patrol ship has already caught up to us. What should we do?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，我们被矿联的巡逻船逮到了，有什么指示吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, there's a huge fleet of United Mining vessels ahead.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，是矿联扫荡黑帮的大型船团，要求我们立刻开启通讯...这没办法了

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, Red Chamber just got an encrypted message from the Daily Lumen.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，红楼频道收到龙脉日报的加密信息

nodes.snippet_EN: You from Prosthesis Energy? Our scrappers here are itching to get to work.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 义体动力的货船吗？等待上工的拾荒人都排到不知道哪去了...

nodes.snippet_EN: Ignis above, the Red Chamber crew! I've finally found you!
nodes.snippet_CHS: 烛龙在上，红楼船队！终于遇到你们了

nodes.snippet_EN: I hate to say it, but if it had to do with Banshee, it was almost guaranteed that we would be duped.  If we were lucky, something like this would happen. We got some intel on a cave, but it definitely wasn't Banshee.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 不得不说，每次只要用黑龙当理由， 我们就很难逃过被诈骗的命运。  运气好点时会像这次一样拿到龙脉方位， 但永远不会是黑龙。
nodes.option_EN: (It concerns Eda's master. Let her deal with it.)
nodes.option_CHS: （跟艾妲的师父有关，就让她交涉吧...）

nodes.snippet_EN: "Oh no, no, no. There are 66 members in the Capybara Merchant Society. Whoever that was, it was either my friend, or my friend's friend."  He started backing away as he spoke, and before I could ask any more questions, he was gone.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「没没没，我们豚鲸商社有66位...如果你曾经见到谁，一定是我朋友的朋友。」  他边说边走，当我还想追问时，却已经不见人影。
nodes.option_EN: Excuse me, have we met before?
nodes.option_CHS: 老鼠兄弟，我们是不是哪里见过？

nodes.snippet_EN: When I met back up with the crew, Eda was doing an interview with a reporter. The Daily Lumen apparently wanted to do some special report on us...  "Thank you so much. This wonderful story of yours will certainly touch the hearts of Mount Aurora's youth."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那天等我回到集合点时， 艾妲正在跟一位记者进行访谈， 听说龙脉日报希望为我们做一篇特别报导...  「谢谢，有你们这么好的故事为矿脉背书...朝山的年轻人会因为你们而感动的。」
nodes.option_EN: ...I can get you in touch with the captain. The guy's just a servant.
nodes.option_CHS: ...男的只是仆役，我帮你联络船长就好

nodes.snippet_EN: Our polite refusal seemed to disappoint those attending the conference.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 婉拒了对方，研讨会的人群似乎有点失望。
nodes.option_EN: Our mission is to look for caves, and that comes first. Let's go.
nodes.option_CHS: 眼前的龙脉任务第一优先..离开吧

nodes.snippet_EN: After a period of suffocating silence, we received a message:  "Miss Eda, please forgive us for disturbing the journey of a First Class United Mining Officer."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 一阵令人窒息的沉默后，对方的通讯来电：  「尊贵的矿联一级士官，艾妲女士，请原谅我们打扰您的航行之旅。」  我记得艾妲一脸受不了，还有菈米亚得意的表情。
nodes.option_EN: Send a modified signal to make them think we're also a United Mining vessel.
nodes.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为我们也是矿业联合船舰

nodes.snippet_EN: For a while, we thought we had gotten lucky and passed through enemy lines, but a rail cannon sniped us from a distance.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们一度以为侥幸的冲过火网，但是巨大的磁轨炮却从远方狙击而来，我印象只剩一片红色的闪光...
nodes.option_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
nodes.option_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！

nodes.snippet_EN: As I grew older, I would look fondly back on the times we spent taking up odd jobs to fund our search for lumen.  The man checked the cargo to make sure nothing was missing, before paying for our delivery.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 老了的我，常会怀念跟艾妲冒险时， 为了筹备资金四处打工的日常。  对方打开了货柜后一一验货， 发现品项没有遗漏后，将酬劳盘点给我们。
nodes.option_EN: The goods are right here.
nodes.option_CHS: 你的货物都准备好了

nodes.snippet_EN: "Don't waste my time, kids."  He shooed us away after realizing he mistook us for someone else.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「小朋友别浪费我们时间。」  发觉自己认错人，对方随手将我们打发。
nodes.option_EN: I have no idea what you're talking about...
nodes.option_CHS: 我不清楚你在说什么...？

nodes.snippet_CHS: （不会发生）
nodes.option_EN: Pose as a civilian ship by sending a modified signal.
nodes.option_CHS: 试着发送伪装讯号过去，伪装自己是一般民间船

nodes.snippet_EN: The old signal modifier failed to convince them. They immediately saw through the trick, and responded with a barrage of attacks.  Although we managed to escape, Red Chamber took quite a few hits.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 破旧的通讯器材似乎没有奏效， 对方瞬间拆穿了我们的伪装讯号，瞬间炮火齐上， 虽然逃脱成功，红楼却受了严重的伤。

nodes.snippet_EN: The ship took multiple hits as we charged through the enemy line.  After some panicked maneuvering, we managed to escape enemy fire.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 穿越的过程我们遭受数次射击， 一阵惊慌之下我们勉强穿过了火网。
nodes.option_EN: We've got no choice. Let's charge through and take a few hits.
nodes.option_CHS: 顾不得装甲受损了，冲过去吧

nodes.snippet_EN: From what I remember, their communications officer seemed confused about his mistake, so they just decided to let us go.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 印象中，对方通讯官发现自己弄错有点不解，却依然放行了我们。
nodes.option_EN: Pose as a civilian ship by sending a modified signal.
nodes.option_CHS: 试着发送伪装讯号过去，伪装自己是一般民间船

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as our credits were transferred into the electronic account, we were bombarded with enemy fire. Panicked, Remi dodged the attack, and we were lucky enough to escape...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 信用点才刚透过电子户头落款，对方鱼雷就打了出来，菈米亚惊慌的闪避，最后运气很好的逃脱...  从那时我知道，海盗果然是海盗， 不能随意打交道。
nodes.option_EN: Bounty hunters are in it for the money. Try to bribe them.
nodes.option_CHS: 追悬赏的都是为了钱，试着贿络他们

nodes.snippet_EN: Remi didn't really want to sing, but she did it for Eda. I was so used to Remi shouting and screaming that I was shocked to hear how beautiful her voice was.  She sang softly, but it was full of feeling, and harmonized with Eda perfectly.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 菈米亚虽然不情愿，却还是答应了艾妲的要求·。跟她平常骂人的声音不同，她唱歌的声音很细，小声却满腹感情，与艾妲完美的合音。
nodes.option_EN: Remi is always listening to me sing. How about having her join me this time?
nodes.option_CHS: 菈米亚听我唱歌那么多次，跟她一起唱吧

nodes.snippet_EN: What a terrible experience.  After my "performance", even Remi didn't want to be too mean to me.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那是很灾难的经验， 连菈米亚都难得的不想责备我。
nodes.option_EN: Let's see how the whole crew sounds!
nodes.option_CHS: 全船队一起试试看好了...

nodes.snippet_EN: We lined up like drones and saw the lumium we were responsible for taken by a robotic arm and arranged on an export rack with millions of barrels. Eda looked away. Compared to the colossus that was United Mining, we were nothing.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们如机械般列队，看到我们负责处理的汜气，被机械手臂架到几万桶的出货架陈列，艾妲别过头去，面对矿业联合的巨大，我们什么都不是。
nodes.option_EN: Jun always keeps his word. I suppose that's a good thing.
nodes.option_CHS: 答应人的事尽量做到，是李莫的优点

nodes.snippet_EN: Even though we had promised we'd help, we simply left. Back then, I could accept whatever decision Eda made.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管口头答应了对方，但我们还是离开了，当时我认为只要是艾妲说的，我都可配合。
nodes.option_EN: Remi's right. We'll figure out what to do with the container.
nodes.option_CHS: 菈米亚说得对，货柜私下处理掉就好

nodes.snippet_EN: Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.  That day we were unfortunate enough to experience this firsthand.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有愤怒与天罚的神话，我们终于体会到了。
nodes.option_EN: Raise the shields to full power!
nodes.option_CHS: 启动汜气装甲最大电磁输出功率！

nodes.snippet_EN: Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.  We sat and panicked in the safety shelter, as the ship's alarms blared and all systems went haywire.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有愤怒与天罚的神话。  躲在避难室的我们听见船内的警报，电子零件失灵引发的异常，顿时觉得恐慌。
nodes.option_EN: Wait it out in the anti-radiation shelter.
nodes.option_CHS: 躲进船内抗辐射的避难室，撑过去

nodes.snippet_EN: The signal from our old signal modifier was cracked and we were met with enemy fire.  Although we managed to escape, Red Chamber suffered a good amount of damage.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 破旧通讯器材的讯号被解析出来， 对方的炮火齐上， 虽然逃脱成功，红楼也受了不小的伤。

nodes.snippet_EN: They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of enemy fire.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 讯号在瞬间被拆解出来，对方的火炮齐射。  尽管最后侥幸的冲过火网，但是船基本上受伤严重，当时我们都怀疑自己还能航行多久...

nodes.snippet_EN: I still remember the response they sent back...   "First Class Detection Officer Edalune Grant, we've received your request and will safely escort you to a resupply point."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得通讯传来了这样的信息..  「艾妲拉姆・葛兰特一级探测士官，仅收到您发出的救援，我们会安全地将您护送至可补给的地点。」  听到士官时，艾妲露出有点别扭的表情。
nodes.option_EN: Pose as a United Mining patrol crew that needs some help.
nodes.option_CHS: 发出矿联的军用伪造讯号，假扮自己是需要救援的巡逻队

nodes.snippet_EN: They grazed the side of our ship with their rail cannon before leaving us with a warning and taking off. As expected, things didn't always go as planned.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方的磁轨炮直接扫过红楼的侧翼，留下了警告信息后离去，事情果然不会那么顺利。

nodes.snippet_EN: After the fee had been taken from our credit account, a small rescue vessel towed Red Chamber to a supply station.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 信用帐户扣缴后，对方的救援小队将红楼一路拖回可以补给的地方，直到抵达补给点后，通讯端连一次问候也没有。
nodes.option_EN: The way things are looking, paying them off seems like the best option...
nodes.option_CHS: 事到如今，除了缴款也没有更好的办法了···

nodes.snippet_EN: We listened to them reminisce about their days in the military as they towed us back to a resupply point.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 商船将我们带回了可以补给的地方，运输红楼的过程中，电讯一端的对方聊着自己过往从军的经历。
nodes.option_EN: Let Remi do the negotiating.
nodes.option_CHS: 让菈米亚交涉看看

nodes.snippet_EN: The pirates made their intentions clear, as their boarding vessel smashed into our ship.  While we managed to fight them off, the ship took considerable damage.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那时红楼突然遭到登陆艇的撞击，是伪装的海盗。  尽管最后击退了对方，却受到了严重的伤害。

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as we declined, we were met with a barrage of enemy fire. Fortunately this was expected, and the ship took minimal damage.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们一拒绝，对方的炮火就落了下来，但幸亏决定得早，红楼只有些许损伤。
nodes.option_EN: Better to decline the offer. They could be pirates...
nodes.option_CHS: 怕是海盗，不要贸然接受援助...

nodes.snippet_EN: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end as they towed us back to the nearest space station. Dealing with stranded ships seemed to be a regular occurrence for them.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通讯一段有着细碎的抱怨声，他们似乎很常处理这种遇难的船只，默默地将我们带回最近的空间站
nodes.option_EN: Ask for assistance.
nodes.option_CHS: 请求对方的协助

nodes.snippet_EN: Announcing that we were the Red Chamber crew was not only enough for the squad to escort us back for resupplies, they even offered us some fuel.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅将我们带回补给处，更为我们将油量做了一定的补给
nodes.option_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
nodes.option_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda was unable to convince them. For some reason it raised their suspicion, and after a brief moment of silence, they left without a word.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲交涉失败，对方认为我们可能是别有意图的民间船，沉默后自行离去。

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, I'm getting unidentified signals from the ship ahead.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，前方飞船讯号无法辨识

nodes.snippet_EN: Our modified signal was cracked and we were immediately bombarded.  The Red Chamber's light armor stood no chance and was riddled with holes.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我只记得我们的伪装讯号被解析出来， 然后是一阵炮火声， 红楼薄弱的装甲瞬间被打穿。
nodes.option_EN: Pose as a United Mining military vessel by sending a modified signal.
nodes.option_CHS: 发送伪装讯号，告诉他们我们是矿联的军船

nodes.snippet_EN: Our modified signal was cracked and the sounds of enemy fire piercing the hull reverberated throughout the ship.  The flames of the explosion looked like a beam of white light...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼的伪装讯号被解析出来， 然后是船体被炮火贯穿的巨响。 爆发的火焰，在我眼中却像是一道白光...

nodes.snippet_EN: The ship took multiple hits as we charged through the enemy line.  The last thing I remember was a flash of white light...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 穿越的过程里我们遭受数次射击， 红楼剧烈的震荡后， 我记忆中只剩下白光...
nodes.option_EN: We've got no choice. Charge through by taking a few hits.
nodes.option_CHS: 顾不得装甲受损了，冲过去吧

nodes.snippet_EN: Endless lumen, light the way... Welcome... stranded comrades of the Peaks. We are always ready to assist those in need.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 龙脉常在，风水引路...欢迎...群山落难的伙伴...我们随时可以援助

nodes.snippet_EN: We listened to them reminisce about their days in the military as they towed us back to a resupply point.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 商船将我们带回了可以补给的地方，运输红楼的过程中，电讯一端的对方聊着自己过往从军的经历。
nodes.option_EN: Let Remi do the negotiating.
nodes.option_CHS: 让菈米亚交涉看看

nodes.snippet_EN: The pirates made their intentions clear, as their boarding vessel smashed into our ship.  While we managed to fight them off, the ship took considerable damage.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那时红楼突然遭到登陆艇的撞击，是伪装的海盗。  尽管最后击退了对方，却受到了严重的伤害。

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as we declined, we were met with a barrage of enemy fire. Fortunately this was expected, and the ship took minimal damage.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们一拒绝，对方的炮火就落了下来，但幸亏决定得早，红楼只有些许损伤。
nodes.option_EN: Better to decline the offer. They could be pirates...
nodes.option_CHS: 怕是海盗，不要贸然接受援助...

nodes.snippet_EN: Hey runner, you need some help?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 探勘人，需要帮忙吗？依据龙脉公约，不论身份，只要船队有群山公民，我们将会提供人道支援

nodes.snippet_EN: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end as they towed us back to the nearest space station. Dealing with stranded ships seemed to be a regular occurrence for them.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通讯一段有着细碎的抱怨声，他们似乎很常处理这种遇难的船只，默默地将我们带回最近的空间站
nodes.option_EN: See if we can convince them to help us...
nodes.option_CHS: 试着拜托对方看看，请求协助...

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda was unable to convince them. For some reason it raised their suspicion, and after a brief moment of silence, they left without a word.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲交涉失败，对方认为我们可能是别有意图的民间船，沉默后自行离去。

nodes.snippet_EN: Announcing that we were the Red Chamber crew was not only enough for the squad to escort us back for resupplies, they even offered us some fuel.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅将我们带回补给处，更为我们将油量做了一定的补给
nodes.option_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
nodes.option_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

nodes.snippet_EN: Do you require any assistance, runner?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 探勘人，需要帮忙吗？依据龙脉公约，不论身份，只要船队有群山公民，我们将会提供人道支援

nodes.snippet_EN: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end as they towed us back to the nearest space station. Dealing with stranded ships seemed to be a regular occurrence for them.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通讯一段有着细碎的抱怨声，他们似乎很常处理这种遇难的船只，默默地将我们带回最近的空间站
nodes.option_EN: See if we can convince them to help us...
nodes.option_CHS: 试着拜托对方看看，请求协助...

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda was unable to convince them. For some reason it raised their suspicion, and after a brief moment of silence, they left without a word.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲交涉失败，对方认为我们可能是别有意图的民间船，沉默后自行离去。

nodes.snippet_EN: Announcing that we were the Red Chamber crew was not only enough for the squad to escort us back for resupplies, they even offered us some fuel.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅将我们带回补给处，更为我们将油量做了一定的补给
nodes.option_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
nodes.option_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

nodes.snippet_EN: We are notifying the distressed vessel ahead, according to Article 14 of the Thousand Peaks' Treaty of Autonomy...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通告步入领空的落难船只，依据群山自治公约第十四条规定，

nodes.snippet_EN: I still remember the response they sent back...   "First Class Detection Officer Edalune Grant, we've received your request and will safely escort you to a resupply point."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得通讯传来了这样的信息：  「艾妲拉姆・葛兰特一级探测士官，仅收到您发出的救援，我们会安全地将您护送至可补给的地点。」  听到士官时，艾妲露出有点别扭的表情。
nodes.option_EN: Pose as a United Mining patrol crew that needs some help.
nodes.option_CHS: 发出矿联的军用伪造讯号，假扮自己是需要救援的巡逻队

nodes.snippet_EN: They grazed the side of our ship with their rail cannon before leaving us with a warning and taking off.  As expected, things didn't always go as planned.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方的磁轨炮直接扫过红楼的侧翼，留下了警告信息后离去，事情果然不会那么顺利

nodes.snippet_EN: After the fee had been taken from our credit account, a small rescue vessel towed Red Chamber to a supply station.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 信用帐户扣缴后，对方的救援小队将红楼一路拖回可以补给的地方，直到抵达补给点后，通讯端连一次问候也没有。
nodes.option_EN: The way things are looking, paying them off seems like the best option...
nodes.option_CHS: 事到如今，除了缴款也没有更好的办法了···

nodes.snippet_EN: (I heard Eda saying that we've been running on a tight budget. There must be some way to make some credits...)
nodes.snippet_CHS: （听艾妲说，最近船队的预算很紧，有没有可以赚钱的方法...）

nodes.snippet_EN: "You'd like to help? What's that supposed to mean? Are you going to do it or not?"  He went on about all the space debris on the spaceway and how they needed someone to clean it up.  I did a pretty good job cleaning up the space debris and found out it was a lot like cave running. It looked like I had finally found a job I was good at.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「想做就做，还什么愿不愿意。」  对方碎念了几句，直说最近轨道上满满的宇宙垃圾，需要有人去协助清理。  我协助的过程非常的顺利，清理宇宙垃圾跟探索龙脉很像，我应该是找到了我拿手的工作。
nodes.option_EN: We need the money. I'd like to help.
nodes.option_CHS: 我们的经济状况不太好，我愿意帮忙

nodes.snippet_EN: "You'd like to help? What's that supposed to mean? Are you going to do it or not?"  He went on about all the space debris along the orbit and how they needed someone to clean it up.  Cleaning up space debris wasn't difficult, but just when I was halfway done, a random piece of debris nearly sent me flying and messed up my rhythm...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「想做就做，还什么愿不愿意。」  对方碎念了几句，直说最近轨道上满满的宇宙垃圾，需要有人去协助清理。

nodes.snippet_EN: I've been seeing you wander around for a while now. Are you looking for a name?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 看你在这里晃了好一阵子，你是在找某个名字吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: Although East Ocean and Thousand Peaks both fought against United Mining during the war, the sheer amount of casualties listed before me helped me understand why they harbored such hatred toward outsiders like me.  I was paid for my time afterward, but it wasn't a joyful experience.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管瀛海当年作战的对象， 多半是矿业联合，少有群山本地居民， 但看见名单上，龙脉冲突的死难者的惊人数量， 我多少能体会外地人被厌恶的原因。  事成我得到些报酬，但没有多开心。
nodes.option_EN: I'm willing to do anything to help the crew.
nodes.option_CHS: 如果能帮上船队，我愿意试试看

nodes.snippet_EN: Although East Ocean and Thousand Peaks both fought against United Mining during the war, the sheer amount of casualties listed before me helped me understand why they harbored such hatred toward outsiders like me.  Perhaps I was too distracted by these thoughts. I wasn't paid much afterward.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管瀛海当年作战的对象， 多半是矿业联合，少有群山本地居民， 但看见名单上，龙脉冲突的死难者的惊人数量， 我多少能体会外地人被厌恶的原因。  或许是一直想着这事的不专心， 事成我只得到少许奖励。

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber? The trading vessel? So pleased that you've come here.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼商船队吗，真开心你们来到这里，

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda spent an entire day discussing Thousand Peaks' trade routes with the director of the logistics center. The topics ranged from improving the current business model to how to enter the black market.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 印象中，艾妲花了一整天跟物流中心的经理沟通群山的贸易路线图，包括如何转运，以及黑市间的贸易要如何进行。
nodes.option_EN: Sure, not a problem. I can give you some suggestions.
nodes.option_CHS: 没问题，我来分享点建议

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda spent an entire day discussing Thousand Peaks' trade routes with the director of the logistics center. The topics ranged from improving the current business model to how to enter the black market.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 印象中，艾妲花了一整天跟物流中心的经理沟通群山的贸易路线图，包括如何转运，以及黑市的贸易该如何进行。

nodes.snippet_EN: "Starting today, the Cave Verification Bureau will be outsourcing work. For parties who are interested, please line up and wait patiently."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「即日起认证保护局接受外聘人员，请有意愿者于排队线等候」

nodes.snippet_EN: Our experience with excavation allowed us to speed through a large number of applications in no time.  Still, Eda was not happy that we were doing work for United Mining.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 因为有着龙脉探勘的实地经验，我快速地完成大量申请审查。  但艾妲对于我突然跑去当矿业联合的临时工，只有不满。
nodes.option_EN: Some work could be good for the crew...
nodes.option_CHS: 这样多少可以帮助红楼...

nodes.snippet_EN: "We will not do any work for United Mining!"  Not soon after I had agreed to the work, Eda found out and had the contract terminated. Both parties were not happy, and we even had to pay a fee for violating the contract.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「别帮矿业联合做任何事！」  我才答应对方没多久，艾妲发现我接下来这差事，直接跟对方理论后将劳动契约终止，弄得双方很不愉快，还付出了违约金。

nodes.snippet_EN: Things workin' out for you in the Peaks? There's a bunch of unlucky bastards in the bar that fate just don't seem to care for.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 怎么，在群山的冒险还顺利吗？酒吧里多得是不受命运眷顾的倒霉蛋，

nodes.snippet_EN: The barkeep took me into a secret door around back. Inside was a massive dryer and shredder used for making smokeable sticks. It turned out that this was where the real money came from. I helped him package the goods as fast as I could.  After I finished up, the barkeep was quite happy with the results and paid me as he had promised.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 老板领我走下后面的密门， 里面藏着大型的烘干机与切丝机， 那是用来制作私烟的器具， 原来这才是老板真正的收入， 我迅速地协助分装。  事成后对方十分满意，给了我...
nodes.option_EN: (Jun, please...)
nodes.option_CHS: （拜托李莫了...）

nodes.snippet_EN: The barkeep took me into a secret door around back. Inside was a massive dryer and shredder used for making smokeable sticks. It turned out that this was where the real money came from.  Unfortunately, I couldn't stop thinking about Kay and was unable to focus. The barkeep raised his voice and let me know he wasn't happy with the results. Still, I did get paid.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 老板领我走下后面的密门， 里面藏着大型的烘干机与切丝机， 那是用来制作私烟的器具， 原来这才是老板真正的收入，  但因为想到大魁让我不是很专心， 被老板念了一顿...事后我只得到...

nodes.snippet_EN: "Bummer! Well, if you ever need to make a few bucks, just come on back!"  The barkeep laughed and went around back to continue working.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「太可惜了，有需要记得来找我啊！」  老板笑了笑，就回去后面继续工作了。
nodes.option_EN: Sorry, our crew is pretty busy with cave running.
nodes.option_CHS: 抱歉了，但我们船队还忙着探勘龙脉

nodes.snippet_EN: You're from out of town, aren't you? It's people like you that started the war. Don't really want to get involved with you...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 你外地来的吧？就你们这些人搞什么龙脉冲突...真不想跟你接触...

nodes.snippet_EN: I don't know how many ships I took apart, but after hours and hours of tough work, I reached the goal set by the manager.  "Well, well, well. Didn't think outsiders could work as hard as us Peakers!"  He handed me some decent pay as he commended my work.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我不知道我协助拆解船只多久，经过漫长的努力， 总算达成了垃圾山工头规定的目标。  「没想到，外地人也有不错的。」  工头一边说，一边给了我一笔不小的奖励。
nodes.option_EN: (It doesn't matter what his views are, I need to contribute to the crew...)
nodes.option_CHS: （不管他怎么说，我得努力帮上红楼...）

nodes.snippet_EN: I didn't have much experience dismantling ships. What's more... I couldn't stop thinking about my dear Khun. It took a long time before I got the job done.  The manager kept grumbling about how unreliable outsiders were. He eventually paid, but it was a lot less than what we agreed upon.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我没有多少解体船的经验... 而且这会让我一直想起鲲， 最后花了不少时间才做到对方的期待。  工头抱怨着外地人不可靠， 最后把预定的报酬减少了不少。

nodes.snippet_EN: "Pffft... Work is work, kid. There's money to be made."  The manager was not happy. He told me to get out of his face and stop blocking the path.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「啐，有工作就不错了，还嫌东嫌西。」  工头相当不满，叫我快点离开他面前，不要挡路。
nodes.option_EN: Sorry, I don't think I'm suited for this type of work.
nodes.option_CHS: 失礼，这个工作不适合我

nodes.snippet_EN: Neverlasting paths. Child of East Ocean, so you've noticed as well?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 二向无常，瀛海的孩子...你也注意到了吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: "Neverlasting paths, what comes may not be what you ask, and what you ask may not come to pass..."  There were about ten people in the observatory, chanting Myrian scriptures as they operated various devices.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「二向无常，无往而遇，遇而无往...」  观测站聚集了十来人，他们一边颂扬万道经典，一边操作各种观测仪器。
nodes.option_EN: If you really need me, I can help you out.
nodes.option_CHS: 需要的话，我愿意帮你

nodes.snippet_EN: "Neverlasting paths, what comes may not be what you ask, and what you ask may not come to pass..."  There were about ten people in the observatory, reading Myrian scriptures as they operated various devices.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 观测站聚集了十来人，他们一边颂扬万道经典，一边操作各种观测仪器。

nodes.snippet_EN: "Neverlasting paths, what comes may not be what you ask."  The elderly man shook his head, and said to come find him if we changed our minds.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「二向无常，遇而无往。」  老人遗憾地摇头，要我们改变主意了就去找他。
nodes.option_EN: I've never done that before. I'm afraid I won't be of much help.
nodes.option_CHS: 我没有这方面的经验，帮不上忙

nodes.snippet_EN: The Red Chamber crew, right? Mind helping out with Fortune 9's crime rate?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼船队，来帮帮我们九禄吧，最近治安烂透了，听说你们曾经拆解了白帮的骗局

nodes.snippet_EN: "This is the kind of story that will inspire them," she said.  I spent some time telling the story about how I was tricked into Bones' base back then. It was a little embarrassing, but the investigators clearly enjoyed listening to my adventure.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「我们就是需要这类激励人心的故事。」她说。  我花了点时间说起当年在矿场上如何被骗，白帮又是如何设局，尽管丢脸，但稽查员却听得像是冒险剧情一样，对我的分享非常满意。
nodes.option_EN: I can give it a try.
nodes.option_CHS: 我可以尝试看看

nodes.snippet_EN: I spent some time telling the story about how I was tricked back then, but I struggled to recall the details, and the investigators lost interest as the story went on.  Afterward, the head of the Investigation Bureau told me that I should be proud of my contributions, however small, to making Fortune 9 a safer place.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我花了点时间说起当年如何交易被骗，但总有些细节想不起来...  最后稽查处的人们意兴阑珊，处长事后告诉我要以自己的贡献为傲，就算是小小努力，但长久下来，九禄的治安迟早会改头换面。

nodes.snippet_EN: "That's a shame, I'm sure your story would have been very valuable."  The head of the Investigation Bureau looked clearly disappointed as she returned to her mission.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「好吧，听不到你们的分享真可惜。」  稽查处长的眼中难掩失望，回头继续她的任务。
nodes.option_EN: I shouldn't promise things I'm not sure I can follow through on.
nodes.option_CHS: 不能乱答应，没做好反而会困扰人

nodes.snippet_EN: The Red Chamber crew, is there anything you need help with?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼商船队，你们有什么困难吗？上次你们协助拯救移民团，我一直没空好好道谢，这下我们有机会了吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: "Most trading vessels get lost on United Mining spaceways. It's unlikely the perpetrators were pirates...'  Eda presented her report and the patrol officer did not look pleased. The United Mining military's crooked practices were nothing new. They made up all sorts of excuses to make it hard on runners.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「失事的商船，几乎都是矿业联合的航线...犯人我想不是海盗...」  分析结束后，巡逻局的人对艾妲的报告感到无奈，这不是第一天的事情，对方就像是有牌的流氓，会以各种名义压迫探勘人。
nodes.option_EN: Sure, we'll take a look. Perhaps we'll find some unexpected intel...
nodes.option_CHS: 多少看看，或许会有什么有用的情报...

nodes.snippet_EN: "I can't seem to find a plausible answer."  Eda presented her report and the patrol officer did not look pleased. Nevertheless, she did compensate us for our troubles.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「找不出什么可靠的答案...」  分析结束后，巡逻局的人对艾妲的报告感到无奈，但依然协助我们进行简单的补给。

nodes.snippet_EN: Sometimes Eda didn't like accepting help from others. She always thought that she could take care of everything herself.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲有时不喜欢别人帮助，总认为自己处理就好。
nodes.option_EN: Don't worry about it. We can take care of ourselves.
nodes.option_CHS: 我们船队会自己处理

nodes.snippet_EN: Are you here to fix the memorial? Perfect timing. The foundation needs some help.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 来修补纪念塔的吗？刚好现在抚恤会缺人手

nodes.snippet_EN: I was in a bad place at the time. Whenever there was some way to help the crew, I put everything into it. It made me feel like I was still able to hold onto my pride.  The administrator was pleasantly surprised with my work, and he compensated us fairly.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当年的我十分落魄，对于只要能帮上船队的地方， 始终不遗余力，那是证明我还能拥有骄傲的方法。  管理员对于成果十分讶异，于是他给了我们...
nodes.option_EN: Yeah, I think we're gonna need him...
nodes.option_CHS: 只能麻烦李莫了...

nodes.snippet_EN: I was in a bad place at the time. Whenever there was some way to help the crew, I put everything into it. It made me feel like I was still able to hold onto my pride.  But the results weren't always ideal. My work failed to satisfy the administrator, so he didn't pay us too well.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当年的我十分落魄，对于只要能帮上船队的地方， 始终不遗余力，那是证明我还能拥有骄傲的方法。  但成果不会每次都理想， 管理员对成果颇有微词，于是他给了我们...

nodes.snippet_EN: "Not sure how people like you make it in the Peaks. No respect..."  The administrator was not at all happy with our response.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「群山小行星带怎么会有你这种人。」  印象中，管理员对此很不满意。
nodes.option_EN: No thanks. Let's get going.
nodes.option_CHS: 算了，还要赶路

nodes.snippet_EN: Hey runner, you carry yourself pretty well, and that body of yours ain't too bad.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那边的探勘家，看你的气质和仪态，应该出身不错吧？

nodes.snippet_EN: I was not expecting the work to be... that. Still, I was a man of my word. I helped them with whatever they needed and made sure the customers were satisfied.   Thinking back on it...*cough*... I try not to think about that experience.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 这工作跟我想得不同，但答应了就要尽力。 我帮他们做了很多事。 很多...... 但有些事不适合回忆。  最后大官们对我的表现很满意，给了我...
nodes.option_EN: I'll try my hand at anything!
nodes.option_CHS: 不管什么工作，我都愿意试试！

nodes.snippet_EN: I was not expecting the work to be... that. I guess I wasn't really suited for the job, because they ended up not paying me very well.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 这工作跟我想得不同。 我想我应该不太适合，最后只得到少许的酬劳。

nodes.snippet_EN: "C'mon! Think about it, we'll pay you real nice. Real nice!"  The director didn't think I'd refuse and she started sweating profusely. It looked like she really needed the help.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「再考虑一下吧！条件很优渥的。」  经理没想到我会拒绝，急得满头大汗。 看来她真的很缺人。
nodes.option_EN: Sorry, I'm not interested.
nodes.option_CHS: 抱歉，我对此没什么兴趣

nodes.snippet_EN: I hate to say it, but if it had to do with Banshee, it was almost guaranteed that we would be duped.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 不得不说，每次只要用黑龙当理由， 我们很难逃过被诈骗的命运。

nodes.snippet_EN: Warning: Red Chamber's heat signal has been locked on to. Contact in 20 seconds.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告，遭到热源锁定， 即将于20标准秒后接触

nodes.snippet_EN: Hello! Emeth is looking for Earth! Is there a planet called Earth here?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾姆要寻找地球，这里有叫做地球的行星吗！

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, there's a ship that keeps following us. They say they're a reporter from Krimson Kettle.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，有一艘船持续跟着我们，声称是红壶通信社的随船记者

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, we're getting warning signals from an abandoned recycling center, but I can't tell who's targeting us.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，废弃的垃圾场中传来警告的信息，我们不知道被谁锁定了。

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, a smuggler ship from the Myrian Ignis Guild is sending us a message saying they've got some nice goods to sell.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，前往竞技场的航道上，有艘万道烛龙商会的走私船，他主动传讯，说有好东西要卖我们

nodes.snippet_EN: This is Rabbit Hole Newswire... Subscribe to our channel and enjoy the most stunning voices of the Peaks.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 这里是兔窟通讯台...只要订阅我们频道，群山最动人的嗓音将陪你每日行船

nodes.snippet_EN: We're getting signals from a refugee ship...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 有艘难民船向我们发送讯号...

nodes.snippet_EN: [Receiving signal] 23ld9W_23...DLCI344000... 23ld9W_23...DLCI344000...
There are way too many people in the square. What's going on?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 广场人也太多了，这是什么活动，「纪念行星矿业联合龙脉冲突胜利六周年」...

nodes.snippet_EN: Lumen seeking vessel, I'm a supplier working with the United Mining military.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 收到讯号的龙脉探测船，我是矿联军特约供应商

nodes.snippet_EN: This is a warning to the lumen seeking vessel in orbit. The asteroid you are approaching is in United Mining airspace.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告轨道上的龙脉探测船，你接近的小行星位于矿联管理的轨道，如要继续前进，请提交你的电子签证

nodes.snippet_EN: This is a warning to the lumen seeking vessel at 12 o'clock. You are entering restricted airspace.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告，12点钟方向的民间船，你即将进入管制的轨道空域，请立即返航，否则将依法开火

nodes.snippet_EN: Warning: A large amount of debris has been detected in the spaceway.
Eddie, we're getting a signal from a ship saying they're a special correspondent from the Daily Lumen.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，我们收到了一艘船的信息，对方自称是龙脉日报特派员

nodes.snippet_EN: Lumen seeking vessel, there have been reports of witches helping pirates export large quantities of illegal lumen products.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 收到通讯的龙脉探测船，近日由于女巫协助黑帮，大量出口非法龙脉作物

nodes.snippet_EN: Lumen seeking vessel OPUS-03, Red Chamber. We are searching for a vessel of the same model you are flying.
nodes.snippet_CHS: OPUS-03-龙脉探测船「红楼」， 本空域正在搜索同型号的探测船

nodes.snippet_EN: Glory to the united! This is Unity News! Research indicates that witches become deformed after inhaling too much lumen.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 天佑矿联，这里是统合新闻台！ 根据最新研究指出，女巫由于吸食大量汜，身体已跟人类不同

nodes.snippet_EN: Lumen seeking vessel ahead, please provide your IDs immediately and cooperate with the search.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 前方的龙脉探测船，请尽速出示身份证明，配合搜索

nodes.snippet_EN: Gosh darn it... What the hell happened to the antenna? Did that repair man steal it?
nodes.snippet_CHS: ...完蛋了，天线怎么会不见，是上次外包的维修工人偷的吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: That a synthescepter? You seem a bit puny for a runner... but that's neither here nor there. What'll you be betting on?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 你那是龙鸣仿声器吧，探勘人...瘦弱成这样，来我们斗技场是想赌什么？

nodes.snippet_EN: What a lovely complexion... Have you ever thought about acting?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 嘿，美丽的女孩，头发那么漂亮...

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie! We like never ever come to places like this. Plus, I've been feeling pretty lucky lately.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐我说···难得都来到这里了，我觉得最近的运气不错

nodes.snippet_EN: Lumen intel? If I knew I wouldn't be working here.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 龙脉的消息，知道的话我还需要在这干活吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: Jun, let's go. These people have rough lives...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 李莫，走了啦，这里的人日子那么苦...

nodes.snippet_EN: *Cough*... *cough*... Apologies. You're the crew I've been hearing about, the one with the witch aboard, am I right?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 咳咳...抱歉，你们是传闻中，有女巫的探勘船队吧...

nodes.snippet_EN: Esteemed guests of the Peaks, the final act of the opera "Melody of Starsong" will begin in 3 standard hours.
nodes.snippet_CHS: （广播）亲爱的群山贵宾，戏剧「龙脉长歌」最终部，公演即将于三标准时后开始，请轨道上的船只遵守交通信标，并依指示停泊

nodes.snippet_EN: "The 16th Witch Detection Squad mistakenly shot down a civilian vessel, which lead to large scale conflict with Zhao Ghe."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「第十六女巫探测队误伤民间船，导致与朝歌的大型冲突」

nodes.snippet_EN: It's an honor to be graced with the presence of such great members of the association.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 协会的大红人光临，我倍感荣幸，很想访问你们有没有新的故事，却抽不开身...

nodes.snippet_EN: Jun, you don't need to come with me. It's safer on the ship.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 李莫...你不用跟着我来的，回船上比较安全

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, we may have a media pass, but we still have to be careful in these military zones.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐...就算你有媒体证，进入军事地点还是要万事小心

nodes.snippet_EN: ...Sorry, Jun, my attitude could have been better last time.
nodes.snippet_CHS: ...抱歉，李莫，我上次说话比较不客气

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber? Will you be docking here? That's wonderful!
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼？你们是借港停泊吗，真太开心了，我们的新仿声器刚好差个探勘人来调校

nodes.snippet_EN: (Those two are gone again? Didn't they say we'd leave right after checking out the cave?)
nodes.snippet_CHS: （这两人怎么又不见了，不是说参观一下矿场就走吗？）

nodes.snippet_EN: Thank you very much for taking the time to do this interview, President.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 谢谢会长配合访谈的录制，有你对群山人说明，想必在群山推广龙脉指定法，一定轻松许多。

nodes.snippet_EN: Why isn't there anyone looking after Pipeline 3? Who's the witch in charge of this factory? Tell her to come over!
nodes.snippet_CHS: 三号汜水源头，没人管了吗？ 管工厂的女巫呢，叫她们出来！

nodes.snippet_EN: You have violated the lumen plant export restrictions, lady.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 你们已违反龙脉花卉的出口限制，再说一次，你现在的行为与言语，已经妨碍公务的执行

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, we got an encrypted message from Benzel's intel network.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，透过斑鸠的情报网络，红楼收到了一段加密信息委托

nodes.snippet_EN: (This place is pretty ruined... Exploring it is going to take some effort...)
nodes.snippet_CHS: （废弃的很严重...这探索会有点麻烦...）

nodes.snippet_EN: This is United Mining, to all vessels who have received this broadcast, please leave the airspace immediately!
nodes.snippet_CHS: 这里是矿联公务船，请听到广播的所有船只，立刻离开现在的空域！

nodes.snippet_EN: There's a strange container in the depths of the ruins. It's in surprisingly good condition. What do you want to do, Eda?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 废墟的深处有一个奇怪的货柜，保存的意外良好，这边有什么建议吗，艾妲？

nodes.snippet_EN: So, young man, you've come to Ignis No. 2 to test your luck, eh?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 年轻人，你来烛龙二号找运气吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: You look like a tough guy... You think you can take on our cave?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 不怕死的，想要挑战我们烛龙矿场...

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda, do you want to keep exploring? This place has already been discovered.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲，要继续探索吗，确定是已发现的龙脉

nodes.snippet_EN: I need to do more to help out. This old United Mining sentry station should have some spare parts lying around.
nodes.snippet_CHS: ...我必须帮上艾妲她们，矿业联合的废弃哨站应该能找到飞船的零件

nodes.snippet_EN: Young man, are you here to mourn the heroes of the belt as well?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 年轻人，你也是来悼念我们小行星带的勇士们吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber has detected booby traps left over from the Lumen War in the surrounding airspace.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼侦测到周遭空域停留着龙脉冲突战场的诡雷

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda, there's a bunch of strange, frozen plants inside and a giant door that's locked pretty tight. What should I do?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲有些古怪···冰冻的植物群内，有一个被深锁的大门，请指示

nodes.snippet_EN: E...d-d-d-da... The s-situation isn't l-l-looking too good... The closer I get to the beacon... the w-worse the interference...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾...妲妲妲，状状状..况不太...稳，我越越越靠近信标...通讯干扰就...越严重...继续续续任务吗...

nodes.snippet_EN: ...Eda... C-C-Can you h-hear me? W-W-Weird... What's with the interference?
nodes.snippet_CHS: ...艾妲...听到到到吗，奇怪...怎么...突然有有有有电磁干扰？

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda, can you hear me? The computers at the trade station keep displaying garbled code.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲，你听得到吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: Jun here. The exploration is just about done. I'm preparing to head back to Red Chamber.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 这里是李莫，探索的任务差不多了，这里准备回到红楼。

nodes.snippet_EN: By the blessings of Helius, just the man I need.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 乙皇赐福，给我遇见大人物了，你是红楼船队的李莫...

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, be careful. You don't have much time left in there... Hurry up and come back to the ship.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，小心点，探索时间没剩多久...早点回到红楼吧

nodes.snippet_EN: Finally... I found it. My clan's residence from when they were still in the Peaks.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 找到了...是家族当年在群山的领主室

nodes.snippet_EN: Those marks on the tunnel walls... It looks like there was a gunfight.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 前方的坑道里，都是些打斗痕迹和弹痕...可恶，没法判断何时留下的，该继续前进吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: Hold it, scavenger. You've entered asteroid belt territory, and this is the sacred graveyard of our fallen brothers.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 别动，这位拾荒人 你已经进入小行星阵线的地盘了 这边是兄弟们神圣的墓碑 立刻放下你手边的拾荒器材，离开这里

nodes.snippet_EN: I'm getting an abnormal communication request. It's coming from a ship inside the ruins...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 收到了异常的通讯要求，来源在是废墟之中的船...船籍...

nodes.snippet_EN: The tunnel is blocked... I'd better take another path.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 这坑道堵住了... 换条路走好了

nodes.snippet_EN: Hey Oceaner, this is an old United Mining and Rumani Clan battleground.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 瀛海人听好，这边是吉普赛家族跟矿业联合的旧战场，目标是要探索龙脉矿场有没有飞船可用的零件。

nodes.snippet_EN: The electrical lab for the processing plant. Great, there must plenty of spare parts lying around here...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 是加工厂的电子实验室，太好了，这应该会有很多红楼的零件...

nodes.snippet_EN: The path ahead is blocked off by the main gate.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 前方的路被大门挡住了

nodes.snippet_EN: A Koomsung stronghold... They were once such a powerful faction, but the war has left nothing but pulverized ruins.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 有名金城舰队基地，在冲突后也只剩下被炸毁的废墟了吗...

nodes.snippet_EN: Tsk... Someone found us...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 啐，居然会被人看见...

nodes.snippet_EN: Who the hell's there? Not the Lumen Association again? What're we gonna do with these flowers...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 该死谁来了，又是龙脉协会吗？这些花怎么办...

nodes.snippet_EN: Looks like a fight broke out here... there are even traces of explosives.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 这是...爆破和打斗的痕迹... 有人想直接炸开龙门...盗采者还在里面吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: Why hello there, stranger. By the looks of your outfit, you must be a part of the Red Chamber crew.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 陌生的探勘人，您好

nodes.snippet_EN: #AVATAR:TowerStaff_N##NONAME##AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_CHS: （未完）外地女巫组成的探勘队伍，她们在龙穴中因为坍方受困，需要李莫支援

nodes.snippet_EN: The ground... it's shaking... Koris! What are you doing?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 整个地板...都在震动，图鲁斯你做了什么？

nodes.snippet_EN: Is there something... flowing through these walls of lumenite? Are the lights playing tricks on me? No, it's alive...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 汜晶岩壁里，有东西在...流动？ 光线的错觉吗？不对，那是...活的？

nodes.snippet_EN: That's weird. The eco-scanner is working on the other plants, so it isn't broken. Is this... a new species in the pond?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 奇怪，辨识其他植物都正常，生态扫描器没坏啊...难不成水池里的是新品种吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: (What luck... running into United Mining now... I'm just going to try and slip away without letting them see me.)
nodes.snippet_CHS: （怎么这么不巧，在这里遇到矿联的人... 小心的撤吧，别给他们发现）

nodes.snippet_EN: To commemorate the 6th anniversary of the end of the Lumen War, the troupe performing "Melody of Starsong" will be holding a disaster relief charity benefit.
nodes.snippet_CHS: （广播）纪念龙脉冲突终战六周年，龙脉长歌赈灾义演

nodes.snippet_EN: Myria neverlasting, may Helius' blessings be upon you...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 万道无常，乙皇赐福...你们是龙脉探勘人吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: Patient 425 has gone missing again. It's James... That bastard and his adventures. Next time, tie him to the damn bed!
nodes.snippet_CHS: 425病床的病人又不见了，又是詹姆斯，这该死的探险家，下次来个人把他绑住！

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, there's a huge ship in front of us...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，前方有一艘巨大的船体...

nodes.snippet_EN: Warning: Incoming solar flare from star Ignis arriving in 5 minutes.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告，来自烛龙的恒星闪焰， 即将于5标准分后抵达

nodes.snippet_EN: Well, well. The witch of the Red Chamber. What brings you here? Isn't your mission more important?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 好呀，红楼船队的女巫，你怎么会来到这里，去执行你任务重要点吧？

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda, there's an old, broken ship in the distance... "May the power of law bring justice to industry..."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲，矿场深处的有一艘破旧的船舰... 「愿律法支撑商业的天平...」 看这徽章，应该是伦敦商业联盟的运输船

nodes.snippet_EN: Containers were scattered all over the floor of the spaceship. Perhaps they were rushing to escape and didn't have the time to take the goods. It took a long time, but we were eventually able to bring them back to Red Chamber.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 印象中，飞船的深处是散落一地的货柜， 可能是过去逃难时来不及带走的货物。 虽然多花了点时间，但总是将它们带回来了。
nodes.option_EN: Let Jun try. You can't survive these journeys without scavenging.
nodes.option_CHS: 让李莫试试，在万壑旅行，拾荒是必要的。

nodes.snippet_EN: Back in those days, if it wasn't a cave, most of the time Eda didn't want to waste time on it.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得当时只要不是龙穴，艾妲多半认为，不需要多花时间在这些地方。
nodes.option_EN: It might be something, but we still shouldn't waste any time on it.
nodes.option_CHS: 虽然可惜，但还是别乱来好了。

nodes.snippet_EN: All you runners do is look for lumen. There's no intel here for you.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 只知道寻找龙脉的探勘人，这里没有你要的情报

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, we're coming up on an unidentified object. Analysis has revealed that it's about 2 standard meters long...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，轨道上的不明物体与我们即将交会，分析是长约2标准尺的物件...

nodes.snippet_EN: The boarding vessel received the mother ship's docking signal at the same time we sent them a signal prohibiting them from docking.  While they were trying to figure out what was going on, Red Chamber sped away.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 收到母船的登陆讯号， 同时又收到伪造的禁止登入讯号， 趁着对方正感到困惑时， 红楼迅速远离。
nodes.option_EN: Trick the boarding vessel into turning back by sending it a modified signal.
nodes.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号给登陆艇，欺骗他们折返

nodes.snippet_EN: "That's a gas planet, not Earth. It looks like the terrestial planets of this solar system disappeared long ago!"  The robot was clearly upset, but perked up to thank us, handing us a little model as he said, "Here! This is for you!"
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「...这是气体行星，不是地球，这个太阳系的类地行星，好像很久之前就消灭了。」  机器人哀伤的说着「但为了感谢你，这个送你！」  他打起精神拿了一个模型给我，那是...
nodes.option_EN: Um... West Mount Tonitrus?

nodes.snippet_EN: The signal got sent and the ship disappeared from our radar. We never saw them again.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 讯号一拍过去， 对方的船体就消失于雷达之中， 再也没有回来。
nodes.option_EN: Pose as a civilian ship and tell them they've mistaken us for someone else.
nodes.option_CHS: 变造自己讯号为民间船，并告知对方认错人了

nodes.snippet_EN: As a witch, Eda made it a point to get involved with incidents like this. She had Remi send the ship ID to the Myrian Ignis Guild and promised the slums supplies if they would take them back.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲因为女巫的身份，觉得自己一定得管这件事，她要求菈米亚将船的编码转成万道烛龙商会， 以承诺未来会有补给为条件，让贫民窟的人重新接受了难民。  对方没什么能答谢我们，但坚决感谢船队的她给了...
nodes.option_EN: Get in contact with the slums' consul to try and help.
nodes.option_CHS: ...协助跟贫民窟的领事沟通

nodes.snippet_EN: The security on the service vessel broadcasting the signal wasn't very complicated. It wasn't long before Remi hacked into Rabbit Hole Newswire and got the information on their mysterious singer.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 发送讯号的业务船安检并不复杂，菈米亚很快的黑入了「兔窟二」，没两下就找到了兔窟最宝贵的神秘歌手数据。  数据一出来后，艾妲却愣住了，那原来是...
nodes.option_EN: Well, they shouldn't be forcing all these ads on us. Let them have it, Remi.
nodes.option_CHS: ...谁叫他们到处盖台，就照你說的做

nodes.snippet_EN: Our modified signal worked, and they were convinced we were scammers just like them. Given that we were one and the same, they happily chatted with us about how many runners they'd tricked on this trip alone.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们成功模拟了伪造讯号。 对方不疑有他，当我们是自己人， 得意地聊着他们这趟又骗了多少探勘人。  「这些没荣誉的骗子！」  我记得我骂出的话。菈米亚却好像习以为常。
nodes.option_EN: Pretend like we're one of them to figure out if they're trying to trick us.
nodes.option_CHS: 先伪装成同业，确认他们是不是骗子

nodes.snippet_EN: They were hidden amid some space debris, but Eda was able to locate them almost immediately. That allowed us to quickly put some distance between us and them.  I didn't bring it up... but that's when I understood what people meant by "human radar".
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管隐身在宇宙垃圾群中， 红楼却瞬间捕捉了对方的位置， 这信息让我们快速的远离他们追踪的航道  尽管那时没说，但我却理解了活体雷达的意思
nodes.option_EN: Let's use the reso-scanner to locate the vessel and avoid an attack.
nodes.option_CHS: 以防万一被攻击，先用龙脉共振仪找出对方船的位置

nodes.snippet_EN: When they realized we were with the military, they couldn't seem to wrap their heads around it, but they let us go.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方发现我们原来也是矿业联合军，尽管不解却放我们走了。
nodes.option_EN: Remi's right. Let's pose as a military vessel.
nodes.option_CHS: 相信菈米亚...发送伪造的军船讯号

nodes.snippet_EN: To make sure we didn't set off any anti-theft mechanisms, Remi tested it with multiple modified signals. After we didn't get a response, we pulled the container in.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 以防触发任何防盗机构，菈米亚修改了通讯编码后试探多次，没回应后才打捞起来。  那是龙脉盗采遗失的走私货，但不知道哪位糊涂的家伙，遗忘了维生装置在里面，才会发出警讯...
nodes.option_EN: Send out a signal and see if the automated response is working.
nodes.option_CHS: 先发送讯号过去，看自动询答器还能不能运作

nodes.snippet_EN: The parade began, and the Lumen Association took the stage, praising the role the Lumen Mining Act played in establishing peace for the Peaks. Seeing the happy looks on the people's faces was a stark contrast to the United Mining that I knew.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 游行盛大的开始，龙脉协会也上台致词，感谢龙脉指定法带来的和平荣景，看到民众欢喜的表情，跟我认识的矿业联合实在很冲突。
nodes.option_EN: We've got the shipment of food you're looking for.
nodes.option_CHS: 你们的粮食货柜我们带来了

nodes.snippet_EN: We still had quite the journey ahead of us, so we calculated a new route that avoided the chaotic orbit. Later on, we heard that more than a few collisions occurred. I hope there weren't any casualties.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 毕竟还有路要赶，红楼算出新航道， 无视了混乱成一团的轨道， 事后听说有发生几起碰撞意外， 只希望无人伤亡。
nodes.option_EN: Oh, cut it out. Just get out of orbit.
nodes.option_CHS: 别说闲话，避开轨道就好

nodes.snippet_EN: After realizing it was their mistake, they muttered a few sarcastic remarks and let us go.  "Hmm? I'm surprised the higher-ups haven't gotten rid of all those old lumen seeking vessels yet."  "Don't start the engines, you might blow yourselves up."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 判断是自己人，对方髓口几句挖苦， 就放我们通行了。  「想不到，上面还没把这种龙脉探测船淘汰」 「小心别点火，不然引擎自己爆炸啊」
nodes.option_EN: Trust in Remi. Pose as a military vessel and try to bluff your way though.
nodes.option_CHS: 相信菈米亚，装成军用船混过去

nodes.snippet_EN: Suspicious that we weren't who we said we were, they requested Red Chamber to send out another signal. Although they eventually let us go, avoiding the prying eyes of United Mining was more difficult than I'd imagined.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 似乎是怀疑我们的身份，对方重复要求红楼送出讯号，尽管最后放行了我们，但要躲着矿业联合的眼睛探勘，果然不是太容易的事。
nodes.option_EN: Send them a modified signal and pretend to be a United Mining vessel.
nodes.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为是矿业联合船舰

nodes.snippet_EN: Remi sent out a modified signal, and it worked, but they weren't totally convinced. So, they pretended like they would help us check our equipment and forced us into an inspection.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 菈米亚发出了伪造的编码， 尽管成功，但对方怀疑心不减， 要求以协助检查设备，强制拜访，  我还记得艾妲一边跟对方介绍红楼， 一边隐忍着愤怒的样子。
nodes.option_EN: Try to convince them we're civilian spies working for the military.
nodes.option_CHS: 试着欺骗我们是军方的民间卧底

nodes.snippet_EN: We succeeded in buying Arrigo some time, but the second crew continued the chase. Not long after, I read in the Daily Lumen about a witch being charged with serious offenses. After hearing about it, Eda was so upset that she didn't speak for days.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们的确拖了点时间，但对方第二队却持续追捕。 不久后，我于龙脉日报看到判处重刑的女巫新闻，有好阵子艾妲连话都不想说。
nodes.option_EN: Let them come aboard to buy her some time.
nodes.option_CHS: 让他们上船盘查，拖对方时间

nodes.snippet_EN: The Red Chamber was able to send over the message immediately. To thank us for helping out, the correspondent gave us one of her valuable leads, which turned out to be some lumen intel.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼成功在第一时间把讯号传给了协会，龙脉日报的特派员为了感谢我们，将一个手上重要的线报给了我们，那是龙脉的情报。
nodes.option_EN: You can use our ship as a relay station. No problem.
nodes.option_CHS: 我们的船可以借你们当中继站

nodes.snippet_EN: Using a forged military visa, Remi was able to get into the backend of their system, and their wireless signal was soon paralyzed. She even managed to pull out a top-secret file from one of their folders.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 靠着伪装的军用签证， 菈米亚竟然成功摸进了对方后台， 没多久就瘫痪了对方的无线讯号， 更从对方的系统中摸出了一份机密档案。
nodes.option_EN: Just do something, anything!
nodes.option_CHS: 做点什么就对了！

nodes.snippet_EN: We pretended to be high-ranking military officials, and the transport crew was unable to stop apologizing. Eda reprimanded them so much that they ended up paying us to not let anyone know about their mistake.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们将自己伪装成高级军官， 运输队对自己的误认连番致歉， 在艾妲斥责下，甚至付出了封口费， 只希望我们别说出他们的丑事。
nodes.option_EN: Pose as a high ranking military officer and reprimand them.
nodes.option_CHS: 伪装自己是高级军官，骂回去

nodes.snippet_EN: The modified signal didn't work too well. We were able to bide enough time to move away from the boarding vessel. However, the mother ship attacked, and Red Chamber was hit pretty hard.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 伪造讯号不算太成功， 只有争取到极短的时间远离登陆艇轨道， 对方母船的炮火掠过了红楼装甲， 造成了不少伤害。

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as they received the signal, they responded immediately.  "Hey dummy dumbs, we coming for your ship!"
nodes.snippet_CHS: 讯号才刚出去，红楼就收到了讯号  「傻子等着船给我们回收吧」  海盗的火网整片撒了过来，菈米亚费尽心力，才成功脱出交战的空域。

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda tried to pose as the Myrian Ignis Guild and get them help, but it didn't work.  To this day, I still pray that they made it out.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲希望透过伪造成烛龙商会，去帮忙说情， 但计划没有成功。  希望他们能度过难关，至今我依然祈求。

nodes.snippet_EN: It came as no surprise that the firewall on the illegal base station's service vessel wasn't easy to get past.  As soon as one of Remi's operations failed, they counter-attacked, hacking into Red Chamber and causing multiple systems to go haywire.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方是非法基地台「兔窟二」的业务船，上面的防火墙当然不好惹。  一个操作失误，对方的系统便反向入侵了红楼。造成了多处系统失灵。

nodes.snippet_EN: The modified signal failed and I remember us flying off in a panic. Even though we got away, the ship fired off several rounds and managed to puncture Red Chamber's armor with a few holes.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 伪造的讯号失败了， 记得在一阵惊慌中，我们急忙驾船远离， 对方的炮火却炸坏了红楼装甲数个洞。

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda tried to pin down their location, but it must have taken too long. They got suspicious and immediately opened fire.  Red Chamber barely got away.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲试图捕捉对方的位置，但可能是花了太多时间，对方怀疑我们的身份，随即对我们展开攻击。红楼好不容易才脱险。

nodes.snippet_EN: Each time Remi's modified signals failed to work, it got harder for us to trust her in situations like this.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时的我们，面对每一次伪造讯号的失败，变得越来越难信任菈米亚。

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as the signal went out, the container's auto-safety mechanisms were triggered and it exploded into a million pieces. Some of the flying fragments hit Red Chamber pretty hard.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 讯号一出去，货柜的自动安检系统运作了起来，爆裂后的碎片击中红楼的甲板。

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber calculated a complex route for all the freighters in orbit and broadcast it out. The ships made it to Luma Caverna without causing any crashes or clogging up the orbit.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼透过计算机计算，发布复杂的航道导引，终于在空域统一了运输船的航行路线，直到龙洞探险公司的回收船抵达，航行的船只都没有遇到互抢轨道的危机。
nodes.option_EN: Help the ships pass by safely.
nodes.option_CHS: 协助引导船只安全通过吧

nodes.snippet_EN: We were unable to trick them, and they were more than happy to unload their guns on a civilian vessel that wouldn't obey orders.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼没能瞒过对方。对于劝阻不听的民船，警备船也毫不犹豫地展开攻击。
（不会发生）

nodes.snippet_EN: The modified signal was cracked, and we were attacked for obstructing justice.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 伪造的编码遭到识破， 红楼因为妨碍公务而被攻击。

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber used a modified signal to pose as a high-ranking witch in the military. We told them that the witch was on a top-secret mission, so they had no choice but to give up the chase.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼透过讯号伪造，宣称自己是直属于军方高层的女巫长，该女巫是执行不可说的机密任务，对方见状只能放弃追捕。
nodes.option_EN: Pose as a ranking officer and tell them the hunt has been called off.
nodes.option_CHS: 伪装自己是军方高层...叫他们放弃追捕

nodes.snippet_EN: The news ship's comms system was pretty badly damaged. Remi was able to fix it up, but could only restore some of its functions. Still, it was enough for them to send the message.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 新闻船的通讯设备损坏严重，菈米亚维修后也只恢复有限的通讯能力。 但足以让特派员传讯给协会了。
nodes.option_EN: Let us dock and our technician will help you repair your comms system.
nodes.option_CHS: 要求停泊，我们的船师可以过去维修

nodes.snippet_EN: The signal was picked up by the broadcasting vessel and the attempted jam was stopped in its tracks. They saw through Red Chamber's disguise and the United Mining patrol ship responsible for protection closed in on Red Chamber, threatening us with prosecution for serious crimes.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 讯号传入广播船，对方暂停了盖台， 但片刻后便识破红楼的伪装。 护卫的矿联巡逻船逼近， 威吓以重罪起诉。 红楼拼了命才逃离。

nodes.snippet_EN: The interference failed, and the guard ship attacked us after figuring we were pirates. Lucky for us, their primary job was ensuring the safety of the freighters. After we put some distance between them, they eventually stopped.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 干扰失败，警备船认定我们是海盗展开攻击。 幸好他们还是以保护运输队为优先任务， 驱离一段距离后，便停止追击。

nodes.snippet_EN: While they weren't able to board the ship, during the chase, the mother ship fired off a few rounds that pierced several holes in Red Chamber's armor.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管对方没有登陆红楼，但在追逐时， 对方母船发出的一轮炮火， 将我们装甲打穿了数个凹洞。
nodes.option_EN: Run like we always do!
nodes.option_CHS: 跟之前一样加速逃离！

nodes.snippet_EN: "There's no such planet here! You liar!"  The robot named Emeth disappeared into the depths of the space station and we never saw him again.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「...这里没有这个星球的名字，你骗人！」  机器人艾姆说着，转头回到空间站深处，我再也没有看到他了。
nodes.option_EN: Um... Mount Immanis Malefica?
nodes.option_CHS: 是...大巫山？

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as we finished speaking a hail of gunfire rained down on us, and it took all of Remi's skills to get us out of there.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们通话才说完，对方火网突然整片撒了过来，菈米亚费尽心力，才成功脱出交战的空域。
nodes.option_EN: That sounds risky. Tell them we can do a video interview.
nodes.option_CHS: 登船太危险，告知对方能视讯采访

nodes.snippet_EN: To this day, I still pray that they made it out.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 希望他们能度过难关，至今我依然祈求。
nodes.option_EN: It's truly terrible, but we simply can't help them.
nodes.option_CHS: 虽然很遗憾，但我们帮不上忙

nodes.snippet_EN: We were getting bombarded with ads, but Eda forbid Remi from hacking into their computer.  Remi listened, but she sat there complaining for quite some time before settling down.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们屏蔽了对方的广告讯号，艾妲严格禁止菈米亚黑进对方计算机的提案。 菈米亚照做了，但还是在旁边抱怨了好一会才停。
nodes.option_EN: Remi, enough with the pranks.
nodes.option_CHS: 够了，别老是恶作剧

nodes.snippet_EN: "May your fortunes shine upon us, and cast away the darkness."  After they boarded the ship and described the countless goods on hand, we picked out a valuable Myrian antique.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「愿您出手如光，远离黑暗」 他们上船后跟我们介绍了无数文物， 我们挑了一份万道珍奇的古董。  直到对方离开后， 却发现古董有些微妙的破损...
nodes.option_EN: It won't hurt to make a trade.
nodes.option_CHS: 做个交易无仿

nodes.snippet_EN: "Shouldn't be flying one of their vessels."  We tried to be friendly, but they opened fire right after sending us this message.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「怪你们开的是矿联的船吧。」  我们试着表达友善的信息， 对方却撂下这句话展开攻击。
nodes.option_EN: Tell them Red Chamber is a retired vessel with no relation to United Mining.
nodes.option_CHS: 跟他表明我们只是退役的军用船，跟矿业联合无关

nodes.snippet_EN: As Remi complained, we dismantled a few armor plates and handed them to the other vessel. I often wondered if Eda trusted Remi more, would we have argued any less?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 在菈米亚的抱怨中， 我们拆卸了船上的部分装甲组件交给对方， 我常在想，如果艾妲当时信任菈米亚多点， 我跟菈米亚会不会少点冲突。
nodes.option_EN: I think Jun has the right idea. It'll be safer to just give them some armor.
nodes.option_CHS: 听李莫的，缴纳装甲比较安全

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda was always focused on her goal, and never wasted time on things that didn't help her reach it. At least that's what I thought at the time.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲始终明确知道重点是什么， 坚定着自己的方向， 至少那时我以为如此。
nodes.option_EN: It just looks like a drifting freight container. No need to waste time on it.
nodes.option_CHS: 看影像只是漂流的货柜，不用特别花时间

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda acted like she didn't know what the woman was talking about. Boy, she did not like United Mining.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲当作没有这回事离开，她不喜欢矿业联合。
nodes.option_EN: Sorry, I have no idea what you're talking about.
nodes.option_CHS: 抱歉，我不清楚你们在说什么

nodes.snippet_EN: We tried our best, but it was difficult to communicate with all the ships in the airspace in such a short period of time, especially since some ships didn't even turn on their communication channels. In the end, we just silently drifted away from the chaos.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管我们很努力，但要快速沟通全空域中的交通船只并不容易，有些频道甚至没有开启，最后在一片混乱中，我们只得默默离开。

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda didn't think Remi would be able to convince them, so we charged through, leaving Remi a bit hurt. Even though we managed to escape, both the ship and their relationship were slightly damaged.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 菈米亚那时没被艾妲信任， 渐渐有了芥蒂，虽然最后逃走， 但不论装甲还是心里，都多有损伤。
nodes.option_EN: Just charge through... If the modified signal doesn't work, it'll be a disaster.
nodes.option_CHS: 冲过去吧...伪造失败可不得了

nodes.snippet_EN: When the guard ship saw that we were not only disobeying, but also attempting to speed off, they fired their rail cannon. It scorched Red Chamber's armor, and all I remember is a flash of white light.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警备船看我们不听劝，反而加速前进，磁轨炮烧过红楼的装甲，我只记得一片白色的光芒...
nodes.option_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
nodes.option_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！

nodes.snippet_EN: The modified signal failed. Their electronic warfare defenses discovered where the interference was coming from, and they caught up to Red Chamber.  Even though we managed to escape, we paid a heavy price.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼的讯号伪造不成，对方船队的反电子战专家发现了干扰来源，随即转而追捕红楼。 尽管成功逃脱，最后却付出惨痛代价...

nodes.snippet_EN: Our journey was put on hold as the inspection crew turned Red Chamber upside down. The captain then wrote us an invoice for "Unspecified Patrol Squad Services".  I still remember how hard it was for Eda to hide her fury.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼的航程被耽搁，船舱搜查队被翻得乱七八糟。 对方开了一张收据， 要求为「巡逻队额外出勤服务」付钱。  我还记得艾妲隐忍着愤怒的样子
nodes.option_EN: Let them stop and inspect the ship.
nodes.option_CHS: 让对方停船抽检

nodes.snippet_EN: I didn't think Eda would be able to handle it that well. Later, I found out that Unity News was state media backed by United Mining. If you got into trouble with them, it basically meant your days of flying around the Peaks were over.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我没想到艾妲忍得住这口气，直到后来知道， 原来特许成立的79统合新闻台后台强硬， 和他们起冲突后，未来就不用在群山航行了。
nodes.option_EN: Then leave the airspace immediately.
nodes.option_CHS: 那就立刻离开空域

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber wasn't able to send the message directly to the association. We ended up going through some illegal channels to send it as an encrypted message.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼没能直接联络上协会，最后只能透过一些非法通讯商，将加密的讯号辗转传到协会手中。

nodes.snippet_EN: "Hmm... That'll do..."  They left right after they got the money.  Eda did not appreciate United Mining's crude way of doing things, but she didn't want to stir things up. I thought it was a bit dishonorable, but she had no choice.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「民间船...这样还算得体...」 对方收到款项后离开。  虽然对矿联军的蛮横作风十分不满， 不想惹事的艾妲，做出了我觉得不荣誉， 但不得不的决定。
nodes.option_EN: *Sigh*... Just bribe them.
nodes.option_CHS: ...算了，试着贿络他们...

nodes.snippet_EN: Everything was going smoothly until I hit 100 standard meters, when my vision suddenly went blurry.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 印象里非常顺利，但当我深入地下100标准尺时，却视线突然一阵模糊。

nodes.snippet_EN: Once I got to 150 standard meters, I heard a booming starsong. I was sure that I was going to make it, but my consciousness started fading out.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得深入地下150标准尺时，我听见巨大的龙鸣声，我以为我可以，意识却开始模糊。
nodes.option_EN: (I swear upon my honor that I'll beat that record!)
nodes.option_CHS: （赌上探勘人尊严，超越纪录给你看！）

nodes.snippet_EN: The woman kept asking us if we wanted to buy a poster of the "Nasty Dirtbag". We got fed up with her and just left.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 挑衅的家伙一直问我们要不要购买「混乱土鬼」的海报。 我们不耐的离开斗技场。
nodes.option_EN: Sorry. The greatest champions compete with themselves.
nodes.option_CHS: 失礼了，但只有自己能与自己竞争

nodes.snippet_EN: The communication module on our vessel instantly sent the signal throughout the belt. To this day, I'll never forget how they started the show:
nodes.snippet_CHS: 透过龙脉探测船的通讯阀， 讯号转眼送往全小行星带， 至今我都还记得节目的内容开头：
nodes.option_EN: Sure, let's help them out.
nodes.option_CHS: 就帮帮他们吧

nodes.snippet_EN: Thinking back on it, Eda really was an exceptional captain. No matter what decision had to be made, she always stayed calm. To this day, I'm still learning from her.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 回想起艾妲作为船长， 总是能冷静地做出不少决定， 是我该学习的地方。
nodes.option_EN: There's a bounty out on us. We can't risk broadcasting a signal for someone.
nodes.option_CHS: 我们四处被悬赏，不可能帮人家广播

nodes.snippet_EN: I don't like to think about my experience acting. Still, I was happy to help Eda.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我不太想回忆， 但当初能帮上艾妲的忙，还是蛮好的。
nodes.option_EN: Have Jun do it. It's not like they'll show the face of an extra.
nodes.option_CHS: 这请李莫帮忙演出吧，临演也不会拍到脸

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as Eda saw the script, she walked away without saying a word, leaving the set in awkward silence.  Apparently, it was about an evil witch, and how the people managed to drive her from the Peaks.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得节目的台词才一读，艾妲就不发一语的离去，弄得全场一片尴尬。  那原来是描述邪恶的女巫， 如何被群山人民赶出的故事。
nodes.option_EN: If it's about witches... I guess I could help.
nodes.option_CHS: 既然是女巫有关的剧场，就帮个忙吧

nodes.snippet_EN: "Just don't go dying on me, kids," the man grunted.   When we first set out, given how young the crew was, most people didn't think much of us.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「别死了，小鬼们。」  对方轻哼了一声，我们早期冒险时，由于队伍太年轻，很多人没把我们当回事。
nodes.option_EN: The Red Chamber crew will take care of it.
nodes.option_CHS: 交给我们红楼商船队吧

nodes.snippet_EN: "Yeah, yeah. Whatever," the man grunted.   When we first set out, given how young the crew was, most people didn't think much of us.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「随便你」  对方轻哼了一声，我们早期冒险时，由于队伍太年轻，很多人没把我们当回事。
nodes.option_EN: We shouldn't be wasting any time with stuff like this.
nodes.option_CHS: 别浪费时间在其他地方了

nodes.snippet_EN: Even though we didn't lose a lot, I still felt guilty. Gambling was not for me.  Eda said, "Well, at least you had some fun." I didn't know what to make of that.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 虽然金额不多，但输了还是让我有点愧疚， 果然不能碰赌博这种事。  艾妲跟我说，至少你买到当下的快乐，我不懂。
nodes.option_EN: We'll make a tiny bet. And I'll pay for it, don't worry about it...
nodes.option_CHS: 小赌就好...而且这种事我自己出

nodes.snippet_EN: Remi walked out after I refused, clearly upset, like I had ruined her fun. I tried to tell her that gambling is dishonorable, and that it's not worth it.  After that, she didn't talk with me for quite some time.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我拒绝后，菈米亚悻悻然离去， 像是打坏了她的乐趣，我趁机试着跟她说：  「赌博是没荣誉的事，不需在意。」  结果她好阵子没跟我说话。
nodes.option_EN: East Oceaners don't gamble. Thanks anyway.
nodes.option_CHS: 瀛海人不做这种事，抱歉

nodes.snippet_EN: Throughout the performance, I could tell Remi was a bit annoyed. But Eda was spellbound, and would occasionally wipe tears from her eyes.  I forget if I held her hand... I hope I did.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管观赏过程菈米亚觉得小不耐， 但印象中艾妲却看得出神，不时拭泪。  我不记得我有没有握住她的手，我希望那时我有。
nodes.option_EN: Let's all go see it together!
nodes.option_CHS: 大家一起看吧！

nodes.snippet_EN: Melody of Starsong was such a moving story. I really regret not being able to see the end with Eda.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 龙脉长歌是一出感人的神话，最终部没能跟艾妲一起观赏，至今我依然很遗憾。
nodes.option_EN: Maybe I should be spending this time looking for my master...
nodes.option_CHS: 把时间拿去寻找师父吧...

nodes.snippet_EN: That night, Eda's voice was broadcast across the Peaks. Even after many years, there were throngs of listeners who still remembered the performance.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得那天那夜，艾妲的嗓声透过基地台广播到群山行星带内，多年后还有许多人怀念。 当时有人希望她为电台工作，她只回说  「我是为了自己的灵魂而唱，不是远方的太阳。」
nodes.option_EN: Eddie, give it a try! I wanna hear you sing!
nodes.option_CHS: 姐姐试试看吧，我很想听你的歌声

nodes.snippet_EN: When we left, I could see on Eda's face how upset she was. Her inability to sing whenever she wanted to had always made her feel inferior.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 离开的时候，我记得艾妲的神色多有忧伤，喉咙无法随意的唱，她始终有点自卑。
nodes.option_EN: (Eddie needs more rest.)
nodes.option_CHS: （再让姐姐休息一阵子好了）

nodes.snippet_EN: I don't have any lumen intel, but I can share with you the story of our great sun, Ignis...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我没有龙脉的消息，但我能跟你分享我们的太阳，烛龙的故事...
nodes.option_EN: Please, tell me!
nodes.option_CHS: 是的，请告诉我！

nodes.snippet_EN: The preacher took a few looks at me, as if he had noticed something. Then, all of a sudden, he said:  "...East Oceaner, betrayers of the Peaks. I hope Excidium is with you always."  I'll never forget the chilling words he left me with.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 传道师看了我几眼，仿佛认出了什么，突然说  「...背弃群山的瀛海人，愿黑洞大荒与你同在」  我还记得传道师离去时所说的话语。
nodes.option_EN: (Looks like a preacher... Better not respond.)
nodes.option_CHS: （感觉是传道师...不要回应好了）

nodes.snippet_EN: "Hey kid, quit causing trouble."  Right before Remi made her move, the doctor grabbed her. She murmured something and sulked away.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「头痛，别找麻烦。」  菈米亚正要动手前，医生抓住了她， 她不满的啐了一声。
nodes.option_EN: (Yeah, let Remi destroy the wall.)
nodes.option_CHS: （让菈米亚敲掉整片墙板）

nodes.snippet_EN: After speaking, Eda disappeared for a period of time. When she got back to the ship, she whispered:  "She's not a killer... she's my master."  Eda may have looked calm on the outside, but I quickly found out that if something upset her, she would get really aggressive.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲说完这话后消失了一阵子，回船时只轻轻的说  「她不是刽子手，她是我师父。」  这几年来，我发现艾妲表面冷静， 但只要惹到她时，她比谁都冲动。
nodes.option_EN: (Hmm... I'll take care of this myself.)
nodes.option_CHS: （我会自己动手...）

nodes.snippet_EN: The lead witch was the training officer for the Banshee mission. It seems that United Mining spent significant energy training a crew for Banshee. Hearing this made Eda lose all her remaining faith in the Witching Tower.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 为首的女巫是黑龙探索队的训练教官， 矿业联合似乎为了黑龙积极的训练船队。 目睹这些事情，让艾妲对巫塔是彻底死心。
nodes.option_EN: Witches are still working with them? Let's try to hear what they're saying...
nodes.option_CHS: 竟然有女巫涉入！靠近一点窃听...

nodes.snippet_EN: Afterward, Eda tried to tell what me what had happened. Apparently, she was too nervous and was unable to record anything but a bunch of static.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 事后我听艾妲分享这段经验，她似乎是太紧张了，录下的音讯只有一片杂音。

nodes.snippet_EN: We left in a hurry. Eda said she was afraid of getting Red Chamber involved.  Sometimes I wished she thought more about herself.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲匆忙地离开， 她说她当时很怕牵连红楼， 但我希望她能为自己多想一点。
nodes.option_EN: This is going to be more trouble than it's worth. Let's get out of here.
nodes.option_CHS: 感觉有什么麻烦事，早点离开

nodes.snippet_EN: I had a few questions when we were organizing the information about the Lumen Mining Act, and each time Remi would shout in my face.  Most of our time was spent arguing. Eda got fed up with us and politely told them we were unable to help.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得整理到指定法时我多少提出疑问，结果一开口就被菈米亚骂回去。  最后吵架的时间似乎占据了工作时间，艾妲在受不了的情况，只好终止这次协作。
nodes.option_EN: (There's way too much data here. I'm going to need both of them to help.)
nodes.option_CHS: （数据太多了，请李莫菈米亚都来帮忙...）

nodes.snippet_EN: "Oh, looks like Remi's too busy to help. We should be able to handle it, right?"
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「我是怕菈米亚太忙，才只找你帮忙喔」  我还记得艾妲的表情，当时我在龙脉日报待了一天，结束后，龙脉日报赶上了修正法特刊发行的日期，还一并给了我...
nodes.option_EN: (Jun and I will take care of this...)
nodes.option_CHS: （...我跟李莫两人一起就好）

nodes.snippet_EN: The conference room was dark, with a bluish light. United Mining's scholars were analyzing the structure of asteroids and various methods of extraction.  "Nothing on Banshee..." Eda was a bit frustrated when we left. "But at least we now know how to suck lumen dry when we come across some."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那是个黑暗发着蓝光的大会议室，矿业联合的学者分析着小行星的构造，并将挖掘方式分门别类  「没有黑龙的任何情报...」艾妲离开后略有失落。 「倒是知道遇到龙脉，要怎么干净的把它榨干」
nodes.option_EN: Let's see what this is all about.
nodes.option_CHS: 参加研讨会吧

nodes.snippet_EN: The scholar's face stopped cold when he heard the word "Banshee".  "That mission's top secret. You're new, aren't you? Well, think before you speak."  The doors of the conference hall closed abruptly, along with any hope of learning more about Banshee.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲突然冒出的话语让对方瞬间变了脸色。  「那个任务是一级机密，新来的吗，别乱说话。」  研讨会的门马上关闭，我们的线索也中断了。
nodes.option_EN: Ask if Banshee will be discussed at the conference.
nodes.option_CHS: 询问研讨会有没有黑龙情报

nodes.snippet_EN: "Let's come back some other time."  Eda was explaining how the cave operated when the loudspeaker sounded out and she was called away. I felt a little bit lonely, but back then I didn't understand why.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「下次再一起逛吧。」  记得艾妲解释龙脉运作到一半，突然响起的广播就将她唤走，当时我有点小落寞，不懂是什么心情。
nodes.option_EN: Alright, but you'll need to help me bring Eddie over.
nodes.option_CHS: 好，你要负责帮我把姐姐带回来

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda brought me to see a Myrian shrine without letting Remi know. When we got back to the ship, Remi exploded on Eda for leaving her alone. I felt pretty guilty about that.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那天艾妲在菈米亚不知情时，主动带我去看万道的神坛，但当我俩回到船上时，被留下的菈米亚发了很大的脾气。让我也有点内疚。
nodes.option_EN: Tsk... What's that got to do with me?
nodes.option_CHS: 啐、跟我有什么关系

nodes.snippet_EN: The synthescepters made by Luma Caverna were different from those produced in East Ocean. It took a bit more time to tune them, but the results were good.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 龙洞化工出产的仿声器跟瀛海不同，调整声音时多花了点时间，但结果还算满意。
nodes.option_EN: (Let Jun give it a shot...)
nodes.option_CHS: （让李莫试试看吧...）

nodes.snippet_EN: From the very start, I had no idea what I was doing. I even managed to cause the vats filled with lumenide to explode, and seriously damaged the laboratory.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我始终掌握不到仿声器的使用要领。在测试的过程中，还导致实验室的汜水储存槽震荡爆炸。

nodes.snippet_EN: Even though it was true that our mission was to get to Banshee and that we shouldn't have been taking side missions, I was still a bit hurt that Eda didn't believe in me.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管当时首要目标是寻找黑龙，不该有外务，但没被艾妲信任，我还是有点伤心
nodes.option_EN: Sorry, we've got somewhere to go.
nodes.option_CHS: 抱歉，我们还在赶路

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda told Remi to broadcast several blast signals that would cause them to misjudge the firepower of the blast.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲请菈米亚发送了多次爆破讯号， 让对方错估了引爆的火力， 瞬间矿场陷入汜气的火海，虽然无人伤亡， 却让我看到艾妲的另一面。  她那阵子心情真的很糟。
nodes.option_EN: (You wanna blast stuff...? Sounds fun.)
nodes.option_CHS: （炸飞...好啊，我蛮想试试看...）

nodes.snippet_EN: "I don't know who you're talking about, I'm just a damn guard. If you're not here to help, get the hell out of here. And put on your uniforms next time!"  After yelling in our faces, he turned around and left.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「哪位高官我不认识， 没有要支援就快走，下次记得要穿制服。 」  对方说完，就离开了我们视线
nodes.option_EN: Was Red Grant ever sent here to perform inspections?
nodes.option_CHS: 红・葛兰特有来视察过这里吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: CRASH!!!—— Remi rushed into the path of the guard ship before they opened fire, and was able to delay the attack. Our decision was not without cost, as our ship suffered heavy damage.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 一阵激烈的撞击——菈米亚赶在警备船开火前驶过航道，成功延误了对方的追击，我们也因此付出惨痛代价，受到严重损伤。  事后艾琳达依照约定，将答应的龙脉情报赠与我们。
nodes.option_EN: Pull yourself together! Block United Mining to let them go through.
nodes.option_CHS: 振作！故意阻挡矿业联合的航道，让他们冲过

nodes.snippet_EN: United Mining rejected our request for communication. Before long, a blaze of fire flashed before the transport station. Everyone knew a ship had been shot down, and we sat in silence. Maybe there was something I could have done, but it was already too late.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 矿业联合拒绝回答我们的三方通信， 没多久，传送港前一阵火光， 所有人都知道有船被击落， 船队的众人为此沉默了一阵， 或许我能做一点什么，但都太迟了。
nodes.option_EN: Use our affiliation with the association to try and talk with United Mining.
nodes.option_CHS: 用龙脉协会的关系与矿联沟通

nodes.snippet_EN: "Sir, this is a simple misunderstanding."  "Although these are lumen plants, once the stems are separated from the plant, they are classified as ordinary medicine."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「你搞错了，办事员。」 「尽管是龙脉花卉，但这些枝干如果拆开，认列只是一般的药草。」
nodes.option_EN: There's always a way to help.
nodes.option_CHS: 总有些我能做的事

nodes.snippet_EN: Now looking back on it, I wish I could have done more in situations like these.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 如果有能力帮忙的话，我希望当年的我们能多做一些什么。
nodes.option_EN: ...There's nothing I can do to help.
nodes.option_CHS: ...就凭我能做什么...

nodes.snippet_EN: If it was United Mining, Eda didn't want to have anything to do with them.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时只要遇到矿业联合，艾妲通常是不予理会。
nodes.option_EN: Enough! I'm not hanging around some place that humiliates witches like this!
nodes.option_CHS: 够了，别停留在这种羞辱女巫的地方

nodes.snippet_EN: "Pipeline 3 is broken about six meters from here, near the atrium. Hurry up and fix it."  Eda quickly pointed out the problem. The woman thought she had run into one of her superiors, but Eda was not at all pleased.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「大概距离这边六标准尺，天井附近有三处破裂，你们快去就是。」  艾妲很快地指出问题，对方还以为遇到哪位女巫高管，但我没从艾妲的表情感受到喜悦。
nodes.option_EN: I should still help them. Maybe I could get some good intel.
nodes.option_CHS: ...勉强帮帮他们，或许能打听到一些消息

nodes.snippet_EN: Even though the atmosphere on the ship was tense, Remi wasn't the least bit careless with her work. When the news channel broadcast the signal, it cut out for several seconds, causing a drop in views and public support.  The president even compensated us for our troubles.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管那时船只的气氛不好， 但菈米亚做起事来却没有马虎， 新闻台播送时被中断了将近十几秒， 导致收视率跟公信力都下降不少。  会长为了感谢我们，给了我们点酬劳。
nodes.option_EN: Of course. Anything I can do to mess with United Mining.
nodes.option_CHS: 好，只要能干扰矿业联合

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda politely refused the president's request and left in a hurry. I heard that after the interview was broadcast, the Lumen Mining Act was endorsed by the association, making it easier to push through. Most runners, however, denounced it.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲婉拒了会长的请求， 迅速地离开现场。 听说后来节目播出， 由于龙脉指定法经过协会的背书， 让推动变得顺利许多... 为许多探勘人诟病。
nodes.option_EN: There's no need to take it that far.
nodes.option_CHS: 不需要做到那种地步

nodes.snippet_EN: Remi was one of the best hackers in the Peaks, but United Mining's signal wasn't easy to jam. Lucky for us, they thought it was just an accident, otherwise things would have turned out much worse.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 虽然菈米亚是群山一流的黑客， 但矿联讯号也不是随便能干扰的， 幸好他们只把这当成民间意外， 否则后果不堪设想。  最后我们被以不正当通讯进行小额罚锾...

nodes.snippet_EN: "I liked everyone at the Witching Tower, even though they may not have liked me." "But it's okay... I have my master."  That's what Eda said when she returned. She collected the things she had found, and silently retreated to her room.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「我喜欢巫塔的大家，虽然大家不喜欢我。」 「但没关系，我有师父就好。」  那天，艾妲一人从巫塔返回后如此说， 接着默默的将她找到的东西，收回自己的房间。
nodes.option_EN: I spent my childhood here. I should hang around for a while.
nodes.option_CHS: 童年都在这里度过，多花点时间吧

nodes.snippet_EN: "I'm never coming back again."  Eda didn't say a word after she returned to the ship, as if she was lost in some distant memory.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「不会再来了。」  那天艾妲回到红楼不发一语， 仿佛陷入遥远的回忆。
nodes.option_EN: Let's just take a quick look...
nodes.option_CHS: 简单看看就好...

nodes.snippet_EN: "Couldn't find any clues about my master..." Eda said as she returned to the ship.   She had a registry with her that she said would help find her master, but it seemed more like she was trying to say goodbye to her former self.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「没有师父的线索呢...」  艾妲回到红楼后这么说，带回一本名册的她，与其说在寻找师父的线索，不如说她在努力跟过去的自己告别。
nodes.option_EN: Who cares about a fine, I want to climb the Tower one last time.
