nodes.option_CHS: 罚锾无所谓，最后我想爬上塔看看

nodes.snippet_EN: "It's not worth it, there won't be any clues about my master here..." Eda said as she returned to the ship.  Somehow it felt like she was trying to say goodbye to her former self.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「这里再找下去，也不会有师父的线索...」  艾妲回到红楼后这么说，我总有种感觉，她在努力跟过去的自己告别。
nodes.option_EN: It doesn't matter. My master was better than this place anyway.
nodes.option_CHS: 只是间容不下师父的建筑

nodes.snippet_EN: I remember him reaching out with his bionic arm to express his thanks to Eda. She said that even though it was cold to the touch, she could still feel the warmth.  "Here, take this." He offered us a book, saying only that it contained the memories of his brothers.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得他伸出机械义体的手跟艾妲表示感谢， 艾妲提过那触感冰冷，但却有一股暖意。  「这书给你。」他留下了一本书给红楼， 只说那是兄弟们的回忆
nodes.option_EN: Let's help him out.
nodes.option_CHS: 帮帮他们吧

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda left in silence. I just hope that any warrior who fights for what they believe in gets the honor they deserve... like Kay.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲那时默默的离开， 我只希望任何曾经奋斗过的勇士， 最终能得到应有的荣耀，如同大魁。
nodes.option_EN: We can't be hanging around here. We've got to get to Silk Oasis...
nodes.option_CHS: 没时间耗在这里，得前往丝州...

nodes.snippet_EN: It turned out to be an empty casket.  The followers of Myria believed that those that passed should return to Ignis. Eda said that these types of caskets could often be found in ruins. Most of them were abandoned caskets that had been reported to the authorities after space burials were banned.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记忆中，是空的棺材。  信仰万道的居民，认为人死后该回归烛龙， 艾妲说这类棺材常会出现在废墟中， 多半是宇宙葬禁止后，被检举抛弃的棺材。
nodes.option_EN: Try to get its location and see if we can pull it in.
nodes.option_CHS: 试着定位他，打捞起来看看

nodes.snippet_EN: After getting out of its way, the object continued on. Remi kept looking into it and found out it was headed for Ignis.  "It's probably a casket for a space burial."  I still remember the look on Eda's face when she said that.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 改变轨道后，不明物体持续它的路线。 菈米亚追查后，发现那是往烛龙投入的物体。  「应该是宇宙葬的棺材。」  我还记得艾妲说时的表情。
nodes.option_EN: I have a bad feeling about this. Let's move out of its way.
nodes.option_CHS: 令人不安的巧合，让红楼避开轨道吧

nodes.snippet_EN: It took a lot of time reeling it in and opening it, but no matter how things went, scavenging was always a lot easier than excavating. Plus, helping out Red Chamber really took my mind off things.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 花了不少时间，但宇宙中拾荒这种事，跟探勘龙穴比起来还是轻松很多，能为红楼做点什么，也能转移我的心情。
nodes.option_EN: It might have something useful inside. Let's figure out how to open it.
nodes.option_CHS: 花点时间想办法打开它，或许会找到些什么

nodes.snippet_EN: Back in those days, if it wasn't a cave, most of the time Eda didn't want to waste time on it.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得当时只要不是龙穴，艾妲多半认为，不需要多花时间在这些地方。
nodes.option_EN: It might be something, but we still shouldn't waste any time on it.
nodes.option_CHS: 虽然可惜，但还是别乱来好了。

nodes.snippet_EN: We left in silence. At that time, I still didn't know what Eda was really looking for.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们默默地离去，那时我还没有发现， 艾妲真正在寻找的东西是什么。
nodes.option_EN: Let's not waste time here. We better get going.
nodes.option_CHS: 别花时间在这了，早点离开

nodes.snippet_EN: I was so foolish back then. All I wanted was to find an undiscovered cave. I was oblivious to Eda's true motives.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时我实在很傻，只想找到无人发现的龙脉， 却没能理解艾妲真正在意的目标是什么，
nodes.option_EN: Listen to Remi. It couldn't hurt for Jun to do some more exploring.
nodes.option_CHS: 听菈米亚的，请李莫再努力一下

nodes.snippet_EN: I put a small amount of excavation equipment in their warehouse. The digital contract was sent to me and we all agreed on how much we'd earn...  That was life in the Peaks. And to this day... I still haven't learned.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 他们当时把我缴纳小量探索设备堆到仓库间， 几声吆喝后，探勘队出发， 电子合同送到了我手中， 互相承诺了彼此的抽成金额...  尽管像是他们的日常，但直到今天， 我依然很难体会。
nodes.option_EN: (Hmm... Maybe I should see how the Peakers do things?)
nodes.option_CHS: (要试试看群山人的处世方法吗...）

nodes.snippet_EN: East Ocean runners were born chasing lumen. We must feel the pulse of lumen ourselves to maintain our dignity and honor.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 瀛海探勘人追逐龙脉而生，唯有亲手接触岩壁， 感受龙脉的律动，才是荣誉的瀛海人。
nodes.option_EN: An Oceaner would never let someone do the running for them!
nodes.option_CHS: 探勘怎么能交给别人！

nodes.snippet_EN: I paid no attention to the mockery and quietly walked away.  Kay used to say, "Lumen exists within you. There is no winning and losing."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时我没有理会对方的嘲讽，默默离去 大魁说过「龙脉自存于心，没有输赢。」
nodes.option_EN: Sorry. Cave running is not about winning and losing.
nodes.option_CHS: 失礼，探勘不是比较输赢的地方

nodes.snippet_EN: Ignis No.1 was a dark, massive cave. There were numerous excavation squads deep inside, shuttling among ancient Myrian ruins.  I was barely able to keep up, but I eventually found something.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 大荒是个深邃的巨大龙脉， 里面充斥着不同的探勘小队， 他们深入洞穴， 在小行星内的万道遗迹穿梭...  当时我差点没跟上，记得最后找到的是...
nodes.option_EN: (I'll show them what a real East Ocean runner looks like.)
nodes.option_CHS: （让他们知道...瀛海龙脉同盟的水准）

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as I finished speaking, a blue lumen light flashed before my eyes and I passed out. When I came to, the man was nowhere to be found.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 说完后，我只记得一片蓝色的汜气光，我晕了过去，待我醒来后，却再也不见对方踪影。
nodes.option_EN: ...That the belt may rise again one day.
nodes.option_CHS: ...小行星必将奋起

nodes.snippet_EN: "You better watch your mouth, boy..."  As soon as he spoke, I blacked out. Later I woke up with a splitting headache, and the man was nowhere to be found.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「年轻人，说错话是很不敬的事...」  话语方落，我意识突然消失，头痛欲裂。 等我醒来，那人却已经不见踪影。
nodes.option_EN: ...Warriors of Praesidio will crush United Mining one day.
nodes.option_CHS: ...龙守勇士，必将战胜矿业联合

nodes.snippet_EN: They treated me like one of their own. As they taught me how to cut open chunks of rubble, and as we uncovered their frozen comrades, they spoke of what happened to them during the war. They said that all they wished for was peace in the Peaks and for war to never break out again.  They paid me graciously for the help I provided.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 他们把我当作自己人， 一边引导如何切开瓦砾， 找出过往冻僵的伙伴， 跟我聊着当年与矿业联合作战的种种， 并渴望群山常保和平，永无战争。  结束后作为感谢，他给了我们...
nodes.option_EN: (Cleaning up the battlefield is a sacred endeavor. I should lend him a hand.)
nodes.option_CHS: （清理战场是神圣的事，帮帮他们）

nodes.snippet_EN: It wasn't uncommon to see tragic sights like this adventuring around the Peaks. I had no choice but to leave the elderly crew in peace.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 于群山冒险时，有时会看见这种让人伤心的情境，我只能无声默默离开。
nodes.option_EN: (I'm afraid I won't be of much help... Best get going.)
nodes.option_CHS: （帮不上忙...早点离开吧）

nodes.snippet_EN: Remi was upset that Eda didn't listen to her, but I was able to dismantle several traps with the exploration kit. While I was wondering why there would be a military stronghold there, I found the door to a storage room.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管菈米亚一边碎碎念为什么不听她的，我依然成功操作探索设备，拆除了数个诡雷。就在思考为什么这里是军事据点时，我找到诡雷后的仓库门...里面是...
nodes.option_EN: If Jun is sure he can do it, I shouldn't stop him.
nodes.option_CHS: 李莫都这么说了，就让他试试看吧

nodes.snippet_EN: Not long after Eda made her decision, a trap determined that our heat signal was an attack target and exploded. Several pieces of shrapnel slammed into Red Chamber and nearly penetrated the armor.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲才决定后没多久，诡雷判定热源不符规定，瞬间爆炸，碎片数次冲撞了红楼，差点穿透甲板。
nodes.option_EN: No, it's too dangerous. Don't do anything stupid.
nodes.option_CHS: 太危险了，先不要轻举妄动

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda tried using the reso-scanner to pick up on something, but she didn't hear a single sound.  The lights that surrounded me soon disappeared.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲使用共振仪努力寻找可能的声音， 然而却没有听到一丝回响， 围绕我身旁的光点，不久后也消失了。
nodes.option_EN: Ask Eda if she hears anything unusual coming from the cave.
nodes.option_CHS: 请艾妲感应龙脉的声音是否异常

nodes.snippet_EN: Following the lights, I passed through a tunnel that looked like it had been ransacked.  When I got to the deepest parts of the cave, I found a familiar stone disc on the ground, amid the rubble and debris.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 循着光点，穿越过被洗劫一空的坑道， 我来到了矿场的深处。 在凌乱的坑道地面上， 我找到了一块熟悉的石版...
nodes.option_EN: Follow the lumen lights to find the answer.
nodes.option_CHS: 顺着汜光点前去寻找答案

nodes.snippet_EN: At the time, Eda was really worried about our safety. I think the doctor's words really affected her.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那时的艾妲很担心船员是否又有意外，大概是医生的话造成的。
nodes.option_EN: I can't knowingly put a crewmember in danger...
nodes.option_CHS: 不能让船员遇到风险...

nodes.snippet_EN: "It should be an honor for you to sacrifice your life for lumen and Eddie."  Despite Remi's message, she did a good job guiding me.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「你就为龙脉跟姐姐捐出命吧，是你的幸运。」  当时菈米亚通信虽这么说，指示却明确清晰。 最后找到了异常辐射来源，在她协助下， 我关闭了来源的机房动力， 还找到了不少战前留下的商贸纪录。
nodes.option_EN: Have Remi tell Jun what to do.
nodes.option_CHS: 请菈米亚协助指示李莫

nodes.snippet_EN: Safety first. I left without completing the exploration, and by Taiyang's mercy, I didn't run into any trouble...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 为了安全起见，我撤离了此地。 太乙垂怜，过程中没有遇到危险...
nodes.option_EN: It's way too dangerous. Exploration is only worth it if you come out alive.
nodes.option_CHS: 太过危险了，还是放弃搜索吧

nodes.snippet_EN: For the sake of uncovering the truth, I stomached my uneasiness and continued onward, following the marks on the wall.   At the end of the tunnel was a war room that had been completely plundered. I opened a drawer and found a discarded document...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 为了查清真相，我忍着心中不安，顺着痕迹小心前进。坑道终点是当年的战情室，贵重资产已被洗劫一空，抽屉里，我找到一份被随意弃置的文件...
nodes.option_EN: I need to figure out what happened here. Keep going!
nodes.option_CHS: 为了了解当年的实情，我必须继续前进

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda finished up and silently returned to the ship. There was a bit of sadness in her eyes. After all, this was her home for several years.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲结束探索，默默的回到船上， 眼神略有哀伤。 再怎么说，巫塔都是她生活十几年的地方。
nodes.option_EN: I can't just sit around reminiscing...
nodes.option_CHS: 别眷恋这种地方了...

nodes.snippet_EN: "I guess someone came looking for me..." Eda said wryly as she got onboard.  "I have no idea what the lumen was doing... I think it was trying to console me."  She brought back something she found in a pile of ashes...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「好像有人在找我呢...」回来船后，艾妲苦笑的说  「我实在搞不懂汜在想什么，大概要安慰我吧。」  她从燃烧殆尽的纸堆中，找到了...
nodes.option_EN: Try to resonate with the lumen...
nodes.option_CHS: 试着共鸣看看...

nodes.snippet_EN: "If she was able to grow up, she'd be about as old as you," she said softly as she looked at Remi over the comms system. Apparently, before the princess passed, she was asked to find the child the princess had with the chairman but was unable to complete the task.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「她如果平安长大，也是你这个年纪」  通讯端的她，看着菈米亚缓缓说，原来她受吉普赛公主临终时委托，希望寻找公主与议长的私生女，却无能达成。 事后她登船交付我们最后的请求，接着转身跃入黑暗的宇宙空间。
nodes.option_EN: Let's help her out.
nodes.option_CHS: 帮帮他们吧

nodes.snippet_EN: During our years adventuring, we encountered countless people we were unable to help because we had our problems to deal with. To this day, I still regret not being able to do more.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当年冒险时，总会遇到碍于现状，无法帮助的人群，直到今天，有时我还会后悔。
nodes.option_EN: We should avoid running into any potential problems.
nodes.option_CHS: 还是要避免一切可能的意外

nodes.snippet_EN: I stayed inside for so long that Eda thought something had happened to me. In the swirling sea of ruined documents, I discovered the glory of my clan's past.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 最后，我待的时间久得艾妲以为我出了意外， 在被销毁的文件海中，我找到了曾经的荣耀。
nodes.option_EN: The Lee clan can only move forward by acknowledging past failures.
nodes.option_CHS: 必须面对错误的历史，鸢家才能往前走

nodes.snippet_EN: To this day, I still think back on those frozen documents floating through the vacuum of my family's residence, and the East Ocean calligraphy that had come off the wall:  "By Taiy's mercy."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 时至今日，我依然会想起领主室内于真空中飘散，结冻的文件 还有墙壁脱落的瀛海字画 「太乙垂怜」
nodes.option_EN: Let the past stay in the past.
nodes.option_CHS: 就让过去的遗留在过去吧

nodes.snippet_EN: The captain of the so-called Nomadic Rhythm had detailed knowledge of the environment. Too detailed. It made me think it was probably a trap.  Safety always came first. I snuck away without making a sound. Afterward, at one of the association's branches, I heard they had managed to escape, and they were really upset that someone had just left them there.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 自称「流浪节拍」团长的声音对环境的描述太过详细，令我怀疑又是黑帮的陷阱。 安全起见，我不动声色的离开了现场。 后来在协会分部听说，「流浪节拍」自行脱困了，但对被拒绝救援一事耿耿于怀。
nodes.option_EN: (How do they know where the control panel is? Sounds suspicious.)
nodes.option_CHS: （...他们怎么知道有控制面板？小心为上）

nodes.snippet_EN: I followed the captain's orders and was able to clean up the rubble. Eventually, I found the control panel.  After a few bellows, the lumium built up to the point that it could no longer be held back. The large stones blocking the path exploded into a million pieces.  The crew members thanked me repeatedly. Apparently, one was part of the Rumani Clan, and was overly eager to recover some of their relics, which eventually led to the disaster.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 依照「流浪节拍」团长的指示，我用探索机器人清除了碎石推，找到了操控面板。 几声巨响后，高浓度的汜气炸开了通道的巨石。 「流浪节拍」的成员向我道谢，原来其中有人曾属于吉普赛家族，为了寻回遗物，太过心急而遭逢意外。
nodes.option_EN: I'm with the association as well. Don't worry, I'll save you.
nodes.option_CHS: 同为协会伙伴，我会救你们出来的。

nodes.snippet_EN: I spent some time analyzing the water and soil quality of the refinery, and we discussed another development plan in detail.  To thank Red Chamber, the crew leader gave us some plants they had uncovered as compensation.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我花了点时间研究精炼厂的土质跟水质， 重新讨论了开发计划。  为了感谢红楼的协助，领队将一些挖掘到的多余植物送给我们处理。
nodes.option_EN: Since Jun can help, let him take care of it.
nodes.option_CHS: 李莫既然可以帮忙，让他处理吧

nodes.snippet_EN: The leader of the excavation crew knew Red Chamber had its own work to take care of, so after bidding us farewell, he went back to work.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 废墟探勘队的领队理解红楼的难处，和我们简单道别后，便回到自己的挖掘任务中。
nodes.option_EN: Remi's right. We've got a mission to complete. Let's get out of here.
nodes.option_CHS: 听菈米亚的，任务在身早点离开吧

nodes.snippet_EN: Operating the exploration robot, I was able to dig out a tunnel that I could squeeze through. Inside, I found a conference room that had collapsed. It felt like some important talks had occurred here. After some searching, the effort proved to be worth it.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我操控探索设备的机器人，努力在通道中挖出一条可以前进的路线。里面是一个坍方的会议室...感觉曾经在这里谈判过，最后我找到...
nodes.option_EN: Use the exploration robot to dig out a tunnel.
nodes.option_CHS: 用探索机器人挖出通道

nodes.snippet_EN: Safety first. I turned around to explore some other passageways. Back then, I was extremely cautious and let a lot of opportunities pass by.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 安全起见，我转身去探索其他通道， 没有再继续前进下去。 当年我因为谨慎，错过了很多探险机会。
nodes.option_EN: I shouldn't risk it.
nodes.option_CHS: 不要冒险进入危险区域吧

nodes.snippet_EN: After thanking us for cooperating, he handed us a book. "Our story must be told," he said.  When we left, the sound of the cave collapsing could be heard. That's when I knew that he planned on dying there.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 感谢我们的配合，对方将一本手册交给我们，「记得把我们的故事传下去。」 等我离开时，矿场传出一阵崩塌声， 我才知道他打算死在这里。
nodes.option_EN: Do as he says. Put down the equipment and leave.
nodes.option_CHS: 照他的做，留下设备就走。

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as the words came out of my mouth, I blacked out.  When I came to, all my scavenging equipment was gone and the man was nowhere to be seen.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 才刚开口拒绝，下一秒我就失去了意识。 直到我回神后，身边的探勘装备已经被拿走了。 我再也没有见到他。
nodes.option_EN: This is ridiculous. I refuse to accept.
nodes.option_CHS: 无理的要求，我不会同意的。

nodes.snippet_EN: I found a conspicuous piece of wreckage near the transport station and waited to be rescued.  I don't know how much time had passed before my consciousness started to fade. Red Chamber eventually arrived, but I barely made it out alive.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我找到传送港附近一个显眼的太空残骸，将自己固定在上面，等待救援。 不知过了多久，我已经开始意识恍惚时，红楼总算抵达，让我保住一命。
nodes.option_EN: (Stay put and wait to be rescued.)
nodes.option_CHS: （留在原地，等待红楼的救援）

nodes.snippet_EN: I was about to pass out when I saw a glimmer of light amid the wreckage. I grasped for it...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我当时几乎丧失了意识，只记得在残骸堆中看到一个光点，我努力抓着它...
nodes.option_EN: (I can't just sit around and wait. Think of a way to get back to the ship.)
nodes.option_CHS: （等下去不是办法，自行想办法返航）

nodes.snippet_EN: Once the door opened, whatever electricity was left suddenly turned on. The greenhouse on the unmanned agriculture satellite was teeming with life. Among the several varieties of plants, there were even a few valuable research specimens.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 大门开启后残存的电力突然启动，无人管理的农业卫星，不知不觉让植物蔓延了整个温室，其中不乏珍贵的龙穴植物研究。
nodes.option_EN: It's fine. Just open it up.
nodes.option_CHS: 没问题，挖开他们。

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda was always worried about my safety. It didn't matter what it was, she put all the responsibility on herself.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲总是很担心我会遇到危险，她似乎将事情都当成自己的责任。
nodes.option_EN: Don't mess with it. A locked door on an agricultural satellite is not normal.
nodes.option_CHS: 别乱来，农业卫星深锁的大门，不太寻常

nodes.snippet_EN: I disarmed a few traps and luckily didn't set off anything. Still, the lab must have been cleaned out during the war, because there wasn't any advanced equipment to be found.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 突破了机关，非常幸运地没有引爆任何东西。不过实验室似乎在冲突时期就被搬空了，没有找到什么先进仪器。
nodes.option_EN: Let's do this! There must be valuable goods inside.
nodes.option_CHS: 突破吧，里面应该有不少珍贵的东西。

nodes.snippet_EN: I left without anything of value, but some things were not worth risking.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时我离开了现场，有些事情不值得冒险。
nodes.option_EN: Koomsung Transport was known for their booby traps. We'd better be careful.
nodes.option_CHS: 金城集团的诡雷很有名，少碰为妙。

nodes.snippet_EN: After I took apart the door, I found a cemetery. Ice-blue lumenite surrounded the graves, and the light of lumen lingered around like spirits.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 拆开大门后是一个墓园。 冰蓝的汜晶石环绕墓碑放置， 漂泊的汜光点宛如灵魂。  每个墓碑上都写着同一个年份：「8506年」， 这些墓碑属于第一次龙脉冲突时， 引发暴动的矿场死者。
nodes.option_EN: It's hard to say when Red Chamber will need supplies. Best to go check it out.
nodes.option_CHS: 难保证红楼会有需要的时候，深入看看吧

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda always took the safety of others first. I later realized that was because she was unable to see the value in herself...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲始终把别人的安危当成第一位，我后来才知道，那是因为她对自己的价值无法肯定。
nodes.option_EN: Eda's right. Let's go.
nodes.option_CHS: 艾妲说得有理，离开吧

nodes.snippet_EN: After a few hours of digging, I found the remnants of some ship that couldn't get out in time. This was the first time in years that it saw the light of day.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 经过数小时的挖掘后，我发现了当年来不及起飞的船舰残骸。船舰被遗忘在此地，直到今日才重见天日。
nodes.option_EN: Maybe there's something beneath all this. Dig it up and see what you can find.
nodes.option_CHS: 说不定有些物资藏在底下，挖掘看看。

nodes.snippet_EN: I left the ruins of the base for their later generations to uncover.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我离开了舰队基地遗址，这里留给他们的后人挖掘就行了。
nodes.option_EN: All that's left is rubble. There's nothing valuable to be found here.
nodes.option_CHS: 只剩一堆碎石了，没必要开挖。

nodes.snippet_EN: We thought it was an old, damaged beacon. We never expected the firewall to counter-attack and hack into our system. It raised the engine's power output higher and higher, until it caused a large explosion...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 原以为是古老的破损信标，却没想到， 信标的防火墙反过来入侵了红楼系统， 并且无限制的提高引擎功率， 导致不小的爆炸...

nodes.snippet_EN: The signal soon came back online. Since it was an old, pre-war beacon, the outdated firewall was easy to break through. Remi downloaded the old files, and when she opened them she was surprised at what she saw.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通讯很快的恢复了，毕竟是冲突前的旧信标， 过时的防火墙被轻易地破解，在关闭信标前，菈米亚顺手下载了冲突前的档案，结果她大叫了出来，那竟然是...
nodes.option_EN: Try hacking into the beacon and turn off the system!
nodes.option_CHS: 试着黑进信标，关闭系统！

nodes.snippet_EN: Having not received a response, I shuttled through the wreckage for quite some time, before I finally found the breaker. When I turned it off the signal went back to normal.  I could hear the sound of Eda and Remi arguing, and it sounded like Eda was about to get off the ship and come looking for me.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通讯无回应，我花了不少时间在残骸间穿梭， 终于找到总开关，关闭后通讯恢复。  讯号一方却是艾妲跟菈米亚争执的声音，艾妲似乎差点自己下船来找人。
nodes.option_EN: (Calm down... Jun will figure it out.)
nodes.option_CHS: （冷静...李莫应该会自己想出办法）

nodes.snippet_EN: I couldn't get ahold of Eda and the sentry station fired off its covert weapons system.  Remi managed to evade most of the attacks, but Red Chamber still got struck several times.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我没能通知到艾妲，哨站隐蔽的火炮便启动了，尽管菈米亚千钧一发之际脱离火网，但仍被数发命中。
nodes.option_EN: (Try again to get in touch with Eda and tell her to leave the airspace.)
nodes.option_CHS: （再次呼叫艾妲脱离空域）

nodes.snippet_EN: I had taken some exploration kits, so I let all the robots get to work. I heard the alarms blaring, and just as the system was about to attack, I managed to disable it.  Just when I thought everything had settled down, the screen turned on and started to play some old recordings.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那次又是拿着探索设备，把所有探索机器人抛出的记忆，印象中警报大作，火炮启动的最后一刻我成功中断了系统。  就在我以为没事后， 眼前的屏幕却突然播放起来，那是...
nodes.option_EN: (Try to disable the defense system on my own.)
nodes.option_CHS: （想办法自己拆了自动防卫系统）

nodes.snippet_EN: This is a warning... to the lumen seeking vessel at 12 o'clock... Are you... United... Mining...?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告...12点钟的龙脉探测船...你们..是矿业..联合..吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: Warning: Navigation system error. Distance to... d-d-d-destination... unknown.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告：导航系统异常 距...离目标标标终点...无法判判判断

nodes.snippet_EN: So what if I came back a little late! It's for "Melody of Starsong".
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我只是晚了点回来，为了创作龙脉长歌，这些外出取材是必须的！

nodes.snippet_EN: Vessel ahead, you are encroaching on a United Mining military parade rehearsal. Please stop immediately.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 前面的船只，你已经进入了矿业联合阅兵的演习场，请立即停驶

nodes.snippet_EN: Warning: Error found in the greenhouse's lumium supply. Concentration has dropped by 3%. Plants will begin to die in 7 hours...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警吿，温室汜气供应异常， 浓度下降约3.4% 预计7标准时后，将有植物死亡...

nodes.snippet_EN: We decided it wasn't best to stick our noses in the affairs of others. Red Chamber continued on the spaceway until the ship was out of sight, and headed towards the Culture Foundation's space station.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 毕竟别人的家务事，我们也没什么好介入。 红楼对航道上的船视而不见， 照样航向基金会的空间站。
nodes.option_EN: Remi's right. Let them deal with their own problems.
nodes.option_CHS: 菈米亚说得对，别管吧

nodes.snippet_EN: We tried contacting the Rodin family space station with a modified signal, but it failed, and we were mistaken for gossip journalists.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼尝试联系罗登家族的空间站， 但却伪装失败，反而被对方当成花边新闻的记者，一个不察，对方的自动防御系统竟然开火，红楼的甲板受到不少损伤。

nodes.snippet_EN: The one online was Felis Rodin, the creator of "Melody of Starsong".  He spent so much time working on the opera that he rarely went home, and his family nearly kicked him out.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通讯的人是大名鼎鼎的「费拉・罗登」，龙脉长歌的创作人。  似乎是为了创作很少回家，差点被家里赶出去。在红楼的协助下，我们成功让他跟家中接上线，调解了纠纷。
nodes.option_EN: Jun's right. Let's pretend to be part of the family and get them in touch.
nodes.option_CHS: 李莫说得对，我们可以伪装是罗登家族，协助对方接触

nodes.snippet_EN: We found out that it was a group of guerillas that had been drifting for a long time, and needed serious help.  After realizing that they'd made a mistake, they boarded Red Chamber, apologized, and even gave us something as a gift.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那是群流亡许久，急需补给的游击队， 理解自己误认后，他们登船致歉， 并将一些手边的配给酒类赠与我们。
nodes.option_EN: Tell them that Red Chamber is a retired vessel. We're just a civilian crew.
nodes.option_CHS: 告诉他们红楼已经除役，现在是民间探勘船

nodes.snippet_EN: We weren't able to respond in time, and the guerillas shot several rounds, which damaged the ship.  The poor signal quality in the asteroid belt made it difficult to express goodwill.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 还来不及解释，游击队船只的武器已经发射， 造成红楼不少损伤。  在通讯不良的小行星带，善意的表达总是困难。

nodes.snippet_EN: We kept on moving, slowly but surely. The intermittent signals coming from afar gradually grew weaker, until they finally disappeared completely.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们默默的继续移动， 远方断断续续地电磁讯号逐渐变弱， 直到完全消失不见。
nodes.option_EN: They're just bluffing. No need to respond.
nodes.option_CHS: 虚张声势而已，没必要回应他们

nodes.snippet_EN: We followed Eda's instructions and she said she picked up on a massive space station. With Eda guiding the way, Remi flew through the storm and we eventually found a way out.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们依赖着艾妲的指示， 她说感应到一个巨大的宇宙空间站， 菈米亚跟着艾妲的指示在风暴中移动， 最后出现在眼前的是...
nodes.option_EN: Try using the reso-scanner to find a way out.
nodes.option_CHS: 试着用龙脉共振仪找路

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda did her best to listen for lumen, trying to find a safe pathway to the Shiratsuka recycling plant. We were flying like we were blind, and ended up crashing into another ship.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲努力的感应着龙脉，试图寻找安全的航道继续飞往回收站「白冢」，然而我们却像瞎子一样，一头与航道的船只发生冲撞

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda always knew what to do. The storm eventually faded, and the navigation system started working just fine in no time.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记忆中艾妲的判断总是准确， 电磁风暴后来逐渐远离， 系统在随后不久便恢复了正常
nodes.option_EN: Just be patient. Red Chamber's system always comes back online...
nodes.option_CHS: 只要忍一下，红楼的系统总会回复...

nodes.snippet_EN: We announced ourselves as a United Mining vessel that was attending the parade. After repeatedly apologizing to the officer, we slipped among the troops before slipping away.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们宣称自己是参与阅的矿联船只， 和警备船的军官多次致歉后，混入阅兵队伍离去。  虽然那时总跟菈米亚吵架，但她的确成功让我们躲过不少危机。
nodes.option_EN: Modify our signal and slip into the parade.
nodes.option_CHS: 伪装自己的讯号，混进阅兵船队中

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as the signal went out, the guard ship opened fire and Red Chamber was nearly destroyed.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 讯号才出去，我们突然就遭到警备船围攻， 红楼受到致命的重创。

nodes.snippet_EN: Unable to think of another option, Red Chamber raced forward, attempting to throw off the guard ship.  They must have thought that was pretty suspicious, because a barrage of enemy fire rained down on us.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 想不到什么解决方法，红楼加快马力， 想甩开前面的警备船。  对方觉得我们心中有鬼，对红楼展开炮击。
nodes.option_EN: We've got no choice. Let's charge through!
nodes.option_CHS: 没办法，冲过去了！

nodes.snippet_EN: The source of the problem was the lumium hybridizer. Eda adjusted the lumium supply to the greenhouse and things just returned to normal. Remi was a bit upset, but she didn't say anything.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 故障的源头，是汜水混合器出了异常。 艾妲最后自己简单调整了温室的供水状况， 一切又回复正常。 菈米亚对此却有点不满，但她没有说出口。
nodes.option_EN: Jun's right. I should take a listen...
nodes.option_CHS: 李莫说得对，仔细听听看汜水流动...

nodes.snippet_EN: During that time, Remi wasn't doing too well, and often made mistakes. Eda said she could help, but Remi insisted that she could do it herself. She didn't mean to, but some impurities got into the lumenide, which leaked into the engine pipeline and caused an explosion.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那阵子菈米亚心情不好，很容易出错，尽管艾妲说可以协助，坚决自行处理的她，最终让含有杂质的汜水流入引擎管线，发生了小爆炸。
nodes.option_EN: Let Remi adjust the flow of lumium.
nodes.option_CHS: 让菈米亚去调整管线的流量

nodes.snippet_EN: "I can't focus..."  Whenever Remi and I would argue, it would affect Eda. And this time, some impurities got mixed in with the lumenide. It entered the engine pipeline and caused an explosion.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「集中不了精神...」  在我跟菈米亚吵架的日子里，艾妲的精神很糟，终于这次混有杂质的汜水流入引擎管线，船体发生了爆炸意外。

nodes.snippet_EN: This space station was built by East Ocean before the Lumen War...
nodes.snippet_CHS: ...这是瀛海在龙脉冲突前，建立的空间站

nodes.snippet_EN: I promised I wouldn't report them several times before leaving the cave. I can still see his ice-cold, menacing stare. Just thinking of it makes me shudder.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我再三向对方保证，不会告发他，随即离开现场。 我仍然记得离开时，他冰冷而危险的眼神， 现在想起来还是余悸犹存。
nodes.option_EN: Forget it. This type of illegal excavation is everywhere.
nodes.option_CHS: 算了吧，非法探勘本来就是常态

nodes.snippet_EN: I dove in to prevent the cave from being irreparably damaged, and a fight erupted. The pirates didn't like the way things were looking and took off running, leaving their equipment behind.   I have no idea where I got the courage to stand up to them.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 为了阻止龙穴被破坏， 我和盗采者展开了一阵扭打。 对方眼看情势不对，装备也不管了，拔腿就跑。 现在想起来，真不知道我那时哪来的勇气。
nodes.option_EN: Cave robbers! I won't stand by as they destroy these valuable artifacts!
nodes.option_CHS: 居然是盗采矿脉的人...不能让他破坏遗迹！

nodes.snippet_EN: When I awoke, I had been sprawled out on the ground for some time. The pirates were gone, and valuable relics were shattered on the ground. Still, at least I didn't lose my life.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 醒来时，已经倒在地上好一会了。盗采者不知去向，龙穴内的珍贵遗迹也被破坏殆尽。 现在回想当时能保住一条命，也是足够了。

nodes.snippet_EN: It turned out to be full of lumen flowers, with a mysterious scripture placed neatly beside them.  Later, I found out it was a casket to be offered up to the black hole deity.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 打开后，里面是大量的龙脉花卉， 并放着一本奇妙的经书，  后来才知道，那是献给黑洞之神的棺材。
nodes.option_EN: We did come all this way, so we might as well open it up.
nodes.option_CHS: 都来了一趟，还是打开看看

nodes.snippet_EN: I didn't think too much about the container. Caves in the Peaks were full of robbers looking for relics.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我没有管那些货柜， 群山的龙脉总是不乏文物盗采者。
nodes.option_EN: It might be a trap. Curiosity killed the cat.
nodes.option_CHS: 怕什么陷阱，别太好奇了

nodes.snippet_EN: Behind the gate was a group of runners lying on the ground. It looked like they'd gotten into an argument over how to split the stolen goods.  After praying for their souls, I cleaned up everything they had left behind, and even found a few valuable items.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 在龙门后，一队探勘人倒在地上。似乎是为了分赃不均而起了内哄。 在祈祷他们的安息后，我清点了他们的遗物，找到一些珍贵的东西。
nodes.option_EN: (Try to open it with a starsong.)
nodes.option_CHS: （试着演奏，打开龙门）

nodes.snippet_EN: Safety always came first. And so, I left.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 安全起见，我离开了那扇大门。
nodes.option_EN: Best not risk it.
nodes.option_CHS: 别乱来好了...

nodes.snippet_EN: Lagrée was an expert cave and Myrian researcher. I learned to look at cave excavation and Myrian research from a completely different perspective. Thinking back on the impulsive methods I employed in the past, I couldn't help but feel ashamed.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 德拉格雷不愧是龙穴与万道研究首屈一指的专家。协助他考古，我对龙穴探勘与万道研究有了全新的理解。 想到以前急躁的下龙穴方式，不禁为之汗颜。
nodes.option_EN: It'd be an honor to help. Just tell me what you need me to do!
nodes.option_CHS: 很荣幸能提供协助，就依照您的指示进行吧！

nodes.snippet_EN: As I helped dig, I shared all the archaeological knowledge I'd learned in the caves. Lagrée was clearly excited, and even noted that he had never encountered much of what I'd seen.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我在协助挖掘时，分享了我过往发现的龙穴现象和考古数据。 德拉格雷显得十分高兴，我描述的现象，连他也是第一次听说。
nodes.option_EN: It'd be an honor. I'll be sure to use all the knowledge I've learned excavating.
nodes.option_CHS: 很荣幸能提供协助，我会将下龙穴学到的知识全用上

nodes.snippet_EN: As I helped dig, I shared all the archaelogical knowledge I'd learned in the caves. However, Lagrée was clearly not interested. He even said that much of the information was incorrect, which lowered his opinion of Red Chamber.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我在协助挖掘时，分享了我过往发现的龙穴现象和考古数据。 我分享的信息没有引起德拉格雷的兴趣。那些错误的信息，反而让他对红楼的评价大为降低。
成功了
nodes.option_CHS: 一起共鸣

nodes.snippet_CHS: 打不开龙门

nodes.snippet_EN: Luckily, I was able to turn off the transmutation chamber in time and prevent a disaster from occurring. They told me they were gathering resonance data, and the chamber suddenly overloaded. To thank me, they shared the latest research with us.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 幸好及时关闭风转箱，才没有酿成灾害。 问了才知道，他们来收集共振数据，风转箱不知为何就超载了。为了表达感谢，他们分享了一些最新的研究数据给我。
nodes.option_EN: Step aside! I need to turn off the transmutation chamber!
nodes.option_CHS: 你们都让开，让我关闭风转箱！

nodes.snippet_EN: Just as the small research team made it to safety, the cave collapsed as it echoed roaring bellows. Luckily, I didn't get hit by any falling debris and I was able to pull myself out of the rubble.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 才刚疏散完研究小组，龙穴便在轰隆巨响中崩塌了。 还好没被落石命中，我好不容易才爬出那堆废墟。
nodes.option_EN: Run! This place is going to blow!
nodes.option_CHS: 快点撤，这里要爆炸了！

nodes.snippet_EN: Not long into the performance, the organisms in the wall twisted like wisping smoke, and as they disappeared into thin air, the craggy wall suddenly collapsed inwards.  When the dust had settled, I found a rare lumenite crystal amid the debris.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对着岩壁共鸣不久，岩壁中的生物像一团发光的烟雾般扭动着，消失无踪，岩壁突然向内坍塌。 烟尘散去后，碎石中发现了罕见的汜晶体。
nodes.option_EN: Try performing at the wall.
nodes.option_CHS: 对着岩壁共鸣看看。

nodes.snippet_EN: As I started to dig, the organisms within the wall began to squirm and mournful wails were heard.  The whole cave began to vibrate and signs of collapse could be seen. I scrambled for safety, and when the cave settled down I went back to look for the mysterious organisms, but I couldn't find a thing.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 才开始挖掘汜晶岩壁，岩壁中的生物扭动发出哀鸣。 整个洞穴开始震动坍塌，我赶紧夺路而逃。龙穴稳定后回去搜索，已经找不到神秘的生物了。
nodes.option_EN: No time to be wasted here. Let's just start digging.
nodes.option_CHS: 事不宜迟，直接开挖吧。

nodes.snippet_EN: After spending some time understanding the structure of the pipes and draining the lumenide, I pulled out the plant.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 费了点时间搞懂这里的汜水管结构，引出汜水后，我拿到了那株植物。
nodes.option_EN: Find the lumenide pipeline nearby, and resonate to drain the lumenide.
nodes.option_CHS: 附近找看看汜水管线，先共鸣把水泄掉。

nodes.snippet_EN: I underestimated the depth of the pond, and as I fumbled about, the lumen energy nearly made me lose consciousness.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我低估了水池的深度。才踏入池中，汜水能量差点让我失去意识，
nodes.option_EN: The pond's not deep. Just jump in.
nodes.option_CHS: 这水池也不深，直接跳进去就行。

nodes.snippet_EN: I carefully crawled up the wall and placed the explosives. The United Mining excavation squad told me to hurry up and get down, as if they were eager to blow up the gate.  The blast covered my face in dust, and the squad couldn't stop laughing. They gave us some ore for my services.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我小心地爬到墙上安装炸药，矿联的探勘团催促我赶快离开爆炸范围，迫不及待地炸毁了龙门。 被爆破的粉尘弄得灰头土脸，矿联团队的人大笑之余，分了点清出来的矿石给我。
nodes.option_EN: Alright, I'll help you place the explosives.
nodes.option_CHS: 好吧，我会替你们安装好炸药。

nodes.snippet_EN: I politely refused the "offer" proposed by United Mining's excavation party. Surprisingly, they didn't force me to do it.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我谨慎地婉拒了矿联探勘团的提案。 他们出乎意料地居然没有继续施压。
nodes.option_EN: Sorry, I've never blown up a cave before.
nodes.option_CHS: 抱歉，我没有在龙穴爆破的经验。

nodes.snippet_EN: I have to say it, Eda was a bit of an impulsive buyer.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 不得不说，我觉得艾妲很容易乱买东西。
nodes.option_EN: Ignis above. Thank you for the offer.
nodes.option_CHS: 烛龙在上，谢谢你给我们的机会

nodes.snippet_EN: "Self-righteous bastards..."  After mumbling a few curt words, the merchant turned around and left without looking back.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「自以为是的外地人...」  对方碎碎念了几句后，头也不回的转身而去。
nodes.option_EN: (We're here to find caves, not to buy stolen goods.)
nodes.option_CHS: （我们是来找龙脉的，不是赃物商）

nodes.snippet_EN: （｀ｴ ´ *＼  The communication records showed a message written in some unusual language. I didn't have many positive encounters with these strange capybaras from the Peaks.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「 （｀ｴ ´ *＼ 」  记得通讯纪录上，对方传了很奇怪的文字给我们， 我对群山这种神奇豚类，没有太多好印象。
nodes.option_EN: This is way too suspicious. Don't pay attention to them.
nodes.option_CHS: 太可疑，无视他们

nodes.snippet_EN: They left right after taking a container filled with armor. Remi and I did not approve, but Eda's kindness ended up paying off.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方领受了装甲的货柜组件后离去， 尽管菈米亚跟我都不赞成， 但当时艾妲的善行，竟然为她换来了...
nodes.option_EN: We need to lend a hand to those in need.
nodes.option_CHS: 帮忙是应该的

nodes.snippet_EN: "So, they started hiring civilian ships? Whatever works."  The place was complete chaos. They were so busy that they didn't even question Red Chamber's identity, and immediately told us to pick up some containers.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「上头直接找民间船来送货吗，行。」 感觉是十万火急，对方连看到红楼的船籍不对也不疑有它，马上请我们去领货柜。
nodes.option_EN: Crap... Just pretend we're a transport vessel.
nodes.option_CHS: 糟糕...谎称自己是运输船队好了

nodes.snippet_EN: Screaming as they chased us, we were eventually captured by the guards. However, just as we thought we were finished, a United Mining officer appeared and helped us clear everything up.  "Be careful on these missions."  He spoke softly, and we noticed he was wearing a Six Peaks Ring.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方吆喝着追上来，我们被警备队逮到，就在我们以为完蛋时，一位矿业联合的长官帮我们解了围，  「执行任务小心点。」  他说得小声，我们发现，他手指上是万道六山戒。
nodes.option_EN: Let's get out of here!
nodes.option_CHS: 直接逃走比较快！

nodes.snippet_EN: "On the Rodin family name, I swear, they are one of ours."  Using the Rodin family brooch, we pretended to be members of the Rodin family and pulled Lamar in with us.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「以罗登家族的名誉发誓，他们是自己人」  透过罗登的别针，我们谎称自己是罗登家族，硬是把拉马送了进去
nodes.option_EN: We do have this Rodin family artifact. Let's help Lamar out.
nodes.option_CHS: 手边有罗登家族的信物，就当为拉马报恩吧

nodes.snippet_EN: "On the Rodin family name, I swear, they are one of ours."  We tried convincing them, but United Mining remained suspicious, and in the end, nothing came of it.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「以罗登家族的名誉发誓，他们是自己人」  尽管我们这么说，但矿业联合只觉得可疑。最后整件事不了了之。

nodes.snippet_EN: Using Red Chamber's tether, I carefully made my way to the center of the storm. The intensity of the storm caused the readings of the spacesuit to go off the charts and, in a daze, I slowly lost consciousness...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我在风暴中透过红楼的绳索小心前往风暴中心，剧烈的风暴让太空防护衣各种读数爆表，恍惚中我失去了意识...
nodes.option_EN: Have Jun head out into space and explore.
nodes.option_CHS: 请李莫前往太空探索看看...

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber moved in closer to where the electromagnetic waves were most intense. Flashes of electricity could be seen in the subspace rift...  Then, all of a sudden, a small fire broke out in Red Chamber, caused by some electromagnetic abnormalities.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼顺着电磁波最强烈的地方靠近，亚空间裂口闪烁着雷光...  下一瞬间，红楼就因为电磁异常突然爆发了小型的火灾。
nodes.option_EN: See if Red Chamber can get any closer.
nodes.option_CHS: 试着让红楼靠近一点

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber plowed ahead and managed to break free of the blockade set up by the patrol ship, but was hit multiple times on the way out.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼加速闯越矿联巡逻船的封锁，但是被多次击中。
nodes.option_EN: We don't have the time for this. Charge out of here.
nodes.option_CHS: 管不了那么多，闯过去吧。

nodes.snippet_EN: We pulled out the forged visa and sent it to the patrol ship. The patrol captain thought it was a bit strange, but he didn't say much and just let us go.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 伪装的签证派上用场，巡逻船的船长虽然觉得奇怪，但是没多说什么，放我们过去了。
nodes.option_EN: Used the forged visa we prepared.
nodes.option_CHS: 使用之前准备的伪装签证吧。

nodes.snippet_EN: We thought we'd pulled one over on the patrol ship, but it turns out they were just waiting for us to get closer.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 以为瞒过巡逻船了，没想到对方只是在等我们靠近。 我们逃脱追捕，红楼却受到严重损害。

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber tried to charge through the barrier. Even though they didn't pursue us, our ship was badly damaged.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼尝试闯过舰队的拦阻，尽管对方没追上，却因此遭受严重的打击。
nodes.option_EN: See if we can charge through!
nodes.option_CHS: 闯过去试试看吧！

nodes.snippet_EN: As always, we sent out a signal pretending to be United Mining nobles. They looked it over for a long time, and even though they weren't able to figure out why we'd be flying a civilian vessel, they eventually let us pass.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 老样子，我们打出讯号，谎称自己是矿联的贵族，对方研究了很久，无法理解为什么我们会开着民间船，最后还是放我们通行。
nodes.option_EN: We've got no choice but to try sending them a modified signal...
nodes.option_CHS: 但我们也只有伪造讯号这方法...

nodes.snippet_EN: Not long after we sent out the signal, the patrol ships sent a barrage of attacks our way. Perhaps they never even planned on letting us go.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 讯号出去没多久，巡逻舰的炮火就扫了过来， 或许打从开始，他们就没有打算放过我们。

nodes.snippet_EN: The reporter was shocked after listening to the audio file, noting that these might be plans for war.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方听着音档的内容非常震撼， 直说这可能是战争前的计划，  「谢谢你的帮忙，如果这种消息公开出来，对矿业联合是一大打击...」，  事后她给了我们一笔丰厚的酬劳。
nodes.option_EN: I'm sure no one has heard about this...
nodes.option_CHS: 这内幕应该还没有人知道...

nodes.snippet_EN: "Very interesting. But a history of the Rumani Clan would only go as gossip."  She smiled wryly, almost like she knew the old man who had given us the book. Still, she paid us a little bit.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「吉普赛家族的故事很有趣，但只能当八卦新闻」  收货的对方苦笑，她似乎知道发送这本书的老人是谁，最后给了我们点酬劳。
nodes.option_EN: How about that Rumani history?
nodes.option_CHS: 或着老人给我们的吉普赛史...

nodes.snippet_EN: The video was seriously damaged, and the reporter said its content would make people feel sympathetic towards United Mining. She was not happy, but paid us anyway.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 影像残缺的片段太多，对方说大众看了只会同情矿业联合，不甚满意，最后给了我们点酬劳。
nodes.option_EN: How about that one time when United Mining was defeated?
nodes.option_CHS: 当年矿业联合陷落的数据...

nodes.snippet_EN: I still remember the response they sent back...   "Glory to the united. Honorable vessel, traveling from afar, we will escort you to a safe location."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得通讯传来了这样的信息：  「天佑矿联，尊贵而来的远方船只，我们会将您护送至安全的地点。」  我一时无法相信，菈米亚则露出了自信的微笑。
nodes.option_EN: Send a modified signal posing as a United Mining bureaucrat in distress.
nodes.option_CHS: 发出伪造讯号，假扮自己是落难的矿联政商

nodes.snippet_EN: I still remember the response they sent back...   "Glory to the united. Honorable vessel, traveling from afar, we will escort you to a safe location."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得通讯传来了这样的信息...  「天佑矿联，尊贵而来的远方船只，我们会将您护送至安全的地点。」  我一时无法相信，菈米亚则露出了自信的微笑。
nodes.option_EN: Send a modified signal posing as a United Mining bureaucrat in distress.
nodes.option_CHS: 发出伪造讯号，假扮自己是落难的矿联政商

nodes.snippet_EN: I still remember Lamar arguing as he was pushed out the door. I don't think he saw us. I just hope he wasn't taken away by United Mining.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我还记得拉马门口争执的背影，他似乎没有看见我们，只希望他不会被矿业联合带走。
nodes.option_EN: This looks like it will be a problem. Don't get involved.
nodes.option_CHS: 感觉会惹上麻烦事，别管了

nodes.snippet_EN: You're here to fix the memorial? Sorry, we don't have work for healthy folks like you.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 来修补纪念塔的吗？好手好脚的，这里没有你的空间

nodes.snippet_EN: Hey! You a bunch of adventurers looking for lumen? Come in, have a drink, and tell us a tale!
nodes.snippet_CHS: 你们！是寻找龙脉的冒险家吗？ 点一杯酒，和大家说说你的故事吧

nodes.snippet_EN: Having fun in the City of Dreams?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 如何，在梦幻之城玩得愉快吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: If you ain't doing nothing, get the hell outta the way. I've gotta family to raise. Not like you rascals, running around doing nothing.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 停泊的探勘人，没事就闪一边去，我还得工作养家，不像你们没事乱跑

nodes.snippet_EN: Neverlasting paths. It's no coincidence that you've arrived here, young man.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 二向无常，年轻人，会来到这里都不是偶然

nodes.snippet_EN: You're the Red Chamber crew, right? Better watch out, crime rate in Fortune 9 is at an all-time high.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 你们是红楼船队吧？提醒你，九禄这边什么人都有，犯罪活动抓不胜抓

nodes.snippet_EN: Ah, the young'uns from the association? Look at you! Setting so many darn records at your age. Real talents, I'll tell you what.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 龙脉协会的年轻人吗？年纪轻轻就创那么多纪录，现在真是人才辈出

nodes.snippet_EN: You there, young man. This is a place for remembrance. If you have no business here, please be on your way.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 年轻人，这里是凭吊死者的地方，没有要悼念谁，就快点离开吧

nodes.snippet_EN: You all interested in the launch platform, huh? Well, sorry. This isn't some toy that you can just screw around with.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对发射台有兴趣吗？抱歉，这可不是给人随意欣赏的玩具

nodes.snippet_EN: Ah! The great Red Chamber crew, what brings you here? Shouldn't you be out looking for intel?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼商船队，你们不打听龙脉消息来这做什么？

nodes.snippet_EN: Applying for mining rights? Fill in the documents over there. I'll notify you when we get any news.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 要申请矿权认证吗？去那边填写文件，有消息会再通知你

nodes.snippet_EN: Analyzing the incoming ship's ID...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 解析逼近的船体编号...又来了，是群山的海盗，应该又是奖金猎人！

nodes.snippet_EN: The ship took multiple hits as we charged through the enemy line.  After some panicked maneuvering, we managed to escape enemy fire.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 穿越的过程我们遭受数次射击， 一阵惊慌之下我们勉强穿过了火网。
nodes.option_EN: Should we try to charge through? Seems pretty dangerous...
nodes.option_CHS: 冲过去吗...但这实在太危险了

nodes.snippet_EN: From what I remember, the communications officer seemed confused about his mistake, so they just decided to let us go.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 印象中，对方通讯官发现自己弄错有点不解， 却依然放行了我们。
nodes.option_EN: Pose as a civilian ship by sending a modified signal.
nodes.option_CHS: 试着发送伪装讯号过去，伪装自己是一般民间船

nodes.snippet_EN: The old signal modifier failed to convince them. They immediately saw through the trick, and responded with a barrage of attacks.  Although we managed to escape, Red Chamber took quite a few hits.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 破旧的通讯器材似乎没有奏效 对方瞬间就拆穿了我们的伪装讯号，瞬间炮火齐上 虽然逃脱成功，红楼却受了严重的伤

nodes.snippet_EN: Hey there, you all need some help?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 探勘人，需要帮忙吗？依据龙脉公约，不论身份，只要船队有群山公民，我们将会提供人道支援

nodes.snippet_EN: Endless lumen, light the way... Welcome... stranded comrades of the Peaks. We are always ready to assist those in need.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 龙脉常在，风水引路...欢迎...群山落难的伙伴...我们随时可以援助

nodes.snippet_EN: Announcing that we were the Red Chamber crew was not only enough for the squad to escort us back for resupplies, they even offered us some fuel.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅将我们带回补给处，更为我们将油量做了一定的补给
nodes.option_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
nodes.option_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

nodes.snippet_EN: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end as they towed us back to the nearest space station. Dealing with stranded ships seemed to be a regular occurrence for them.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通讯一段有着细碎的抱怨声，他们似乎很常处理这种遇难的船只，默默地将我们带回最近的空间站
nodes.option_EN: Ask for assistance.
nodes.option_CHS: 请求对方的协助

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda was unable to convince them. For some reason it raised their suspicion, and after a brief moment of silence, they left without a word.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲交涉失败，对方认为我们可能是别有意图的民间船，沉默后自行离去。

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as we declined, we were met with a barrage of enemy fire. Fortunately this was expected, and the ship took minimal damage.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们一拒绝，对方的炮火就落了下来，但幸亏决定得早，红楼只有些许损伤。
nodes.option_EN: Better to decline the offer. They could be pirates...
nodes.option_CHS: 怕是海盗，不要贸然接受援助...

nodes.snippet_EN: We listened to them reminisce about their days in the military as they towed us back to a resupply point.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 商船将我们带回了可以补给的地方，运输红楼的过程中，电讯一端的对方聊着自己过往从军的经历。
nodes.option_EN: Let Remi do the negotiating.
nodes.option_CHS: 让菈米亚交涉看看

nodes.snippet_EN: The pirates made their intentions clear, as their boarding vessel smashed into our ship.  While we managed to fight them off, the ship took considerable damage.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那时红楼突然遭到登陆艇的撞击，是伪装的海盗。  尽管最后击退了对方，却受到了严重的伤害。

nodes.snippet_EN: This is a warning to the lumen seeking vessel at 6 o'clock. The Mt. Aurora patrol squad is after us.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告六点钟方向的龙脉探测船伙伴， 朝山巡逻队要逮到我们了

nodes.snippet_EN: Warning: Signal interferences have recently been on the rise.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 公告：最近电波干扰频繁

nodes.snippet_EN: Now what's a rusty, crusty lumen seeking vessel doing creeping into other people's airspace?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 破烂的龙脉探测船，混到别人的空域做什么？

nodes.snippet_EN: Eddie, we're getting a weird signal. I'm gonna play it and you tell me if we should respond...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 姐姐，红楼收到奇怪的通讯，现在播放出来，请判断是否回覆...

nodes.snippet_EN: Ignis above. Just like me, huh? We're united in so far as we're both runnin' from United, wouldn't you say?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 烛龙在上，是一样在回避矿业联合追捕的朋友吗？

nodes.snippet_EN: There's an unidentified spaceship that has been trailing us for some time now.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 有一艘船籍不明的飞船尾随我们许久，刚刚要求通讯，现在接通

nodes.snippet_EN: *Singing* Endless lumen, light the way~ That the belt may rise again one day!
nodes.snippet_CHS: （歌声）龙脉常在，风水引路～ 小行星必将奋起！

nodes.snippet_EN: A wave of dizziness came over me, and I saw the stars ablaze... the hazy silhouette of a young woman, and a booming starsong that resounded throughout the heavens...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 一阵晕眩中，我见到燃烧的星群...少女的朦胧身影，以及响彻穹苍的巨大龙鸣——
nodes.option_EN: If it'll make me feel better, why not?
nodes.option_CHS: 无所谓吧，如果能让我开心点

nodes.snippet_EN: I planned on leaving without looking back, but then I heard:  "Children of the Peaks. Take care."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我头也不回的离去，直到对方说出  「保重了，群山的孩子们。」 我才默默回头。
nodes.option_EN: Get away from me! Only weak-minded people use that stuff.
nodes.option_CHS: 离我远点，唯有软弱的人才会吸食汜作物

nodes.snippet_EN: An East Ocean shrine... not even slightly damaged, almost as if someone has been taking care of it all this time...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 瀛海的神坛...完全没有被破坏的痕迹，像被人细心照料一样...

nodes.snippet_EN: I implored Taiyang to grant me permission to enter this sacred ground. As I prayed, I felt as though I could hear the god whispering.  After I entered the shrine, I found a secret door that had not been opened. Inside was old tattered book...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我向太乙求告，希望得到进入这片圣地的许可。 在冥思之中，我仿佛听见了神明的低语。 当我进入神坛后，发现一扇未被打开的密门，里面放着一本破旧的书...
nodes.option_EN: (Taiyang, watch over me...)
nodes.option_CHS: （太乙垂怜，李莫仅求保佑...）

nodes.snippet_EN: Many years later I thought back on that shrine, drifting in space. Could I return there now and stand proudly before the gods? I only hope that this tranquil piece of East Ocean is preserved into eternity...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 多年后我常回想起， 那漂浮于无重力空间的祭坛。 如今的我是否可以骄傲地回去呢？ 只希望，那瀛海的宁静之地， 可以永远保持下去...
nodes.option_EN: (Before I restore my family's honor... I have no right to be here.)
nodes.option_CHS: （找到足够龙脉前，我没有资格在此...）

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber quickly changed its route and put some distance between us and the vessel. When they found out we hadn't responded to their request, they slowly crept off.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼迅速地改变航道，远离前方的船只。 对方发现通讯的请求没回应，默默的驶离了。
nodes.option_EN: It's too dangerous, just don't respond.
nodes.option_CHS: 太危险了，不要回应对方通讯

nodes.snippet_EN: The voice of an old man came through the comms system. I recognized it as the man from Shiratsuka, who I had given the Binarii prayer disc to.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 一位老者的声音从通讯设备传来， 我认出那声音， 是之前收下引魂盘的白冢老人。  他说因为感谢我馈赠引魂盘，得知我是瀛海人， 特地带给我这几年他搜集的珍宝...
nodes.option_EN: Request communication so we can identify them.
nodes.option_CHS: 要求跟对方通讯，辨明身份

nodes.snippet_EN: The message we tried to send got distorted traveling through the electromagnetic storm. As a result, we got mistaken for hackers and the vessel entered attack mode. We found ourselves face to face with a colossal monster, and had no choice but to scramble away.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尝试发送的讯号强度在电磁风暴中出现异常，我们被当成是黑客，对方瞬间进入全副武装，而面对庞然巨兽，我们只能仓皇而逃。

nodes.snippet_EN: The patrol squad detained both the ships, and after a thorough inspection of Red Chamber, they realized we had been falsely accused. In order to prevent damaging the reputation of the patrol squad, they used part of their reserve funds to compensate us.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 巡逻局扣押了我们两艘船，上红楼稽查后发现，这的确是误会一场。为了不要影响巡逻局的名声，他们运用局里的预备金，做了些补偿...  尽管结果不坏， 但当时菈米亚很不满艾妲没听她的。
nodes.option_EN: Jun's right, let's clear our name.
nodes.option_CHS: 李莫说得对，正面跟对方澄清

nodes.snippet_EN: The patrol squad caught up to us, and in the process fired some artillery our way, damaging Red Chamber. In the end, we were able to prove we were innocent, but they argued they had reason to suspect us and refused to compensate us for the damage they had caused.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 巡逻局的船追上来， 在逮捕过程数度开火，红楼的船体损坏。 尽管最后证明无罪， 巡逻局却以干扰执法为由，拒绝赔偿。
nodes.option_EN: Listen to Remi and let's get out of here.
nodes.option_CHS: 听菈米亚的，快走

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda almost ran up to United Mining and told them it was her. It reminded me that she was the kind of person who would make a scene at a press meeting.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲差点跑去跟矿联声称是她的歌声， 让我想起她是会在记者会冲出去的人。
nodes.option_EN: Don't let Eda do anything stupid!
nodes.option_CHS: 阻止艾妲做出傻事！

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda just straight up said that she had sung it. But after seeing her vocalizer, they politely thanked her for the tip and paid her. Then they waved her off.  After all, a witch who can't sing couldn't possibly be that singer. While I was grateful that nothing happened to her, for some reason, it didn't feel good.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲直接说那是她唱的， 但对方看到艾妲喉咙的辅具， 形式上给了点感谢通报的酬劳， 随手就将她打发。  毕竟不能唱歌的女巫，怎么可能是那位女歌手， 我庆幸没出事，但不知为何开心不起来
nodes.option_EN: Let Eda clear things up.
nodes.option_CHS: 让艾妲去理论

nodes.snippet_EN: "Thanks for understanding. Otherwise, we'd have to scrap an extra ship, if ya know what I mean, hehe. Here, take this. Now don't go around saying we're hogging all the work!"  Despite their mocking tone, they did send us a container. I think they were just trying to get us out of there.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「还好你们识相，不然我们打捞的残骸又要多一艘了，送你们一箱，别说我们抢生意。」  记忆中是个轻浮的声音，随后红楼船队收到了一箱抛射的货柜，船队似乎希望这能打发我们。
nodes.option_EN: Okay, okay. Leave the airspace.
nodes.option_CHS: 听他们的，离开空域吧

nodes.snippet_EN: The small speeder suddenly ejected large amounts of debris that smashed into Red Chamber. The collision pushed us off our path, and we could hear them snickering as they apologized over the comms system.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 搜寻队的小型快艇突然弹射大量的残骸， 跟红楼撞了满怀， 冲击之下红楼偏离了轨道， 电讯中传出他们的笑声跟抱歉声， 显然是故意的。
nodes.option_EN: Don't pay attention to them. Just continue on the same path.
nodes.option_CHS: 不用理他们，走我们的航道

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda spoke highly of the other ship, and the barkeep was ecstatic. Soon after, a container was seen heading for Red Chamber.   He said he regularly traded with Fortuna Entertainment, and that this was one of their better products.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲对着通讯简单说了点恭维的话。 酒吧老板乐不可支，不久， 对方船的气闸打出一个货柜，送往红楼， 他说那是定期跟桃源乡的贵人集团交易的好货。  记得里面装的是...
nodes.option_EN: I'll talk to him. Let me handle this.
nodes.option_CHS: 我来回覆他好了，通讯转给我

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber remained silent, but the other side of the comms system was filled with alcohol-fueled hooting and hollering. After some time passed, things settled down and they turned off their mic.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼沉默以对，通讯一端充满酒吧老板的叫嚣声，然后慢慢的就沉默了。
nodes.option_EN: (Tell Remi to ignore him.)
nodes.option_CHS: （叫菈米亚别理他）

nodes.snippet_EN: The Capybara Merchant Society ship docked and rapidly helped us with the armor.  He said there were 66 members in the society. If we ever came across one of his brothers, he hoped we could pass on this message: ／ ｀ ｴ）
nodes.snippet_CHS: 豚鲸商社的船与我们接泊后， 动作迅速俐落的为我们补给。  他说他们商社有66位， 如果有缘遇到他们其他兄弟， 帮他说声好 ／ ｀ ｴ）
nodes.option_EN: Don't be so suspicious. Let him help.
nodes.option_CHS: 别随便怀疑人，接受补给吧

nodes.snippet_EN: After we told him the whole story, he confessed that Bones had helped him a great deal.  "Looks like you did Bones a big favor... Well, I'm glad I didn't have to do nothing to ya'll."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方听我们说明事情的经过后，坦承其实白帮是他的恩人。  「看来你们还帮白大哥一把...不用动手太好了。」  他感伤地把一个礼物交给我们，说那原本要交给白老大，但既然你是白牙的恩人，那这就归你了。
nodes.option_EN: Let him come onboard and tell him what really happened.
nodes.option_CHS: 让他登船，把白牙最后的故事告诉他

nodes.snippet_EN: "Bones Brigade, this is for you!!!!"  That was the last thing we heard before the signal cut out. The firepower on that trading vessel was not that of some common peddler. He unleashed a hail of gunfire, and Red Chamber was barely able to make it out.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「白帮的弟兄，我来替你们报仇了！」  通讯切断前，我们只听到这个声明 那名商人的船上，有着超过普通行商的火力，他对着我们展开一阵炮轰，红楼差点支撑不住...
nodes.option_EN: Hmm... Sounds suspicious. Say no.
nodes.option_CHS: 感觉很可疑，拒绝他吧

nodes.snippet_EN: I remained silent at the time. Coming from East Ocean, I had my own thoughts about the war.  The old man shook his head in disapproval as he walked away.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时我没有回应，对于龙脉冲突， 瀛海人的心情其实是复杂的。 最后老人有些失望的摇了头， 转头离去。
nodes.option_EN: (As an East Oceaner, it feels inappropriate to help...)
nodes.option_CHS: （作为瀛海人，我无法轻易帮忙...）

nodes.snippet_EN: "Well then, get out of the way. There are people in line."  The man behind the counter didn't want to waste anymore time on us. He turned away and continued on with some other work.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「那就不要在这里挡路，后面还有很多人在等。」  办事员不想花心思理我们，回头继续和其他事。
nodes.option_EN: Sorry, not interested.
nodes.option_CHS: 抱歉，没有兴趣

nodes.snippet_EN: "True. You probably have so much work you'll never finish."  The director looked a bit disappointed as he walked away.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「也是，你们光接委托都忙不完了呢。」  经理无奈的离去。
nodes.option_EN: So sorry, we're pretty busy at the moment.
nodes.option_CHS: 我们还有事在身上，抱歉

nodes.snippet_EN: "Well, if you change your mind, please come back. We need the help."  The woman didn't even look up as she waved us away. She just kept trudging away at the pile of applications in front of her.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「改变主意可以来找我，我们非常缺人。」  专员头也不抬，挥手打发我们，低头继续处理那些数量庞大的申请文书。
nodes.option_EN: We've got a mission to do. We shouldn't be hanging around.
nodes.option_CHS: 还有任务在身，别逗留在此

nodes.snippet_EN: It's the Lumen Association's solar patrol squad! They offered us fuel and a trip back to the Solar Alerting Post!
nodes.snippet_CHS: 是龙脉协会的恒星巡逻队，他们说可以提供少量的油量补给

nodes.snippet_EN: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end. Those that worshipped Ignis would risk their lives on pilgrimages that went dangerously close to the sun, and it was clear that it annoyed the rescue crew.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通讯一端有着细碎的抱怨声，似乎很多崇拜太阳烛龙的信徒常会冒死前来朝圣，导致救援队不堪其扰。  他们给我们补给少量的油，「这够让你们飞到鬼方。」说完就默默离开了。
nodes.option_EN: We really have no choice but to beg them for help.
nodes.option_CHS: 只能哀求对方帮忙了

nodes.snippet_EN: After learning that we were the Red Chamber crew, they not only repaired some of our armor, but also gave us some fuel after telling us that the solar flares around here were frequent.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅协助我们修复部分装甲，直说这附近闪焰很频繁，希望能帮到你们，还为我们油量做了一定的补给。  「这是红楼应得的。」他们说。
nodes.option_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
nodes.option_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

nodes.snippet_EN: "Ignis above. We're truly sorry."  24 hours later, we got sent the digital contract with the results. On it was the excavation route they had taken.  It appeared one of the tunnels they had dug out collapsed. Luckily no one died, but we didn't make any money on our investment.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「烛龙在上，我们很遗憾。」  24时后，电子合同传送了结果， 上面标记了探勘的移动路线， 似乎是挖掘的坑道崩塌，尽管没人伤亡， 但我那次的投资是没有任何回报的。

nodes.snippet_EN: I was in the cave for a long time, and the last thing I remember was waking up in the medical tent. I was pretty hard on myself, but Eda told me not to worry about it.  Excavation has always been a risky endeavor, but when I was younger I was unable to accept failure.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那天我深入龙脉多时，最后的记忆却是躺在医护室，我很自责，但艾妲却叫我不要在意。  探勘多有风险，当年的我面对失败，有时还不能好好自处。

nodes.snippet_EN: They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of enemy fire.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 讯号在瞬间被拆解出来，对方的火炮齐射。  尽管最后侥幸的冲过火网，但是船基本上受伤严重，当时我们都怀疑自己还能航行多久...

nodes.snippet_EN: After a period of suffocating silence, we received a message:  "Miss Eda, please forgive us for disturbing the journey of a First Class United Mining Officer."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 一阵令人窒息的沉默后，对方的通讯来电。  「尊贵的矿联一级士官，艾妲女士，请原谅我们打扰您的航行之旅。」  我记得艾妲一脸受不了，还有菈米亚得意的表情。
nodes.option_EN: Send a modified signal to make them think we're also a United Mining vessel.
nodes.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为我们也是矿业联合船舰

nodes.snippet_EN: We risked our lives trying to charge through enemy lines, but we were unable to escape the military vessel's range of fire.  The last thing I remember was a blinding white light...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们拼命想冲过火网，但是完全逃不出矿联军船射程范围。  最后我只记得一阵白光...
nodes.option_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
nodes.option_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！

nodes.snippet_EN: This is a warning to the lumen seeking vessel ahead, OPUS-03. You have entered United Mining airspace.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告，前方的OPUS-03 龙脉探测船，你已步入了矿联的合法领空

nodes.snippet_EN: Do you need help, runner?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 探勘人，需要帮忙吗？依据龙脉公约，不论身份，只要船队有群山公民，我们将会提供人道支援

nodes.snippet_EN: "All the more reason why this shouldn't be happening."  The doctor didn't seem to care, and slowly dragged us back to Guifang. Eda was happily chatting away, almost as if she enjoyed these types of interactions.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「所以才不该出事，小鬼啰唆什么」  医生懒得理我们的证明，将红楼慢慢拖回鬼方，艾妲过程中很开心地跟对方聊天，似乎很享受这种互动。
nodes.option_EN: Doctor, we're experienced runners. We even got an award for it!
nodes.option_CHS: 医生，我们已经是荣誉探勘人了

nodes.snippet_EN: "Eda, as the captain, you have to pay more attention to these things. Since it's you and the crew... I'll give you some fuel."  The doctor pulled us back to Guifang's Lumen Association, complaining the entire trip.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「艾妲，你作为船长，自己要注意点...看在是你们的份上，我会稍微补一些油」  医生一边抱怨，一边将我们拖回鬼方的龙脉协会。  艾妲过程中始终笑着，她觉得医生还是老样子。
nodes.option_EN: Ask the doctor for help and tell her what happened.
nodes.option_CHS: 拜托医生，解释理由给她听

nodes.snippet_EN: "What a terrible excuse. I'll help you once... for Red."  The doctor was not pleased after she found out that Eda wasn't even able to manage her fuel, but she still towed us to safety.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「这理由也太烂了... 是看在红的份上，我才帮你这一次」  发现艾妲是因为管理不当，才导致油量不足，医生不满的说，却还是把我们带回安全的地方。

nodes.snippet_EN: You... Yes... it's you! Traitor! How dare you show your face around here! I... I thought I had taken care of you...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 你...对...你这叛徒怎么会出现在这里！你不是被我亲手...

nodes.snippet_EN: Remi stormed away, but the elderly man kept on speaking:  "If you come across one of the Rumani, please tell them our story... The princess was willing to sacrifice the clan... for her own, selfish love..."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 印象中菈米亚气得离去，老人却对着我滔滔不绝：  「如果你遇到流亡在外的吉普赛族人，把我们的故事告诉他...公主一人为了爱...宁可陪上全族的性命...」
nodes.option_EN: Oh, is that so? Why don't you two go back to East Ocean then?!
nodes.option_CHS: 你自己跟他滚回瀛海听！

nodes.snippet_EN: I wasn't sure why Remi got so upset. Maybe she just didn't want any trouble. After all, in United Mining territory, you had to be extra careful.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时我不清楚菈米亚为何如此愤怒， 或许是不愿惹上麻烦， 毕竟在矿业联合的地盘，凡事小心。
nodes.option_EN: This is the Peaks, geezer! Back off!
nodes.option_CHS: 这里是群山，离我远点

nodes.snippet_EN: Hey, OPUS-03? The lumen seeking vessel? How long you gonna keep us waiting? We've got your container, sign right here.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 喔，OPUS-03 龙脉探测船吗？也让人等太久，我都要把你们货柜查封了，东西都在里面，这里签个名就行

nodes.snippet_EN: Inside the massive container were several smaller confiscated containers. One of the corners was marked with Red Chamber's name.  There was also an envelope. Inside was surprisingly elegant handwriting.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 货柜里面是边境各种查禁的货柜，其中一块角落标记着红楼商船的名称。 以及一封信，内文的字体娟秀
nodes.option_EN: Officer White? Just sign it.
nodes.option_CHS: 什么白军官，签个名去看看了

nodes.snippet_EN: At least that's what I thought. Yet when Red Chamber docked, I found Remi sitting in front of a massive container.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管当时那么想，但回到红楼停泊的宇宙港时，菈米亚却一个人坐在巨大的货柜之前。
nodes.option_EN: You can't trust United Mining...
nodes.option_CHS: 矿业联合的话别采信...

nodes.snippet_EN: "My master taught me everything I know about Myria. It's different from the commonly accepted, mainstream beliefs."  After leaving the students with that, we left.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「我的万道是师父教我的，与普遍的信仰不同。」  记得艾妲如此说，我们就离开了当地。
nodes.option_EN: Always believe what your teachers tell you.
nodes.option_CHS: 相信你们老师的故事就好

nodes.snippet_EN: "Okay then. So, for the first class... we'll start by planting flowers."  The vice-president and the children didn't know what to make of that. Sometimes I forgot she had left the tower's teachings behind. To this day, I still remember what she taught the students.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「好，那第一课，我们先从种花开始。」  艾妲的第一句话，让副会长跟小孩傻在当地， 我差点忘了她是离开巫塔的女巫...至今我都还记得她上课的内容。
nodes.option_EN: Tell them the truth about Myria.
nodes.option_CHS: 向他们介绍万道的真实

nodes.snippet_EN: "Transfer the credits to the account provided. Thank you for your cooperation." Without even boarding the ship, they sent some personal bank account info via an encrypted message.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「汇款至下面帐号，感谢您的配合」  对方甚至不需要登船，直接加密信息将私人户头传送过来，打款完成后便快速离去。  我慢慢理解，为什么群山人对矿联多少都有敌意。
nodes.option_EN: Send them some money and hope they let us go.
nodes.option_CHS: 塞点钱，希望他们放行

nodes.snippet_EN: "You shouldn't be flying drunk... We have some equipment that will extract the alcohol from you. Would you like us to send it over?"  It turned out that Eda wasn't any better than I was at handling situations like that.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「喝酒驾驶很危险，需要我们提供醒酒设备吗？」  我印象很深刻，艾妲跟我一样很不擅长这类沟通，觉得被污辱的对方打开了防御系统，追着红楼一阵扫射才结束。

nodes.snippet_EN: I implored Taiyang to grant me permission to enter this sacred ground, but I received no response. Perhaps Taiyang thought I wasn't ready yet.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我向太乙求告，希望得到进入这片圣地的许可。 但没有任何回应，或许太乙认为我还没有准备好。

nodes.snippet_EN: Even though I didn't find anything, Eda didn't blame me.   At that time, I still hadn't found out what she was really looking for.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管我什么都没找到，但艾妲也没责怪我，  当时我还不知道艾妲真正寻找的东西， 到底是什么。

nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber's communication module was basically an antique. Remi spent a lot of time trying to connect the two signals, but it ended up taking too long and we missed the show's broadcast time.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 由于红楼的通讯阀是老旧的古董，菈米亚花了很多时间希望把两边的讯号接起，但缓不济急，最后错过了节目播出时间。

nodes.snippet_EN: Remi seemed to have been looking for us for a long time. As soon as we returned, she told me to get the hell away. But she was even angrier at Eda for not responding to her message and missing some interview.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 菈米亚似乎找我们很久，一等到我跟艾妲两人回去时，她除了叫我滚开外，更强烈抱怨艾妲没有听到她的通讯，导致错过了一则采访。

nodes.snippet_EN: Hearing that I was heading to the betting tables, Remi did something she never did: came to my side and offered me some advice.  We didn't win much, but it definitely made me feel better.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 听到我要上赌桌， 菈米亚难得凑在我旁边给了一堆意见， 虽然没有赚到多少，但当下我的确忘了悲伤。
nodes.option_EN: Let's bet like a Peaker. Not too much and not too little...
nodes.option_CHS: 用群山一般的赌金就好...

nodes.snippet_EN: I didn't know what came over me. When Eda heard how much I wanted to bet, she raised her eyebrows. The bets got larger and larger, and just when I thought I was going to lose it all...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时我不知道我怎么了， 听到我想赌这么大，艾妲皱了下眉头， 结果真的越输越大，就在我以为要输光的时候...
nodes.option_EN: If I want to make myself feel better, then I should bet big!
nodes.option_CHS: 要转换心情，就赌大一点！

nodes.snippet_EN: Remi wasn't too happy when I sat next to Eda, but the captivating plot soon drew her attention away. Eda was even more focused on the stage, and was visibly affected when Terra spoke those tragic lines...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管菈米亚不满，但紧凑的剧情很快将她的注意力拉走，艾妲更是看得目不转睛，尤其是神明后土说出那悲伤的台词时...
nodes.option_EN: (I should sit next to Eda...)
nodes.option_CHS: （我就坐在艾妲旁边吧...）

nodes.snippet_EN: As I searched for a seat, a flood of people completed engulfed me. By the time I sat down, I couldn't even see the stage.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 就在我寻找位置时，排山倒海的人群将我淹没，等我坐下时，已经远得连舞台都看不见了。
nodes.option_EN: It's pretty crowded. I'm going to find a seat somewhere else.
nodes.option_CHS: 有点挤，我另外去找个空位看好了

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda seemed to be lost in memory, as she closed her eyes to resonate with the lumen. I didn't want to interrupt.   She then shook her head, and stopped exploring.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲仿佛沉浸在过往的回忆般，闭着眼感应汜气好一阵子，我不好打扰。 之后她只是摇摇头，放弃了探索。

nodes.snippet_EN: I didn't even ask the crew. Thinking back, I regret not doing so.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我没有提出把引魂盘交给对方的要求，现在想想有点后悔
nodes.option_EN: It belongs to the Red Chamber, I can't just give it away...
nodes.option_CHS: 这都是红楼的资产...不能给人...

nodes.snippet_EN: "Just as I thought... I can't give up just yet."  A look of appreciation came across the old man's face as he carefully hung the prayer disc on the wall and began telling us his story.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「果然...我还不能放弃...」  老人露出感激的表情，小心翼翼地将它挂在墙面上，缓缓说起了故事，
nodes.option_EN: Ask Eda if she'd be willing to give it to him.
nodes.option_CHS: 请艾妲将引魂盘交给对方吧

nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as the credits were transferred, the children broke into laughter.  "Mama said to give this to any runner that helps us!" They smiled as one of them handed me something.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 信用点才一落款，孩子笑得像花开一样  「妈妈说要把这给愿意帮忙的探勘人。」  他说着给了我们...
nodes.option_EN: Peakers should look after one another. If it's a scam, then so be it.
nodes.option_CHS: 群山人要互相帮忙，被骗就算了

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda turned around and left without a word. I suppose that was her choice.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲转身就离开了，我认为那是她的选择。
nodes.option_EN: Remi is right. Let's go.
nodes.option_CHS: 菈米亚说得对，还是走吧

nodes.snippet_EN: Since we had no clues concerning his disappearance, we slipped away.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们默默的离开，毕竟也没有线索。
nodes.option_EN: (I have no idea where he's at. Let's go.)
nodes.option_CHS: （手边也没有这人的线索，走吧）

nodes.snippet_EN: "Pfffft! Ridiculous! I know James. That bugger has so much damn energy there's no way he's dead."  I felt terrible, but the nurse and his family couldn't stop laughing. To thank me for providing them with the information, the family gave me a small reward. They seemed in high spirits, but I noticed that they were clutching tightly to the recorder.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「别说傻话了，那精力旺盛的家伙怎么可能死掉？」  一反我的悲伤，护士跟家属反而笑得开心，为了答谢找到线索，家属给了我们些报酬，但我只注意到，家属胸口握得紧紧的录音笔。
nodes.option_EN: If I'm not mistaken, this is the last recording he made...
nodes.option_CHS: 如果没错，这是他最后的录音...

nodes.snippet_EN: The woman kept saying what a shame it was and asked Eda if there was some way to contact her, but Eda politely refused.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方不断说着这有多可惜，希望艾妲留下联络方式，但还是被婉拒了。
nodes.option_EN: This won't do us any good. Let's go.
nodes.option_CHS: 太胡闹了，走了

nodes.snippet_EN: Jun, Remi didn't mean what she said.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 李莫，我还是想说，菈米亚无心的

nodes.snippet_EN: Sir, the higher-ups said we need to adjust the refinement procedures according to the research presented at the conference!
nodes.snippet_CHS: 长官，上头说精练的步骤，需要依照研讨会的内容修正！我们必须去除意识扰动的现象，提高纯度0.5个百分点

nodes.snippet_EN: They stuffed Red Chamber with containers, most of which were full of alcohol and food. The fact that United Mining was the food supplier for the Peaks was probably their greatest means of control.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方将大量的货柜送上红楼， 里面是满满的酒水与食物， 作为群山粮食供应商的矿业联合， 这或许才是他们最大的统治武器。
nodes.option_EN: (Let's just help out to avoid running into any trouble.)
nodes.option_CHS: （先接下来再说，免得出事）

nodes.snippet_EN: "Hmm... Didn't hear anything about the media coming..."  They didn't think much more about it. The security inside wasn't nearly as intense as outside, and we luckily got by without them discovering our true identities.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「没听说有媒体要来这里啊...奇怪」  对方似乎不疑有它， 农场内部的保全不如外面森严 让我们躲过一劫， 幸好没有发现我们的身份。
nodes.option_EN: We're with the Daily Lumen. We were granted access here...
nodes.option_CHS: 我们是龙脉日报，授权来这里采防...

nodes.snippet_EN: "May fire and iron light the stars." The woman eagerly took the presentation and was happy to listen to Eda's request.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 「愿铁火于星辰闪耀」，对方感激地接受了研讨会的简报，接受艾妲的访问
nodes.option_EN: Give her the presentation from the conference.
nodes.option_CHS: 把上次听过的简报内容给对方

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda left in a hurry. She was frightened by the progress of lumen refinement procedures in recent years. Since it destroyed the starsongs emitted by the lumen, it seemed to her like something was killed in the process.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲很快的离开了现场，汜精炼的步骤这几年让她觉得恐怖，因为过程逐渐破坏了汜传出的龙鸣声，对她来说像是扼杀了某种灵魂。
nodes.option_EN: No... We can't keep getting distracted by these tasks.
nodes.option_CHS: 算了，别节外生枝

nodes.snippet_EN: Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.  That day we were unfortunate enough to experience this firsthand.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有愤怒与天罚的神话，我们终于体会到了。
nodes.option_EN: Raise the shields to full power!
nodes.option_CHS: 启动汜气装甲最大电磁输出功率！

nodes.snippet_EN: Thanks to Eda's quick thinking, we were able to avoid getting hit.  Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 所幸艾妲即时反应，我们才躲过一劫。  群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有它愤怒与天罚的神话。
nodes.option_EN: Hide behind an asteroid. We'll be fine.
nodes.option_CHS: 立刻躲进小行星的暗面，没事的

nodes.snippet_EN: Eda never cared about dealings like this, so we just left in silence.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲向来对这些事没很关切，我们默默就离开了。
nodes.option_EN: We need to be looking for Banshee.
nodes.option_CHS: 寻找黑龙才是当务之急

nodes.snippet_EN: "Oh what shame, what a shame. The Capybara Merchant Society is filled with nothing but kind souls. How could you not trust us..."  Then the comms system cut off.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 太可惜了，我们豚鲸商社都是好人，怎么不相信我们呢... 对方说完后，切断了通讯。
nodes.option_EN: ...Don't risk it.
nodes.option_CHS: ...别冒无谓的风险

nodes.snippet_EN: This is a warning to the vessel ahead. You have entered United Mining airspace. Please leave immediately.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警告，前方的龙脉探测船，你已经步入了矿联的合法领空，请立刻离开

nodes.snippet_EN: After a period of suffocating silence, we received a message:  "Miss Eda, please forgive us for disturbing the journey of a First Class United Mining Officer."
nodes.snippet_CHS: 一阵令人窒息的沉默后，对方的通讯来电：  「尊贵的矿联一级士官，艾妲女士，请原谅我们打扰您的航行之旅。」  我记得艾妲一脸受不了，还有菈米亚得意的表情。
nodes.option_EN: Send a modified signal to make them think we're also a United Mining vessel.
nodes.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为我们也是矿业联合船舰

nodes.snippet_EN: They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of enemy fire.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 讯号在瞬间被拆解出来，对方的火炮齐射。  尽管最后侥幸的冲过火网，但是船基本上受伤严重，当时我们都怀疑自己还能航行多久...

nodes.snippet_EN: For a while, we thought we had gotten lucky and passed through enemy lines, but a rail cannon sniped us from a distance.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们一度以为侥幸的冲过火网，但是巨大的磁轨炮却从远方狙击而来，我印象只剩一片红色的闪光...
nodes.option_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
nodes.option_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！

nodes.snippet_EN: I was not expecting the work to be... that. However, the officials were very satisfied with the services we provided.  I try not to think about that experience.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 工作跟我想像的不同， 但大官们似乎很开心，  我想...这件事我就不特别回忆了。
nodes.option_EN: Will this really help?
nodes.option_CHS: 有这会有帮助吗？

edges.option_EN: Okay... Let's go.
edges.option_CHS: 我们...一起去就可以

edges.option_EN: Let's wait for Remi and we'll all go together.
edges.option_CHS: 等菈米亚回来一起去吧

edges.option_EN: ...Whatever. Let's get this over with.
edges.option_CHS: ...就参加吧

edges.option_EN: Couple? Relationship? Get the hell outta here!
edges.option_CHS: 什么鬼恋情，滚出我视线！

edges.option_EN: (It concerns Eda's master. Let her deal with it.)
edges.option_CHS: （跟艾妲的师父有关，就让她交涉吧...）

edges.option_EN: Excuse me, have we met before?
edges.option_CHS: 老鼠兄弟，我们是不是哪里见过？

edges.option_EN: ...I can get you in touch with the captain. The guy's just a servant.
edges.option_CHS: ...男的只是仆役，我帮你联络船长就好

edges.option_EN: Our mission is to look for caves, and that comes first. Let's go.
edges.option_CHS: 眼前的龙脉任务第一优先..离开吧

edges.option_EN: Send a modified signal to make them think we're also a United Mining vessel.
edges.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为我们也是矿业联合船舰

edges.option_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
edges.option_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！

edges.option_EN: The goods are right here.
edges.option_CHS: 你的货物都准备好了

edges.option_EN: I have no idea what you're talking about...
edges.option_CHS: 我不清楚你在说什么...？

edges.option_EN: Pose as a civilian ship by sending a modified signal.
edges.option_CHS: 试着发送伪装讯号过去，伪装自己是一般民间船

edges.option_EN: We've got no choice. Let's charge through and take a few hits.
edges.option_CHS: 顾不得装甲受损了，冲过去吧

edges.option_EN: Pose as a civilian ship by sending a modified signal.
edges.option_CHS: 试着发送伪装讯号过去，伪装自己是一般民间船

edges.option_EN: Bounty hunters are in it for the money. Try to bribe them.
edges.option_CHS: 追悬赏的都是为了钱，试着贿络他们

edges.option_EN: Remi is always listening to me sing. How about having her join me this time?
edges.option_CHS: 菈米亚听我唱歌那么多次，跟她一起唱吧

edges.option_EN: Let's see how the whole crew sounds!
edges.option_CHS: 全船队一起试试看好了...

edges.option_EN: Jun always keeps his word. I suppose that's a good thing.
edges.option_CHS: 答应人的事尽量做到，是李莫的优点

edges.option_EN: Remi's right. We'll figure out what to do with the container.
edges.option_CHS: 菈米亚说得对，货柜私下处理掉就好

edges.option_EN: Raise the shields to full power!
edges.option_CHS: 启动汜气装甲最大电磁输出功率！

edges.option_EN: Wait it out in the anti-radiation shelter.
edges.option_CHS: 躲进船内抗辐射的避难室，撑过去

edges.option_EN: Pose as a United Mining patrol crew that needs some help.
edges.option_CHS: 发出矿联的军用伪造讯号，假扮自己是需要救援的巡逻队

edges.option_EN: The way things are looking, paying them off seems like the best option...
edges.option_CHS: 事到如今，除了缴款也没有更好的办法了···

edges.option_EN: Let Remi do the negotiating.
edges.option_CHS: 让菈米亚交涉看看

edges.option_EN: Better to decline the offer. They could be pirates...
edges.option_CHS: 怕是海盗，不要贸然接受援助...

edges.option_EN: Ask for assistance.
edges.option_CHS: 请求对方的协助

edges.option_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
edges.option_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

edges.option_EN: Pose as a United Mining military vessel by sending a modified signal.
edges.option_CHS: 发送伪装讯号，告诉他们我们是矿联的军船

edges.option_EN: We've got no choice. Charge through by taking a few hits.
edges.option_CHS: 顾不得装甲受损了，冲过去吧

edges.option_EN: Let Remi do the negotiating.
edges.option_CHS: 让菈米亚交涉看看

edges.option_EN: Better to decline the offer. They could be pirates...
edges.option_CHS: 怕是海盗，不要贸然接受援助...

edges.option_EN: See if we can convince them to help us...
edges.option_CHS: 试着拜托对方看看，请求协助...

edges.option_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
edges.option_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

edges.option_EN: See if we can convince them to help us...
edges.option_CHS: 试着拜托对方看看，请求协助...

edges.option_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
edges.option_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

edges.option_EN: Pose as a United Mining patrol crew that needs some help.
edges.option_CHS: 发出矿联的军用伪造讯号，假扮自己是需要救援的巡逻队

edges.option_EN: The way things are looking, paying them off seems like the best option...
edges.option_CHS: 事到如今，除了缴款也没有更好的办法了···

edges.option_EN: We need the money. I'd like to help.
edges.option_CHS: 我们的经济状况不太好，我愿意帮忙

edges.option_EN: I'm willing to do anything to help the crew.
edges.option_CHS: 如果能帮上船队，我愿意试试看

edges.option_EN: Sure, not a problem. I can give you some suggestions.
edges.option_CHS: 没问题，我来分享点建议

edges.option_EN: Some work could be good for the crew...
edges.option_CHS: 这样多少可以帮助红楼...

edges.option_EN: (Jun, please...)
edges.option_CHS: （拜托李莫了...）

edges.option_EN: Sorry, our crew is pretty busy with cave running.
edges.option_CHS: 抱歉了，但我们船队还忙着探勘龙脉

edges.option_EN: (It doesn't matter what his views are, I need to contribute to the crew...)
edges.option_CHS: （不管他怎么说，我得努力帮上红楼...）

edges.option_EN: Sorry, I don't think I'm suited for this type of work.
edges.option_CHS: 失礼，这个工作不适合我

edges.option_EN: If you really need me, I can help you out.
edges.option_CHS: 需要的话，我愿意帮你

edges.option_EN: I've never done that before. I'm afraid I won't be of much help.
edges.option_CHS: 我没有这方面的经验，帮不上忙

edges.option_EN: I can give it a try.
edges.option_CHS: 我可以尝试看看

edges.option_EN: I shouldn't promise things I'm not sure I can follow through on.
edges.option_CHS: 不能乱答应，没做好反而会困扰人

edges.option_EN: Sure, we'll take a look. Perhaps we'll find some unexpected intel...
edges.option_CHS: 多少看看，或许会有什么有用的情报...

edges.option_EN: Don't worry about it. We can take care of ourselves.
edges.option_CHS: 我们船队会自己处理

edges.option_EN: Yeah, I think we're gonna need him...
edges.option_CHS: 只能麻烦李莫了...

edges.option_EN: No thanks. Let's get going.
edges.option_CHS: 算了，还要赶路

edges.option_EN: I'll try my hand at anything!
edges.option_CHS: 不管什么工作，我都愿意试试！

edges.option_EN: Sorry, I'm not interested.
edges.option_CHS: 抱歉，我对此没什么兴趣

edges.option_EN: Let Jun try. You can't survive these journeys without scavenging.
edges.option_CHS: 让李莫试试，在万壑旅行，拾荒是必要的。

edges.option_EN: It might be something, but we still shouldn't waste any time on it.
edges.option_CHS: 虽然可惜，但还是别乱来好了。

edges.option_EN: Trick the boarding vessel into turning back by sending it a modified signal.
edges.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号给登陆艇，欺骗他们折返

edges.option_EN: Um... West Mount Tonitrus?
Pose as a civilian ship and tell them they've mistaken us for someone else.
edges.option_CHS: 变造自己讯号为民间船，并告知对方认错人了

edges.option_EN: Get in contact with the slums' consul to try and help.
edges.option_CHS: ...协助跟贫民窟的领事沟通

edges.option_EN: Well, they shouldn't be forcing all these ads on us. Let them have it, Remi.
edges.option_CHS: ...谁叫他们到处盖台，就照你說的做

edges.option_EN: Pretend like we're one of them to figure out if they're trying to trick us.
edges.option_CHS: 先伪装成同业，确认他们是不是骗子

edges.option_EN: Let's use the reso-scanner to locate the vessel and avoid an attack.
edges.option_CHS: 以防万一被攻击，先用龙脉共振仪找出对方船的位置

edges.option_EN: Remi's right. Let's pose as a military vessel.
edges.option_CHS: 相信菈米亚...发送伪造的军船讯号

edges.option_EN: Send out a signal and see if the automated response is working.
edges.option_CHS: 先发送讯号过去，看自动询答器还能不能运作

edges.option_EN: We've got the shipment of food you're looking for.
edges.option_CHS: 你们的粮食货柜我们带来了

edges.option_EN: Oh, cut it out. Just get out of orbit.
edges.option_CHS: 别说闲话，避开轨道就好

edges.option_EN: Trust in Remi. Pose as a military vessel and try to bluff your way though.
edges.option_CHS: 相信菈米亚，装成军用船混过去

edges.option_EN: Send them a modified signal and pretend to be a United Mining vessel.
edges.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为是矿业联合船舰

edges.option_EN: Try to convince them we're civilian spies working for the military.
edges.option_CHS: 试着欺骗我们是军方的民间卧底

edges.option_EN: Let them come aboard to buy her some time.
edges.option_CHS: 让他们上船盘查，拖对方时间
