edges.option_EN: You can use our ship as a relay station. No problem.
edges.option_CHS: 我们的船可以借你们当中继站

edges.option_EN: Just do something, anything!
edges.option_CHS: 做点什么就对了！

edges.option_EN: Pose as a high ranking military officer and reprimand them.
edges.option_CHS: 伪装自己是高级军官，骂回去

edges.option_EN: Help the ships pass by safely.
edges.option_CHS: 协助引导船只安全通过吧

edges.option_EN: Pose as a ranking officer and tell them the hunt has been called off.
edges.option_CHS: 伪装自己是军方高层...叫他们放弃追捕

edges.option_EN: Let us dock and our technician will help you repair your comms system.
edges.option_CHS: 要求停泊，我们的船师可以过去维修

edges.option_EN: Run like we always do!
edges.option_CHS: 跟之前一样加速逃离！

edges.option_EN: Um... Mount Immanis Malefica?
edges.option_CHS: 是...大巫山？

edges.option_EN: That sounds risky. Tell them we can do a video interview.
edges.option_CHS: 登船太危险，告知对方能视讯采访

edges.option_EN: It's truly terrible, but we simply can't help them.
edges.option_CHS: 虽然很遗憾，但我们帮不上忙

edges.option_EN: Remi, enough with the pranks.
edges.option_CHS: 够了，别老是恶作剧

edges.option_EN: It won't hurt to make a trade.
edges.option_CHS: 做个交易无仿

edges.option_EN: Tell them Red Chamber is a retired vessel with no relation to United Mining.
edges.option_CHS: 跟他表明我们只是退役的军用船，跟矿业联合无关

edges.option_EN: I think Jun has the right idea. It'll be safer to just give them some armor.
edges.option_CHS: 听李莫的，缴纳装甲比较安全

edges.option_EN: It just looks like a drifting freight container. No need to waste time on it.
edges.option_CHS: 看影像只是漂流的货柜，不用特别花时间

edges.option_EN: Sorry, I have no idea what you're talking about.
edges.option_CHS: 抱歉，我不清楚你们在说什么

edges.option_EN: Just charge through... If the modified signal doesn't work, it'll be a disaster.
edges.option_CHS: 冲过去吧...伪造失败可不得了

edges.option_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
edges.option_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！

edges.option_EN: Let them stop and inspect the ship.
edges.option_CHS: 让对方停船抽检

edges.option_EN: Then leave the airspace immediately.
edges.option_CHS: 那就立刻离开空域

edges.option_EN: *Sigh*... Just bribe them.
edges.option_CHS: ...算了，试着贿络他们...

edges.option_EN: (I swear upon my honor that I'll beat that record!)
edges.option_CHS: （赌上探勘人尊严，超越纪录给你看！）

edges.option_EN: Sorry. The greatest champions compete with themselves.
edges.option_CHS: 失礼了，但只有自己能与自己竞争

edges.option_EN: Sure, let's help them out.
edges.option_CHS: 就帮帮他们吧

edges.option_EN: There's a bounty out on us. We can't risk broadcasting a signal for someone.
edges.option_CHS: 我们四处被悬赏，不可能帮人家广播

edges.option_EN: Have Jun do it. It's not like they'll show the face of an extra.
edges.option_CHS: 这请李莫帮忙演出吧，临演也不会拍到脸

edges.option_EN: If it's about witches... I guess I could help.
edges.option_CHS: 既然是女巫有关的剧场，就帮个忙吧

edges.option_EN: The Red Chamber crew will take care of it.
edges.option_CHS: 交给我们红楼商船队吧

edges.option_EN: We shouldn't be wasting any time with stuff like this.
edges.option_CHS: 别浪费时间在其他地方了

edges.option_EN: We'll make a tiny bet. And I'll pay for it, don't worry about it...
edges.option_CHS: 小赌就好...而且这种事我自己出

edges.option_EN: East Oceaners don't gamble. Thanks anyway.
edges.option_CHS: 瀛海人不做这种事，抱歉

edges.option_EN: Let's all go see it together!
edges.option_CHS: 大家一起看吧！

edges.option_EN: Maybe I should be spending this time looking for my master...
edges.option_CHS: 把时间拿去寻找师父吧...

edges.option_EN: Eddie, give it a try! I wanna hear you sing!
edges.option_CHS: 姐姐试试看吧，我很想听你的歌声

edges.option_EN: (Eddie needs more rest.)
edges.option_CHS: （再让姐姐休息一阵子好了）

edges.option_EN: Please, tell me!
edges.option_CHS: 是的，请告诉我！

edges.option_EN: (Looks like a preacher... Better not respond.)
edges.option_CHS: （感觉是传道师...不要回应好了）

edges.option_EN: (Yeah, let Remi destroy the wall.)
edges.option_CHS: （让菈米亚敲掉整片墙板）

edges.option_EN: (Hmm... I'll take care of this myself.)
edges.option_CHS: （我会自己动手...）

edges.option_EN: Witches are still working with them? Let's try to hear what they're saying...
edges.option_CHS: 竟然有女巫涉入！靠近一点窃听...

edges.option_EN: This is going to be more trouble than it's worth. Let's get out of here.
edges.option_CHS: 感觉有什么麻烦事，早点离开

edges.option_EN: (There's way too much data here. I'm going to need both of them to help.)
edges.option_CHS: （数据太多了，请李莫菈米亚都来帮忙...）

edges.option_EN: (Jun and I will take care of this...)
edges.option_CHS: （...我跟李莫两人一起就好）

edges.option_EN: Let's see what this is all about.
edges.option_CHS: 参加研讨会吧

edges.option_EN: Ask if Banshee will be discussed at the conference.
edges.option_CHS: 询问研讨会有没有黑龙情报

edges.option_EN: Alright, but you'll need to help me bring Eddie over.
edges.option_CHS: 好，你要负责帮我把姐姐带回来

edges.option_EN: Tsk... What's that got to do with me?
edges.option_CHS: 啐、跟我有什么关系

edges.option_EN: (Let Jun give it a shot...)
edges.option_CHS: （让李莫试试看吧...）

edges.option_EN: Sorry, we've got somewhere to go.
edges.option_CHS: 抱歉，我们还在赶路

edges.option_EN: (You wanna blast stuff...? Sounds fun.)
edges.option_CHS: （炸飞...好啊，我蛮想试试看...）

edges.option_EN: Was Red Grant ever sent here to perform inspections?
edges.option_CHS: 红・葛兰特有来视察过这里吗？

edges.option_EN: Pull yourself together! Block United Mining to let them go through.
edges.option_CHS: 振作！故意阻挡矿业联合的航道，让他们冲过

edges.option_EN: Use our affiliation with the association to try and talk with United Mining.
edges.option_CHS: 用龙脉协会的关系与矿联沟通

edges.option_EN: There's always a way to help.
edges.option_CHS: 总有些我能做的事

edges.option_EN: ...There's nothing I can do to help.
edges.option_CHS: ...就凭我能做什么...

edges.option_EN: Enough! I'm not hanging around some place that humiliates witches like this!
edges.option_CHS: 够了，别停留在这种羞辱女巫的地方

edges.option_EN: I should still help them. Maybe I could get some good intel.
edges.option_CHS: ...勉强帮帮他们，或许能打听到一些消息

edges.option_EN: Of course. Anything I can do to mess with United Mining.
edges.option_CHS: 好，只要能干扰矿业联合

edges.option_EN: There's no need to take it that far.
edges.option_CHS: 不需要做到那种地步

edges.option_EN: I spent my childhood here. I should hang around for a while.
edges.option_CHS: 童年都在这里度过，多花点时间吧

edges.option_EN: Let's just take a quick look...
edges.option_CHS: 简单看看就好...

edges.option_EN: Who cares about a fine, I want to climb the Tower one last time.
edges.option_CHS: 罚锾无所谓，最后我想爬上塔看看

edges.option_EN: It doesn't matter. My master was better than this place anyway.
edges.option_CHS: 只是间容不下师父的建筑

edges.option_EN: Let's help him out.
edges.option_CHS: 帮帮他们吧

edges.option_EN: We can't be hanging around here. We've got to get to Silk Oasis...
edges.option_CHS: 没时间耗在这里，得前往丝州...

edges.option_EN: Try to get its location and see if we can pull it in.
edges.option_CHS: 试着定位他，打捞起来看看

edges.option_EN: I have a bad feeling about this. Let's move out of its way.
edges.option_CHS: 令人不安的巧合，让红楼避开轨道吧

edges.option_EN: It might have something useful inside. Let's figure out how to open it.
edges.option_CHS: 花点时间想办法打开它，或许会找到些什么

edges.option_EN: It might be something, but we still shouldn't waste any time on it.
edges.option_CHS: 虽然可惜，但还是别乱来好了。

edges.option_EN: Let's not waste time here. We better get going.
edges.option_CHS: 别花时间在这了，早点离开

edges.option_EN: Listen to Remi. It couldn't hurt for Jun to do some more exploring.
edges.option_CHS: 听菈米亚的，请李莫再努力一下

edges.option_EN: (Hmm... Maybe I should see how the Peakers do things?)
edges.option_CHS: (要试试看群山人的处世方法吗...）

edges.option_EN: An Oceaner would never let someone do the running for them!
edges.option_CHS: 探勘怎么能交给别人！

edges.option_EN: Sorry. Cave running is not about winning and losing.
edges.option_CHS: 失礼，探勘不是比较输赢的地方

edges.option_EN: (I'll show them what a real East Ocean runner looks like.)
edges.option_CHS: （让他们知道...瀛海龙脉同盟的水准）

edges.option_EN: ...That the belt may rise again one day.
edges.option_CHS: ...小行星必将奋起

edges.option_EN: ...Warriors of Praesidio will crush United Mining one day.
edges.option_CHS: ...龙守勇士，必将战胜矿业联合

edges.option_EN: (Cleaning up the battlefield is a sacred endeavor. I should lend him a hand.)
edges.option_CHS: （清理战场是神圣的事，帮帮他们）

edges.option_EN: (I'm afraid I won't be of much help... Best get going.)
edges.option_CHS: （帮不上忙...早点离开吧）

edges.option_EN: If Jun is sure he can do it, I shouldn't stop him.
edges.option_CHS: 李莫都这么说了，就让他试试看吧

edges.option_EN: No, it's too dangerous. Don't do anything stupid.
edges.option_CHS: 太危险了，先不要轻举妄动

edges.option_EN: Ask Eda if she hears anything unusual coming from the cave.
edges.option_CHS: 请艾妲感应龙脉的声音是否异常

edges.option_EN: Follow the lumen lights to find the answer.
edges.option_CHS: 顺着汜光点前去寻找答案

edges.option_EN: I can't knowingly put a crewmember in danger...
edges.option_CHS: 不能让船员遇到风险...

edges.option_EN: Have Remi tell Jun what to do.
edges.option_CHS: 请菈米亚协助指示李莫

edges.option_EN: It's way too dangerous. Exploration is only worth it if you come out alive.
edges.option_CHS: 太过危险了，还是放弃搜索吧

edges.option_EN: I need to figure out what happened here. Keep going!
edges.option_CHS: 为了了解当年的实情，我必须继续前进

edges.option_EN: I can't just sit around reminiscing...
edges.option_CHS: 别眷恋这种地方了...

edges.option_EN: Try to resonate with the lumen...
edges.option_CHS: 试着共鸣看看...

edges.option_EN: Let's help her out.
edges.option_CHS: 帮帮他们吧

edges.option_EN: We should avoid running into any potential problems.
edges.option_CHS: 还是要避免一切可能的意外

edges.option_EN: The Lee clan can only move forward by acknowledging past failures.
edges.option_CHS: 必须面对错误的历史，鸢家才能往前走

edges.option_EN: Let the past stay in the past.
edges.option_CHS: 就让过去的遗留在过去吧

edges.option_EN: (How do they know where the control panel is? Sounds suspicious.)
edges.option_CHS: （...他们怎么知道有控制面板？小心为上）

edges.option_EN: I'm with the association as well. Don't worry, I'll save you.
edges.option_CHS: 同为协会伙伴，我会救你们出来的。

edges.option_EN: Since Jun can help, let him take care of it.
edges.option_CHS: 李莫既然可以帮忙，让他处理吧

edges.option_EN: Remi's right. We've got a mission to complete. Let's get out of here.
edges.option_CHS: 听菈米亚的，任务在身早点离开吧

edges.option_EN: Use the exploration robot to dig out a tunnel.
edges.option_CHS: 用探索机器人挖出通道

edges.option_EN: I shouldn't risk it.
edges.option_CHS: 不要冒险进入危险区域吧

edges.option_EN: Do as he says. Put down the equipment and leave.
edges.option_CHS: 照他的做，留下设备就走。

edges.option_EN: This is ridiculous. I refuse to accept.
edges.option_CHS: 无理的要求，我不会同意的。

edges.option_EN: (Stay put and wait to be rescued.)
edges.option_CHS: （留在原地，等待红楼的救援）

edges.option_EN: (I can't just sit around and wait. Think of a way to get back to the ship.)
edges.option_CHS: （等下去不是办法，自行想办法返航）

edges.option_EN: It's fine. Just open it up.
edges.option_CHS: 没问题，挖开他们。

edges.option_EN: Don't mess with it. A locked door on an agricultural satellite is not normal.
edges.option_CHS: 别乱来，农业卫星深锁的大门，不太寻常

edges.option_EN: Let's do this! There must be valuable goods inside.
edges.option_CHS: 突破吧，里面应该有不少珍贵的东西。

edges.option_EN: Koomsung Transport was known for their booby traps. We'd better be careful.
edges.option_CHS: 金城集团的诡雷很有名，少碰为妙。

edges.option_EN: It's hard to say when Red Chamber will need supplies. Best to go check it out.
edges.option_CHS: 难保证红楼会有需要的时候，深入看看吧

edges.option_EN: Eda's right. Let's go.
edges.option_CHS: 艾妲说得有理，离开吧

edges.option_EN: Maybe there's something beneath all this. Dig it up and see what you can find.
edges.option_CHS: 说不定有些物资藏在底下，挖掘看看。

edges.option_EN: All that's left is rubble. There's nothing valuable to be found here.
edges.option_CHS: 只剩一堆碎石了，没必要开挖。

edges.option_EN: Try hacking into the beacon and turn off the system!
edges.option_CHS: 试着黑进信标，关闭系统！

edges.option_EN: (Calm down... Jun will figure it out.)
edges.option_CHS: （冷静...李莫应该会自己想出办法）

edges.option_EN: (Try again to get in touch with Eda and tell her to leave the airspace.)
edges.option_CHS: （再次呼叫艾妲脱离空域）

edges.option_EN: (Try to disable the defense system on my own.)
edges.option_CHS: （想办法自己拆了自动防卫系统）

edges.option_EN: Remi's right. Let them deal with their own problems.
edges.option_CHS: 菈米亚说得对，别管吧

edges.option_EN: Jun's right. Let's pretend to be part of the family and get them in touch.
edges.option_CHS: 李莫说得对，我们可以伪装是罗登家族，协助对方接触

edges.option_EN: Tell them that Red Chamber is a retired vessel. We're just a civilian crew.
edges.option_CHS: 告诉他们红楼已经除役，现在是民间探勘船

edges.option_EN: They're just bluffing. No need to respond.
edges.option_CHS: 虚张声势而已，没必要回应他们

edges.option_EN: Try using the reso-scanner to find a way out.
edges.option_CHS: 试着用龙脉共振仪找路

edges.option_EN: Just be patient. Red Chamber's system always comes back online...
edges.option_CHS: 只要忍一下，红楼的系统总会回复...

edges.option_EN: Modify our signal and slip into the parade.
edges.option_CHS: 伪装自己的讯号，混进阅兵船队中

edges.option_EN: We've got no choice. Let's charge through!
edges.option_CHS: 没办法，冲过去了！

edges.option_EN: Jun's right. I should take a listen...
edges.option_CHS: 李莫说得对，仔细听听看汜水流动...

edges.option_EN: Let Remi adjust the flow of lumium.
edges.option_CHS: 让菈米亚去调整管线的流量

edges.option_EN: Forget it. This type of illegal excavation is everywhere.
edges.option_CHS: 算了吧，非法探勘本来就是常态

edges.option_EN: Cave robbers! I won't stand by as they destroy these valuable artifacts!
edges.option_CHS: 居然是盗采矿脉的人...不能让他破坏遗迹！

edges.option_EN: We did come all this way, so we might as well open it up.
edges.option_CHS: 都来了一趟，还是打开看看

edges.option_EN: It might be a trap. Curiosity killed the cat.
edges.option_CHS: 怕什么陷阱，别太好奇了

edges.option_EN: (Try to open it with a starsong.)
edges.option_CHS: （试着演奏，打开龙门）

edges.option_EN: Best not risk it.
edges.option_CHS: 别乱来好了...

edges.option_EN: It'd be an honor to help. Just tell me what you need me to do!
edges.option_CHS: 很荣幸能提供协助，就依照您的指示进行吧！

edges.option_EN: It'd be an honor. I'll be sure to use all the knowledge I've learned excavating.
edges.option_CHS: 很荣幸能提供协助，我会将下龙穴学到的知识全用上
一起共鸣

edges.option_EN: Step aside! I need to turn off the transmutation chamber!
edges.option_CHS: 你们都让开，让我关闭风转箱！

edges.option_EN: Run! This place is going to blow!
edges.option_CHS: 快点撤，这里要爆炸了！

edges.option_EN: Try performing at the wall.
edges.option_CHS: 对着岩壁共鸣看看。

edges.option_EN: No time to be wasted here. Let's just start digging.
edges.option_CHS: 事不宜迟，直接开挖吧。

edges.option_EN: Find the lumenide pipeline nearby, and resonate to drain the lumenide.
edges.option_CHS: 附近找看看汜水管线，先共鸣把水泄掉。

edges.option_EN: The pond's not deep. Just jump in.
edges.option_CHS: 这水池也不深，直接跳进去就行。

edges.option_EN: Alright, I'll help you place the explosives.
edges.option_CHS: 好吧，我会替你们安装好炸药。

edges.option_EN: Sorry, I've never blown up a cave before.
edges.option_CHS: 抱歉，我没有在龙穴爆破的经验。

edges.option_EN: Ignis above. Thank you for the offer.
edges.option_CHS: 烛龙在上，谢谢你给我们的机会

edges.option_EN: (We're here to find caves, not to buy stolen goods.)
edges.option_CHS: （我们是来找龙脉的，不是赃物商）

edges.option_EN: This is way too suspicious. Don't pay attention to them.
edges.option_CHS: 太可疑，无视他们

edges.option_EN: We need to lend a hand to those in need.
edges.option_CHS: 帮忙是应该的

edges.option_EN: Crap... Just pretend we're a transport vessel.
edges.option_CHS: 糟糕...谎称自己是运输船队好了

edges.option_EN: Let's get out of here!
edges.option_CHS: 直接逃走比较快！

edges.option_EN: We do have this Rodin family artifact. Let's help Lamar out.
edges.option_CHS: 手边有罗登家族的信物，就当为拉马报恩吧

edges.option_EN: Have Jun head out into space and explore.
edges.option_CHS: 请李莫前往太空探索看看...

edges.option_EN: See if Red Chamber can get any closer.
edges.option_CHS: 试着让红楼靠近一点

edges.option_EN: We don't have the time for this. Charge out of here.
edges.option_CHS: 管不了那么多，闯过去吧。

edges.option_EN: Used the forged visa we prepared.
edges.option_CHS: 使用之前准备的伪装签证吧。

edges.option_EN: See if we can charge through!
edges.option_CHS: 闯过去试试看吧！

edges.option_EN: We've got no choice but to try sending them a modified signal...
edges.option_CHS: 但我们也只有伪造讯号这方法...

edges.option_EN: I'm sure no one has heard about this...
edges.option_CHS: 这内幕应该还没有人知道...

edges.option_EN: How about that Rumani history?
edges.option_CHS: 或着老人给我们的吉普赛史...

edges.option_EN: How about that one time when United Mining was defeated?
edges.option_CHS: 当年矿业联合陷落的数据...

edges.option_EN: Send a modified signal posing as a United Mining bureaucrat in distress.
edges.option_CHS: 发出伪造讯号，假扮自己是落难的矿联政商

edges.option_EN: Send a modified signal posing as a United Mining bureaucrat in distress.
edges.option_CHS: 发出伪造讯号，假扮自己是落难的矿联政商

edges.option_EN: This looks like it will be a problem. Don't get involved.
edges.option_CHS: 感觉会惹上麻烦事，别管了

edges.option_EN: Should we try to charge through? Seems pretty dangerous...
edges.option_CHS: 冲过去吗...但这实在太危险了

edges.option_EN: Pose as a civilian ship by sending a modified signal.
edges.option_CHS: 试着发送伪装讯号过去，伪装自己是一般民间船

edges.option_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
edges.option_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

edges.option_EN: Ask for assistance.
edges.option_CHS: 请求对方的协助

edges.option_EN: Better to decline the offer. They could be pirates...
edges.option_CHS: 怕是海盗，不要贸然接受援助...

edges.option_EN: Let Remi do the negotiating.
edges.option_CHS: 让菈米亚交涉看看

edges.option_EN: If it'll make me feel better, why not?
edges.option_CHS: 无所谓吧，如果能让我开心点

edges.option_EN: Get away from me! Only weak-minded people use that stuff.
edges.option_CHS: 离我远点，唯有软弱的人才会吸食汜作物

edges.option_EN: (Taiyang, watch over me...)
edges.option_CHS: （太乙垂怜，李莫仅求保佑...）

edges.option_EN: (Before I restore my family's honor... I have no right to be here.)
edges.option_CHS: （找到足够龙脉前，我没有资格在此...）

edges.option_EN: It's too dangerous, just don't respond.
edges.option_CHS: 太危险了，不要回应对方通讯

edges.option_EN: Request communication so we can identify them.
edges.option_CHS: 要求跟对方通讯，辨明身份

edges.option_EN: Jun's right, let's clear our name.
edges.option_CHS: 李莫说得对，正面跟对方澄清

edges.option_EN: Listen to Remi and let's get out of here.
edges.option_CHS: 听菈米亚的，快走

edges.option_EN: Don't let Eda do anything stupid!
edges.option_CHS: 阻止艾妲做出傻事！

edges.option_EN: Let Eda clear things up.
edges.option_CHS: 让艾妲去理论

edges.option_EN: Okay, okay. Leave the airspace.
edges.option_CHS: 听他们的，离开空域吧

edges.option_EN: Don't pay attention to them. Just continue on the same path.
edges.option_CHS: 不用理他们，走我们的航道

edges.option_EN: I'll talk to him. Let me handle this.
edges.option_CHS: 我来回覆他好了，通讯转给我

edges.option_EN: (Tell Remi to ignore him.)
edges.option_CHS: （叫菈米亚别理他）

edges.option_EN: Don't be so suspicious. Let him help.
edges.option_CHS: 别随便怀疑人，接受补给吧

edges.option_EN: Let him come onboard and tell him what really happened.
edges.option_CHS: 让他登船，把白牙最后的故事告诉他

edges.option_EN: Hmm... Sounds suspicious. Say no.
edges.option_CHS: 感觉很可疑，拒绝他吧

edges.option_EN: (As an East Oceaner, it feels inappropriate to help...)
edges.option_CHS: （作为瀛海人，我无法轻易帮忙...）

edges.option_EN: Sorry, not interested.
edges.option_CHS: 抱歉，没有兴趣

edges.option_EN: So sorry, we're pretty busy at the moment.
edges.option_CHS: 我们还有事在身上，抱歉

edges.option_EN: We've got a mission to do. We shouldn't be hanging around.
edges.option_CHS: 还有任务在身，别逗留在此

edges.option_EN: We really have no choice but to beg them for help.
edges.option_CHS: 只能哀求对方帮忙了

edges.option_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
edges.option_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

edges.option_EN: Send a modified signal to make them think we're also a United Mining vessel.
edges.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为我们也是矿业联合船舰

edges.option_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
edges.option_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！

edges.option_EN: Doctor, we're experienced runners. We even got an award for it!
edges.option_CHS: 医生，我们已经是荣誉探勘人了

edges.option_EN: Ask the doctor for help and tell her what happened.
edges.option_CHS: 拜托医生，解释理由给她听

edges.option_EN: Oh, is that so? Why don't you two go back to East Ocean then?!
edges.option_CHS: 你自己跟他滚回瀛海听！

edges.option_EN: This is the Peaks, geezer! Back off!
edges.option_CHS: 这里是群山，离我远点

edges.option_EN: Officer White? Just sign it.
edges.option_CHS: 什么白军官，签个名去看看了

edges.option_EN: You can't trust United Mining...
edges.option_CHS: 矿业联合的话别采信...

edges.option_EN: Always believe what your teachers tell you.
edges.option_CHS: 相信你们老师的故事就好

edges.option_EN: Tell them the truth about Myria.
edges.option_CHS: 向他们介绍万道的真实

edges.option_EN: Send them some money and hope they let us go.
edges.option_CHS: 塞点钱，希望他们放行

edges.option_EN: Let's bet like a Peaker. Not too much and not too little...
edges.option_CHS: 用群山一般的赌金就好...

edges.option_EN: If I want to make myself feel better, then I should bet big!
edges.option_CHS: 要转换心情，就赌大一点！

edges.option_EN: (I should sit next to Eda...)
edges.option_CHS: （我就坐在艾妲旁边吧...）

edges.option_EN: It's pretty crowded. I'm going to find a seat somewhere else.
edges.option_CHS: 有点挤，我另外去找个空位看好了

edges.option_EN: It belongs to the Red Chamber, I can't just give it away...
edges.option_CHS: 这都是红楼的资产...不能给人...

edges.option_EN: Ask Eda if she'd be willing to give it to him.
edges.option_CHS: 请艾妲将引魂盘交给对方吧

edges.option_EN: Peakers should look after one another. If it's a scam, then so be it.
edges.option_CHS: 群山人要互相帮忙，被骗就算了

edges.option_EN: Remi is right. Let's go.
edges.option_CHS: 菈米亚说得对，还是走吧

edges.option_EN: (I have no idea where he's at. Let's go.)
edges.option_CHS: （手边也没有这人的线索，走吧）

edges.option_EN: If I'm not mistaken, this is the last recording he made...
edges.option_CHS: 如果没错，这是他最后的录音...

edges.option_EN: This won't do us any good. Let's go.
edges.option_CHS: 太胡闹了，走了

edges.option_EN: (Let's just help out to avoid running into any trouble.)
edges.option_CHS: （先接下来再说，免得出事）

edges.option_EN: We're with the Daily Lumen. We were granted access here...
edges.option_CHS: 我们是龙脉日报，授权来这里采防...

edges.option_EN: Give her the presentation from the conference.
edges.option_CHS: 把上次听过的简报内容给对方

edges.option_EN: No... We can't keep getting distracted by these tasks.
edges.option_CHS: 算了，别节外生枝

edges.option_EN: Raise the shields to full power!
edges.option_CHS: 启动汜气装甲最大电磁输出功率！

edges.option_EN: Hide behind an asteroid. We'll be fine.
edges.option_CHS: 立刻躲进小行星的暗面，没事的

edges.option_EN: We need to be looking for Banshee.
edges.option_CHS: 寻找黑龙才是当务之急

edges.option_EN: ...Don't risk it.
edges.option_CHS: ...别冒无谓的风险

edges.option_EN: Send a modified signal to make them think we're also a United Mining vessel.
edges.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为我们也是矿业联合船舰

edges.option_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
edges.option_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！
